name: Team Booker
subject: Please take a moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we wanted
to make sure you saw our message from yesterday.

Here’s the short of it: our mid-month fundraising deadline is TONIGHT, and
we need your help reaching our $15,000 goal. And right now, we’re a little
over $2,000 away.

So, please take a moment to read our email to you below (along with some
great photos of our Kentucky road trip thus far!), and know this: our
movement isn’t possible without the support that grassroots donors like
you provide.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220217?refcode=em20220217-1581&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1581_346206_gFWlez&akid=1581%2E346206%2EgFWlez ]Chip in $5 or whatever you can to our campaign right now,
and help us reach our goal ($25.14 is our average donation).

With gratitude,

Team Booker

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: CharlesBooker.org [info@e.charlesbooker.org]
Date: Wed, Feb 16, 2022 at 3:32 PM
Subject: The next stage for our campaign:
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]

Peter, this is
important:

Our campaign is currently $15,000 short from where we need to be to reach
our mid-month fundraising goal.

We’re relying on donations from emails like this to make sure we stay on
track with our fundraising and make sure our team has the funds we need to
replace Rand Paul.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220217?refcode=em20220217-1581&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1581_346206_gFWlez&akid=1581%2E346206%2EgFWlez ]Will you chip in $25.14 (our average donation) or anything you can
right now to help us hit our goal before midnight tomorrow? We’ll explain
later in this email why your support is more important than ever at this
critical moment for our campaign.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220217?refcode=em20220217-1581&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1581_346206_gFWlez&akid=1581%2E346206%2EgFWlez ]Contribute $25.14

For the past week, Charles has been on the road with our team meeting
voters across Kentucky and spreading our message for bold, progressive
change.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220217?refcode=em20220217-1581&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1581_346206_gFWlez&akid=1581%2E346206%2EgFWlez ][IMG]

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220217?refcode=em20220217-1581&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&refcode2=1581_346206_gFWlez&akid=1581%2E346206%2EgFWlez ][IMG]

We can feel the excitement on the ground to turn Kentucky blue. The
conversations we’re having with voters is the beginning of our work to
unite our Commonwealth and make sure we finally send someone to the U.S.
Senate who will fight for us.

But we know that if we want to win, we need to continue ramping up our
voter outreach efforts, planning more trips like this, and make sure our
people power is felt on Election Day.

Here’s the harsh reality we face: This kind of organizing work is
expensive. From training volunteers, paying for gas, and running our
political ads — there’s a lot of expenses ahead of our campaign. On top of
that, we need significant resources and funding to compete with the
corporate PAC and special interest money that has protected Rand’s seat.

It’s going to take a powerful, grassroots funded movement to organize and
mobilize enough folks to take back Kentucky’s seat at the table.

clean_body: I don’t trust anyone more than I do her. | Friend, I’ll cut to the chase: if we want to save our country, we must take back the U.S. House and Senate in November. That’s why I’m emailing you today. My friend — and conservative fighter — Mariannette Miller-Meeks needs our help. Mariannette was one of the first candidates I endorsed as part of my Veterans to Victory program. She’s a fellow veteran, a conservative, and she needs our help to win in November. If you want to save America from socialism and fire Nancy Pelosi, then please rush a donation of whatever you can afford to support Mariannette right now. | If we want safe communities for our children and families... if we want America to be respected around the world... and if we want a secure border, then we must support leaders like Mariannette Miller-Meeks. And we must fire Nancy Pelosi. Please act now. In service, Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. Box 33 Ottumwa, IA 52501 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Your assignment in Anderson County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Our next filing deadline is less than 48 hours away.
#
**Our 254 County Mobilization Plan is key to Beto winning in a state as big and diverse as Texas.** No county is too small, too Republican, or too _anything_ for us to show up, organize, and compete for their votes. We’re going to go _everywhere_ and talk to _everyone_.
But with our next Texas Ethics Commission mandatory filing deadline just two days away, we need to ensure that we have a budget for organizing and advertising in each of Texas’ 254 counties. So here’s what you need to know about your assignment to Anderson.
**You’ve been assigned to sponsor Anderson County in Texas.** More than 28,856 voters are registered there, and we’ve set a goal of raising $14,428 to fund our 254 County Mobilization plan. **Can Beto count on your help to reach Anderson County voters?** **⇢**[Make a $25 donation to reach 50 voters in Anderson County.****
**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53238?refcode=ema20220217-176671&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&t=4&akid=176671%2E444211%2EZKEaQA)**⇢**[Make a $50 donation to reach 100 voters in Anderson County.****
**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53238?refcode=ema20220217-176671&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&t=5&akid=176671%2E444211%2EZKEaQA)**⇢**[Make a $100 donation to reach 200 voters in Anderson County.****
**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53238?refcode=ema20220217-176671&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&t=6&akid=176671%2E444211%2EZKEaQA)**⇢**[Make a $250 donation to reach 500 voters in Anderson County.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53238?refcode=ema20220217-176671&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&t=7&akid=176671%2E444211%2EZKEaQA) **[Sponsor Anderson County »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53238?refcode=ema20220217-176671&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&t=8&akid=176671%2E444211%2EZKEaQA)**
---
The truth about this race is that we might never match Greg Abbott’s overall spending. He’s had a major head-start on fundraising, not to mention support from corporate mega-donors.
**But our 254 County Mobilization plan gives us a BIG edge over Abbott.** You would be surprised at how many people will vote with us if given a chance to hear from our campaign and about our positive vision for the future of this state. In counties where most people vote Republican, competing for votes will help us close the margins. And in counties that often vote Democrat, showing up and organizing will help us increase our margins.
**If we can raise enough money to organize, advertise, and show up in all 254 counties, we’ll have what it takes to elect Beto in November.[Can you help us hit our fundraising goal for Anderson County before our mandatory TEC deadline that’s less than 48 hours away?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53238?refcode=ema20220217-176671&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&t=9&akid=176671%2E444211%2EZKEaQA)**
Thank you for considering a donation to reach the 28,856 registered voters of Anderson County. This is what a true grassroots campaign looks like. Talking to everyone, writing no one off, competing for every vote.
— Team Beto
**[Contribute »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53238?refcode=ema20220217-176671&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Anderson&t=10&akid=176671%2E444211%2EZKEaQA)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220217-176671-footer&t=11&refcode2=176671_444211_ZKEaQA&akid=176671%2E444211%2EZKEaQA)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

clean_body: | | | | Our next Congresswoman from Wyoming. | Peter, Earlier today, Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, released a statement endorsing Harriet Hageman for Congress. We hope you’ll join him in supporting Harriet, our nation depends on it. We need to remove Liz Cheney from office and we need YOUR help. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathan=20Hochman=20for=20Attorney=20General=202022?=
subject: Assemblymen Smith and Voepel Join Team Hochman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
These two Assembly leaders are the latest elected officials to endorse Nathan Hochman for Attorney General. | | |
---
| | Welcome to the team, Assemblyman Randy Voepel and Assemblyman Thurston "Smitty" Smith!

I am so grateful to have the support of these two strong leaders from our California Assembly Republican Caucus.

Assemblyman Smith has worked on important legislation to protect peace officers and address the rapidly escalating issue of illegal marijuana grows. Assemblyman Voepel has likewise been a steadfast advocate for public safety and solutions to our crime, homelessness, and drug crises in California.

I look forward to working with them to secure a safe and secure future for families in their districts and across the State.
---
|
---
---
| Assemblyman Smith and Voepel join a growing list of legislative and Congressional Republicans supporting Nathan Hochman for Attorney General, including:
---
| | _Congressman Darrell Issa
Congressman Jay Obernolte
Congressman Ken Calvert
Congresswoman Michelle Steel
Congresswoman Young Kim
Assembly Republican Leader James Gallagher
Assemblywoman Marie Waldron
Assemblyman Tom Lackey
Assemblyman Heath Flora
Assemblyman Phillip Chen
Assemblyman Steven Choi, P.hD.
Assemblywoman Janet Nguyen
Assemblyman Thurston "Smitty" Smith
Assemblyman Randy Voepel_
---
| Every day, Californians are feeling the impacts of failed leadership from the current Attorney General and the anti-public safety policies he supports. Our campaign for Attorney General is about restoring public safety in California, and our momentum continues to grow across the state.

With your continued support, we will make California a better, safer place to call home.

Sincerely,

Nathan Hochman
_Candidate for California Attorney General_
---
| |
---

name: Joe Arpaio
subject: Need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Arpaio for Fountain Hills, Arizona Mayor
body:
Fellow American, It's the middle of the quarter and I need your help to win back a community in need. |
No longer want to receive emails from Joe? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_s=6a341f4cc47143c8804ac8078aa23208&_t=G9opt-0USGnfsdToP2h72Et5m6X-tQqsCthjV13KaKPTPvZhfqcRstnTxytBJrBaqu5xVcfchbH8Mj_9QPz2V_dolcDog8upSCViPLWlTbZLv8xuoD7AyrTJ5cPPRhLjB26LAO4ZviJ6OJZHlAugUavO-ZNWsrGJylEFP8yPdhE%3D).

---
You agree that local is better, right Fellow American

**I’m asking because that’s what we’re fighting for here. A local community fighting for local solutions instead of more bureaucratic red tape that fails to help the people in need.**

Right now my community is dealing with a tax and spend liberal Mayor who wants to increase taxes for more bureaucracy. When’s the last time that worked for anyone? **Just look at New York and California where everyone is fleeing because it DOESN’T WORK!**

Don’t let another American community fall victim to more liberalism. body:
Can you help?
Hey folks,

I know my team has been sending you a few emails over the past couple of days, and that’s because we’re trying to meet our mid-month fundraising deadline. Thanks to your support last month, we were able to start off strong, and we need your help if we want to continue in this fight to flip this seat blue and represent the honest values of our district.

Fellow American,

**We're doing something BIG.**

We're hosting an amazing contest, and one lucky winner from Team Herschel will win a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

On March 2, President Donald J. Trump and I are hosting the first annual "Great American Invitational" golf tournament in Palm Beach, and we're giving away one spot to a lucky winner!

In addition to winning a round of golf at President Trump's amazing International Golf Club, our winner will also win the following:

| | **Team, tune in tonight to catch Marcy on MSNBC!**

Marcy will be on MSNBC’s _The Last Word With Lawrence O’Donnell_ talking about **President Biden’s historic visit to Lorain, Ohio.**

The president visited our district to highlight economic progress bolstered by the infrastructure package, which was signed into law last November. This is the **first time a sitting president has ever visited Lorain.**

Marcy was honored to meet Air Force One as it arrived in Cleveland and **welcome the President to Ohio.** She and Lawrence are set to discuss the investments Democrats are making in Ohio.

clean_body: Marcy will be on The Last Word With Lawrence O’Donnell at 10pm eastern TONIGHT. | \- Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team, tune in tonight to catch Marcy on MSNBC! Marcy will be on MSNBC’s The Last Word With Lawrence O’Donnell talking about President Biden’s historic visit to Lorain, Ohio. The president visited our district to highlight economic progress bolstered by the infrastructure package, which was signed into law last November. This is the first time a sitting president has ever visited Lorain. Marcy was honored to meet Air Force One as it arrived in Cleveland and welcome the President to Ohio. She and Lawrence are set to discuss the investments Democrats are making in Ohio. https?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-saving-our-postal-service-2&emailreferrer=email1446870&emailsubject=breaking-marcy-on-msnbc-tonight If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Thank you for your support, Kaptur for Congress Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. Fellow Conservative,

Democrats just went public with their online fundraising data for the second half of 2021, and the numbers we're seeing across the board are astonishing.

**Democrats are proving once again, as they did in 2020, that they're going to give us Republicans a run for our money - quite literally - in this year's midterm elections.**

If you've been following our Senate race in Georgia, then you already know polling shows our race is a dead heat. You may also know our Democrat opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock, is the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. But what we're now learning is that he raised over $11 million from an astounding 410,276 donors ONLINE in the last six months of 2021.

**Fellow Conservative, that's a lot of money from a lot of donors.** In fact, he's building a massive online network of Democrat donors on the scale of a presidential campaign - not a normal Senate campaign.

That's why we're reaching out to you today with a simple request: **[will you join our grassroots army of conservative PATRIOTS who will propel us to victory in Georgia and flip the Senate in favor of Republicans?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=6c173308e68b4c79b4a1c12c5b13cd4f&_e=MmkK0-uBRKQNqyLX1pxeKrgCcihreGjxQ6jaNsuREaJLeNwHIVvg6ZpBOISgTfKloZZLc4TBgcs1CI-oO_df6g8gODElglRlJ-Lx5qJ4Mha5F5Dpb-p8UW_PTeStplhKwaipOTfH3rOQUaAw8zIbQWbUlLaPm3FjGMiRiy5MEGblqI661-YOAMFHjdrzrIEtuqkhLZSgmFIqMif2aGv1Acy-QKix8DXi3VWN7Ay973ryabs7NuBoYMkEWnRvfZn0-vV728jO62Rw_WmDdx5jOM0bF4819BzXdKCLFweX_9l9HtNvJQez-rzhOUi0FcNuFB_7SCJCVhk72Nm6JfsXI4vMLEIwrVRDkxLREpde5WzuFCJ61k_LMoXP5SN65LxBtji8W0TwOOu9lubXBxyJ4y_anepr65dN7Pl-dlXRP9s8yy7JRJ0UY4U85Scvd_ghkCmJHgG2_2nPw5ll4v0pmEsCsLzbOvFYGEzOLSZ_dKU%3D)**

**This month, we're setting a goal of recruiting 10,000 new donors so we can begin closing the financial lead that our opponent holds over our campaign at the moment.**

**[Can we count on you to make a gift of $3.50 or more today and add your name to our list of donors?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=6c173308e68b4c79b4a1c12c5b13cd4f&_e=MmkK0-uBRKQNqyLX1pxeKrgCcihreGjxQ6jaNsuREaJLeNwHIVvg6ZpBOISgTfKloZZLc4TBgcs1CI-oO_df6g8gODElglRlJ-Lx5qJ4Mha5F5Dpb-p8UW_PTeStplhKwaipOTfH3rOQUaAw8zIbQWbUlLaPm3FjGMiRiy5MEGblqI661-YOAMFHjdrzrIEtuqkhLZSgmFIqMif2aGv1Acy-QKix8DXi3VWN7Ay973ryabs7NuBoYMkEWnRvfZn0I9VC2EQ1UOLcdNYl4LtOHuCm1o4BAPV6kD1swfjXxmkLdZGGIGjyu5zRIAdSzomYpPnd5QPbJ8FOn0ZOt2RiqkBiM3FLBhMTU_2OSJ0Apmg10P7GEycEWrVPgRL_g6K6nVSaHfZqqpeccUIDClyDYbOfMlt1sz7Sr5UzllyWUNH6PjSe4K1PsHd0_Dp41nvZUvsxjSEPV7mxrykWY1B9OFiZHZYJikui38koJOpOXvI%3D)**

**THERE IS NO SUGARCOATING THE FACTS. Our opponent is raising A LOT OF MONEY.**

Before we ever thought about entering the race, Senator Warnock was raising millions of dollars from hundreds of thousands of Democrat donors around the country. Middlesex County is critical to defeat Frank Pallone in November because it has two of the largest towns in the district and accounts for 70% of the 6th Congressional district. With our winning strategy we will be able to pull from 15-25% of Frank Pallone's base from these towns and deliver a much needed and much awaited victory for Republicans. This fight won't be easy, but it is VERY WINNABLE THIS YEAR WITH THE RIGHT CANDIDATE. A candidate who can penetrate the Democrat areas and chip away at their voter base. We did it against Cory Booker and we will do it against Frank Pallone. But If we're going to beat Pallone and take back Congress, we need to raise money. So here it is, plain and simple... Your support and your donation today will help us defeat Frank Pallone and take back Congress. So please consider making a contribution today. And let's do this!, Thank you!, Rik Mehta | "Help me beat Pallone - Chip in $25" | "Help me beat Pallone - Chip in $50" | "Help me beat Pallone - Chip in $100" | "Help me beat Pallone - Chip in $250" | | | Copyright © 2022 Rik Mehta, All rights reserved.

body:
Ed will join host Matt Gagnon this morning at 8:08 to discuss his remarkable achievement of getting on the ballot in 40 days. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/79c70c006738/a-strong-finish-to-8850190?e=f8a0a76a2b)

---
| |
> | | | Tune in to WGAN Radio, 560 AM and streaming at [WGAN.com](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=c17815a261&e=f8a0a76a2b), to hear Ed talk about the huge volunteer effort that successfully put him on the ballot for the race for Maine's 1st Congressional District.
>
> As things currently stand, Ed is the ONLY candidate on the ballot, and, as usual, his opponent is nowhere to be seen.
>
> Ed will speak with host Matt Gagnon to discuss the effort, and the issues that the voters of Maine express concern about as he travels the district. |
> * * *
> * * *
> **_"Matt is a man of his word. He recently said on the air that if a candidate wants to be on his show, he has to first get on the ballot. Well, sure enough, within minutes of my announcing that I was on the ballot, Matt invited me on the show. I look forward to our discussion!" -Ed_**

subject: From CHAZ to Crack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress
body:
Democrats are destroying a once great American city with failed policies....................... _We’ve gone from CHAZ to Crack._**_[So what will it take to get our country back?...](http://links.jessejensen4congress.com/u/click?_t=786fb8edbf8a46a08085e4b6fadd3f18&_m=1e0aaa7b7b444ba080d3947cd3572d06&_e=iMdwsQ1gVyZRE5qa-DO3i1GyK04xNY9BfY9LVh-ZHeQyl49a-9q_Cb3mXpnKzzBDWfuaTbFteJgv9Kqw4K-qfTJZlcxl-LyX3LqYUhzE-fYSB9Z_1PX91QJVA6L7TK0w4r_K_E6Wh2DLXFdSLKBuR66gjE_gecsvcKgTWxuypuioE_x_6tzDW42XAgA6tDMYGKU2Kz4wo8Y5Y-YQ6GA92vuI98ay5_qtHADYTBuogV0iIRHSDtB9cZ2IcsnWeE6A5mYSUIvjGG7f-JQNQUSnm_lgSJ99w9FxfFkGoSSy3HRsQCH5GsWQhit9KAinW2iMCMsSO2aMVGe3usLHOuXel3tssSkTwbtjuCBVRjn_YMCCfzLF1vMlZqpQpWxNL4qCONSSWVozMFgF8JYV9UqjJsYLS8mqpKgxmfuS7jwdGrtxkCL7rKyuyl-CEA8_yO9j) _** Peter, I’m sure you’ve seen Joe Biden’s plan to distribute crack pipes by now. Still, I need to take a moment to address the consequences it would have on our community and others like it across the country. | | | February 17, 2022 Hi Friends,

Whether in Congress or the Washington State Legislature, it's become very clear that We The People need to have solidly conservative elected officials representing us -- not weak-kneed Republicans who vote with their radicalized Democrat counterparts to pass bad bills.

Primary election campaigs are meant to vet candidates. During this phase of the campaign, voters get to ask important questions about a candidate's history of community sevice and conservative activism.

This issue of our campaign newsletter includes two new ads that should raise alarm bells about whether one of my opponents really is who he says he is. The voters of SW Washington need all the information they can get before the August Primary.

With true conservatives in leadership positions in Olympia and in Washington, D.C., our state's best days are ahead of us.

Please help me keep the momentum going by **[_donating today_](https://heidistjohnforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46e715d1574a19c15defda548&id=5c3dcfc9c7&e=b0bcc6b4f9)**.

For Freedom,

|

| _**Heidi St. John**_
_Candidate for Congress, SW Washington_
Standing Up For What We Believe

Biden's $3000 per child tax credit helped cause the worst worker shortage ever by paying people not to work. Republicans in Congress wanted the checks stopped, but Joe Kent argued Biden’s tax credit should be raised to $10,000 per child, per year!

name: Trump News HQ
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo75u0jde0dbvoh6jqmnmnuf184h8g578dpb20a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o32c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65stgegpm3chlm8rjeohheiob4dphepq78o5ks8on6tlk63jjfcb0s6q36sjimhgefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3aphgmsqj2ptmc9j3co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2n7bla5m1k5i56p2ljllna5hti02k6iandm6rvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o32c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2mb5irghs4dki1k2hh62g68202sm0j6dhtv5oi0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o32c3h2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoin12rnqolr74ka79vnrof9480mn4c9bo7q8ih0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o32c3h2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgkcge5k3l1id7hngjg5c88jftpj3dnf7484id20_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o32c3h2bs)**
---

body:

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
---
Hillsdale College was founded in 1844 with a mission to provide “all who wish to learn” the education necessary to preserve the civil and religious liberties of America. They understood, like the founders of our great nation, that free government requires independent, virtuous, and knowledgeable citizens.
In 2011 Hillsdale launched its online courses program to extend this mission and to teach the core subjects of a Hillsdale education free of charge. Since that time, more than 2.8 million Americans have partnered with us in this effort.
Today, we’d like to invite you to study our nation’s founding documents—the documents that secure liberty for you and all Americans—absolutely free of charge.
Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen ‘09
Director of Online Learning, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Jessica, Heritage Action
subject: ALERT: the truth about CRT in schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Fellow Conservative, the radical Left doesn’t think our schools should be places of learning - they want full-blown Leftist in
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgd8qc0hujc52gu1p57g2vvarudpqehr34qe3jc0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpm7c72mjh33dtj6pgjcolh69qmcorkcmp3ectgcgqb9d1me1jb8pb4s1gj8djn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libbc77mth6cd32mdg6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5im8o72c1j60oh5u)
| |
---
**ALERT: Heritage Action is taking on the radical school boards and educators to end critical race theory and help our kids get the education they deserve!**
[**CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR SCHOOLS >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zckk2pue9npp2764rb6ti43mfhuklubitjd5hjno_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o36c1h2bs)
|
---
|
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq6raenf360n061eej9av0gnk0vrnavm07csheb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o36c1h2bs)
|
---
Fellow Conservative, the radical Left doesn’t think our schools should be places of learning - they want full-blown Leftist indoctrination centers.

That means biased educators, school boards who disregard the input of parents, and dangerous philosophies like Critical Race Theory.

After Heritage Action exposed CRT in Georgia's largest school district, the district denied critical race theory was being taught and removed the incriminating syllabus from their website. _The Left is determined to continue hiding the truth from parents. __[**FIGHT BACK >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrui0upf3q9h05bf8mb4d3gv34r1er3covk1likg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o36c1h2bs)_

Recently, Heritage Action uncovered a case out of Gwinnett County, Georgia, where the class syllabus plainly stated that students would be taught to use critical race theory as a lens to analyze other issues.

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvqdq9m24rhn4s6ckadohghgohdthqibh2a0q4j8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o36c1h2bs)

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg0stfo4hic3s0c4koq273h8j4h6mgng93va1ilg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o36c1h2bs)

**Here’s the exact quote, from the class syllabus:**

_Students will bridge the skills from AP Language to AP Research, analyzing the value of using different lenses in social criticism (Critical Race Theory, Feminist, Marxist, Psychoanalytic) to aid their analysis across issues, and the class will discuss how these perspectives apply to the different methods used by research fields._

**How do you DENY teaching critical race theory when your syllabus includes that very phrase?**

Just a few days after the syllabus was discovered by Heritage Action’s research team, Gwinnett County Public Schools erased the PDF from their website. But not before we downloaded and saved a copy.

They knew they slipped up, and we were here to expose them. _And we’re just getting started._

We’re on a mission to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS and we need YOUR help to do it.
[**CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR SCHOOLS >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvsll9ug439fq94qvgi01cgk5aegkcl5soav87fo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o36c1h2bs)
Fellow Conservative, here’s what we’re doing.

We are standing up for our vulnerable children AGAINST CRITICAL RACE THEORY.
* We’re promoting an education environment that encourages free thought - not political compliance.
* We’re standing with parents who have been intimidated, silenced, or called terrorists for simply expressing concern.
* And we’re activating our grassroots army to support state legislation to protect students and remove critical race theory from classrooms. Because NO child should be taught that they are inherently bad or guilty because of the color of their skin.

As parents, family members, and concerned members of the community, we need to make sure our kids aren’t being force-fed this hateful doctrine.

To support parents, activists, and conservative lawmakers, we launched **SaveOurSchools.com –** a one-stop shop with information, resources, and legislation to get CRT out of our classrooms.

But to support all these efforts, we need conservatives like you on board to share the message. That’s why we’re asking you to join the fight and sign up to SAVE OUR SCHOOLS.

With your support, we’ll push for State Legislatures to make changes and kick CRT out of our schools! Because children should go to school and be free to think and free to learn!

**All you have to do is chip in here:_[https://heritageaction.com/action-save-our-schools/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdkvbkkgqgnpufltv8q7l4l0af78notpgq5jalro_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o36c1h2bs)_**

We’re already hard at work - as you read this, we’re out making progress!

In Georgia: we have backed bills like HB 888, HB 1084, and SB 377 which address this issue and make it illegal to force children to affirm and believe in the teachings of critical race theory.

In Arizona: Heritage Action representatives have briefed the state legislature encouraging the introduction of similar legislation.

And there’s more to come.

Our goals are clear — we believe all kids deserve a fair learning environment that teaches them to see one another as equals. _It’s not that difficult!_

If you can chip in now, you will be funding the grassroots armies working on the ground to ensure that America’s children have access to the education they deserve.

We hope to have you on our side.
[**CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR SCHOOLS >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrqbtj7p1aosaddejrdb7gt1pgir9md4btcq1qv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o36c1h2bs)
Thank you,

Jessica Anderson
Executive Director
Heritage Action for America
---
---
Heritage Action for America is a 501(c)4 non-profit organization. Donations are not tax deductible. [State Registration Disclosures.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgf67tijogr2sr3lde1gm9uon5kv86sea6cuuq1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chge4o36c1h2bs)

By participating, you agree to the terms & privacy policy (51776-info.com) for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Heritage Action to the phone number you provide. No consent required to buy. Msg&data rates may apply.

When selecting a recurring donation, Heritage Action for America will process this donation every month on the day of the month that you set up the recurring gift in the amount that you specify using the method of payment that you identified. You can cancel or change this donation at any time by contacting us at 1-(202) 548-5280. This authorization shall remain in effect until you notify Heritage Action for America and Heritage Action has had reasonable time to act on it. A record of each debit will appear on your bank statement. You have the right to instruct your bank to reverse any and all debits.

President Trump just declared the election we're about to face may be the most important one in AMERICAN HISTORY.
**I hope you were listening. I certainly was.**
Trump talked about the Radical Left's dangerous effort to ruin our economy and country. He talked about the unprecedented surge of illegal immigration. **My fellow Pro-Trump Conservatives were just DOWNGRADED in the latest Fox News polling. The battle for control of our country is now STATISTICALLY TIED!**

body:

It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zo09f1d18h65gj2he2skhgahi29e11ih1e1315bg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chgeaor4c5h2bs)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **

They’ve been exposed.

Investigate you for “extremist activity”

Freeze your assets

!

To keep the government’s nose out of your business click here and get your Free copy before the rest are gone.

body:
Friendly reminder for TEAM GILBERT'S weekly meeting on Thursday !! [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjlsul-iduiyhurdd-r/)
# Volunteer Meeting Reminder
# Volunteers Needed
### **We Need Your Help!**
We are gearing up for the ride of a lifetime and we are going to need all hands on deck. We are currently looking for volunteers to assist us in several areas for the Gilbert for Governor campaign; like knocking on doors, making phone calls, hosting a fundraiser, assisting with digital and online marketing, and scheduling. What's good about this, is you CAN WORK FROM HOME! Just give us a few hours of your time. As you may or may not know Deirdre Gilbert has decided to run as an Independent Candidate. As an independent, she must acquire signatures to get on the ballot in November. We are going to need about 200 Volunteers to assist us with this endeavor. If you want to help us with this, please send an email to info@gilbert4gov.com. We are very excited about those that have already joined us, but we are in need of so much more so that we can WIN this race. Every Thursday we will have online training and/or meetings to discuss the strategies that is needed to run this race and WIN it. Here is the link to join us every Thursday at 7PM (CST). Bring some friends along! Thank you so much for your support!https://us02web.zoom.us/j/82872448465?pwd=czVCUU82bTlxLy8wZjlPMlZuUERLUT09Meeting ID: 828 7244 8465 Passcode: 307107 [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjlsul-iduiyhurdd-y/)

[SIGN UP TODAY!](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjlsul-iduiyhurdd-j/)

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Did you see what Tucker said?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59594592:6tlJktENo:m:1:3298722022:816C26A58D7E5AD910C451B8A6C3C9A4:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they're white they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It 's state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59594592:6tlJktENo:m:1:3298722022:816C26A58D7E5AD910C451B8A6C3C9A4:r)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won't survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. **[But there 's something you can do.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59594592:6tlJktENo:m:1:3298722022:816C26A58D7E5AD910C451B8A6C3C9A4:r)** That's why I'm writing to you today. Because our fate isn't sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I've made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won't and take back our schools. **I 'm going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don't stand a chance without you. **[Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59594592:6tlJktENo:m:1:3298722022:816C26A58D7E5AD910C451B8A6C3C9A4:r)** And make no mistake -- this isn't just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It's happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don't take action, we'll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Ryan J. Girdusky [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59594592:6tlJktENo:m:1:3298722022:816C26A58D7E5AD910C451B8A6C3C9A4:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59594592:6tlJktENo:m:1:3298722022:816C26A58D7E5AD910C451B8A6C3C9A4:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59594592:6tlJktENo:m:1:3298722022:816C26A58D7E5AD910C451B8A6C3C9A4:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59594592:6tlJktENo:m:1:3298722022:816C26A58D7E5AD910C451B8A6C3C9A4:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
It’s worse than I thought. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6703%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=keK6dzwmMyYhkzHTV5rqkA&sysid=1)
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69045%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3SpbxCVa8jcO6vWNXlfAdg&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022\.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **

clean_body: It’s worse than I thought. It’s worse than I thought. | Friend, It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022\. I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself. I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars. I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP. WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. | | | | | | Thank you for your help. Thank you for your encouragement. Thank you for having my back. God Bless you and your generosity, Senator John Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. subject: an urgent, personal request
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
We have a real chance to win here in Florida. |
---

| | Hi there, it's Charlie Crist, reaching out personally to ask for your help. My team has been going over the numbers today, and they've got some bad news: We're falling short of where we need to be to meet our fundraising goals for February. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41937087/330969543/-913773116?refcode=20220218_f_1_ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDEzYWIzZS1jMDkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFvF3uaId8ikmmzFoXpxLXA2BuGrjWs7vN3G24egO5g=)

We have a real chance to win here in Florida — recent polls have me neck and neck with Governor DeSantis. But that's exactly why Republicans are already attacking me, and it's urgent that we reach our goals in order to fight back.

**Your support will be critical to getting us back on track, so I'm asking:[Will you pitch in anything you can right now to help me defeat Governor DeSantis and build a Florida for _all_ Floridians?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41937089/330969545/-913773116?refcode=20220218_f_1_ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDEzYWIzZS1jMDkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFvF3uaId8ikmmzFoXpxLXA2BuGrjWs7vN3G24egO5g=)**

Thanks and God bless,

Charlie Crist

name: McGrath, D. M.
subject: I rely on your support, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi Peter,

Our campaign is working to reach a big goal before midnight tonight. That is why Kayla, our campaign manager, asked me to reach out again.

She let me know we are 39 donations short of our goal for this week. If we’re going to stay on track this month, I need you to chip in $42 before midnight.

body:
Republicans are desperately asking for your support!
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3iydz--fgxr-4qqlpo8&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | **First:** You let your House Republican membership expire and broke your multi-year streak of reliable support.

**Then:** Mark from our team extended your deadline and gave you a second chance but you IGNORED his offers.

**Now:** You are letting down your fellow Republicans just before the crucial midterm elections and will be marked as a DEMOCRAT.

_**What more will it take?**_ Republicans are desperately asking for your support!

**[Click here to renew your 2022 membership and help Republicans win back the House majority.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3iydz-1yz4f-4qqlpo0/ "Click here to renew your 2022 membership and help Republicans win back the House majority.")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3iydz-1yz4g-4qqlpo1/ "YOU ARE LAPSED - LAST CHANCE TO RENEW")
---

This is your last chance to renew your membership. It will be tough for Republicans to stop the Democrats without your help, but we will have to fight on without you.

Don’t let the Democrats hold onto power and keep driving America down the road to socialism. **[Take this chance to help steer our country in the right direction by renewing your House membership today.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3iydz-1yz4h-4qqlpo2/ "Take this chance to help steer our country in the right direction by renewing your House membership today.")**

Thank you,

2022 Membership Services

**PS -** You will be considered a Democrat in our records if you allow your membership to remain lapsed. **[Renew immediately to improve your status.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3iydz-1yz4i-4qqlpo3/ "Renew immediately to improve your status.")**
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3iydz-1yz4j-4qqlpo4/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3iydz-1yz4k-4qqlpo5/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Val Demings
subject: I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41939205/330979026/-74008005?refcode=20220218_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWRhNjc1NC1jMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuzsklH5N3BT2PygEH7iptXIMpq4pQQZX_idYmNshEE=) Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: **I cannot win this without you.** [**That's why I'm asking you to become one of the donors to my campaign for Senate by splitting a contribution between me and Serve America right now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41939206/330979027/-74008005?refcode=20220218_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWRhNjc1NC1jMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuzsklH5N3BT2PygEH7iptXIMpq4pQQZX_idYmNshEE=) Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. **So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.** The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. [**I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race. Will you split a contribution of $20 or more to Serve America and me to defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41939208/330979028/-74008005?refcode=20220218_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWRhNjc1NC1jMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuzsklH5N3BT2PygEH7iptXIMpq4pQQZX_idYmNshEE=) In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: **6,112 donations, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend?** [**Split a contribution between Serve America and me of $20 or more right now – whatever you can spare to fuel our battleground Senate race – so we can defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41939209/330979030/-74008005?refcode=20220218_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWRhNjc1NC1jMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuzsklH5N3BT2PygEH7iptXIMpq4pQQZX_idYmNshEE=) From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41939210/330979031/272679854?refcode=20220218_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWRhNjc1NC1jMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuzsklH5N3BT2PygEH7iptXIMpq4pQQZX_idYmNshEE=) body:
GOP lies aimed at ending my historic campaign
| | |
---
Friend, I need you to hear this, because what you do next could change everything:

National Republicans just announced they are preparing a MASSIVE attack ad campaign against me. And when Floridians turn on their TVs, they'll be blanketed by GOP lies aimed at ending my historic campaign. Right now, I cannot defend myself without your immediate help, friend.
[**I just set an emergency goal to raise $25,000 before midnight to counter the GOP’s desperate attacks. Please, rush $5 right now to help me fight back. >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41939390/330979677/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2459-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmFkYjhjMi1jMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sseajtUrN0rjnnSiOPZ5Qg-yqsJ0gO-f_UfuWPVauKo=)
The National Republican Senatorial Committee raised a record-breaking **$104.8 MILLION** in 2021. The RNC chair has already attacked me personally, and my team just heard that they're gearing up to run attack ads to defeat me.
Republicans are worried that Marco Rubio is only _2 points_ ahead of me and that election veterans like James Carville think I can win. The GOP knows this race could determine the Senate majority – **so they'll spend as much money as it takes to buy this seat.**
**If I don't raise $25,000 before midnight, I won't have the resources to defend myself from Mitch McConnell's committee's desperate attacks. That means I'll fall behind in this close race, and McConnell could regain complete Senate control.**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm7l9g4bait6m1vg4slcf5skh4ombsaedos0fij8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chie4o71cdh2bs)

Friend,

My campaign team has begged me NOT to send you this email.

But as the anti-lockdown, anti-masking, and PRO Fire-Anthony-Fauci leader in the Senate, I figure I'm allowed to break the rules now and then.

So why doesn't my campaign team want me to send you this email?

Well, it's NOT about my re-election campaign. In fact, I am emailing you about someone else entirely.

My good friend Mike Gibbons is a hardcore constitutional conservative, self-made businessman, and an America-First patriot running for Senate in Ohio. And he has BREAKING NEWS.

**Mike Gibbons has surged into 1st place in the polls in the GOP primary! He is running against a Never-Trumper and needs our help to WIN this primary. I have endorsed Mike Gibbons and gave him my word I would help him raise $50,000 from online supporters. **

**Please send an URGENT donation to Mike Gibbons ' campaign:**

[_**Donate $20.22**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq6snbeo29fvviu3pjivm4giunpp0qm561a1894o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chie4o71cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqfmg153721ks0veasa8v3h9avl18356lm8u9h7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chie4o71cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4nh1rgvkkkvgremsgug9rga1c2e74a6snorc20g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chie4o71cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zao4a33ql5bg1957f3b5fmf54n5imqe7scr5ujj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chie4o71cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8et1dmff2e4bst54e52hmu2ukak10k9avbvd4mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chie4o71cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zups0j0p8shauad59s69csoqnp400s6lfgnsdmk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chie4o71cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjreabp6tpp3rlahtr2mp2sjovn7c31begjbj7s8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chie4o71cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziadg1l076qiod87jcm5vmuoq5gbpkqie70edve0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chie4o71cdh2bs)

Mike Gibbons is a hardcore believer in the ideas of liberty and will serve as my TOP ally in the U.S. Senate once he is elected. Here is where Mike stands on the issues:

* He will work with me to FIRE Anthony Fauci
* Mike agrees we must embrace an America-First foreign policy and bring the troops home
* Mike believes we must put an END to all mask mandates, lockdowns, and COVID madness. It's time to get rid of masks on planes!
* He will work with me to STOP Biden from bankrupting our country.
* Mike is 100% pro-life & pro-Second Amendment.

I do not give out my endorsement to just any candidate.

Dozens of campaigns reach out to me each week, asking for my endorsement.

I only ever endorse candidates who share my values, are willing to FIGHT, and serve as champions for the Constitution. We do not need any more cowards or establishment politicians in Washington D.C.

[_**Please support Mike Gibbons by donating $20.22, $50, $100, $250, or any amount by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zptcienqirtmmcno1mu9dcrhab42vlu4555hqfi0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chie4o71cdh2bs)

I have made it my mission to help elect Mike Gibbons to the U.S. Senate in 2022.

Do you want to know one of the most disappointing things that happened to me after first being elected to the Senate in 2010?

I entered the Senate ready to do war with the Establishment, slash wasteful spending, and honor my oath to the Constitution. I wanted to make our Founding Fathers proud.

But guess what? _I was alone. _

There are very few hardcore constitutional conservatives in Congress and the Senate. I quickly found that I would need allies to enact powerful change.

**Mike Gibbons entering the U.S. Senate will be Joe Biden 's worst nightmare.**

Biden can kiss his socialist agenda good-bye once Mike Gibbons becomes my top ally in the U.S. Senate. _And Anthony Fauci? He better start updating his resume and applying for new jobs now because Mike and I will make it our mission to TERMINATE his job. _

I told Mike I would help him raise $50,000 before the end of the month.

Can I count on your help?

I am reaching out to you because I know you're one of my supporters. Please consider this an urgent AND personal request.

[**Please click here to donate.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo189pr1kf4rk6ga5atbd18pm967fl15vj4afp18_rp22sh2s8i66ob5chie4o71cdh2bs)

Thank you for everything,

Senator Rand Paul

body:
| |
---
| | |
It's Dan Crenshaw. I'm reaching out to let you know that your current 2022 Membership status is listed as _EXPIRED_.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59591760:J-_EmtEN8:m:1:3253819041:8C55994FF913A2DC46DE2547D1A0BE61:r "RENEW NOW")
---

Let me tell you why renewing your 2022 Membership is so important:
1. Beating Nancy Pelosi's House Democrats is going to be impossible without YOU on our side.
2. This is the most important election of our lifetimes - it will truly decide whether or not America chooses the failed socialism of the Left or the freedom and prosperity of conservatism.
3. Your 2022 Membership is _essential_ to showing Pelosi that our grassroots donors are more powerful than her evil dark money cronies.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59591760:J-_EmtEN8:m:1:3253819041:8C55994FF913A2DC46DE2547D1A0BE61:r)
---

Because we have yet to hear from you, your membership lapsed.**But I have good news: we have extended our deadline until midnight on February 18th.**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59591760:J-_EmtEN8:m:1:3253819041:8C55994FF913A2DC46DE2547D1A0BE61:r "RENEW NOW")
---

I can only extend this offer to you for a limited time - but it's critical you renew your 2022 Membership before the deadline. If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball.

**[Please, I'm humbly asking: renew today >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59591760:J-_EmtEN8:m:1:3253819041:8C55994FF913A2DC46DE2547D1A0BE61:r "Please,
Peter. I'm humbly asking: renew today >>>")**

Sincerely,

Dan Crenshaw

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59591760:J-_EmtEN8:m:1:3253819041:8C55994FF913A2DC46DE2547D1A0BE61:r "RENEW NOW")
---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59591761:J-_EmtEN8:m:1:3253819041:8C55994FF913A2DC46DE2547D1A0BE61:r "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59591761:J-_EmtEN8:m:1:3253819041:8C55994FF913A2DC46DE2547D1A0BE61:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Hillsdale College via CI.com
subject: Free government requires informed citizens
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWz2zePHNe

Hillsdale College was founded in 1844 with a mission to provide
"all who wish to learn" the education necessary to preserve the
civil and religious...
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWz2zePHNe

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

Hillsdale
College was founded in 1844 with a mission to provide "all who
wish to learn" the education necessary to preserve the civil and
religious liberties of America. They understood, like the
founders of our great nation, that free government requires
independent, virtuous, and knowledgeable citizens.

In 2011
Hillsdale launched its online courses program to extend this
mission and to teach the core subjects of a Hillsdale education
free of charge. Since that time, more than 2.8 million Americans
have partnered with us in this effort.

Today,
we'd like to invite you to study our nation's founding
documents-the documents that secure liberty for you and all
Americans-absolutely free of charge.

Warm
Regards,

Kyle
Murnen '09
Director
of Online Learning, Hillsdale College

Pursuing
Truth-Defending Liberty since 1844

Study the
Constitution with Hillsdale

Featured
Courses

Introduction to the Constitution

Grasp the
challenges posed by Progressivism to the U.S. Constitution in
"Introduction to the Constitution."

Sign Up
For Free

Constitution 101

Learn the
history and meaning of our Constitution in our most popular
offering, "Constitution 101."

Sign Up
For Free

Constitution 201

Study the
importance and principles of the American Founding and the
current assault on them by the Progressives in "Constitution
201."

Sign Up
For Free

The
Federalist Papers

Explore
the major themes of "The Federalist Papers," such as the problem
of majority faction, separation of powers, and the three branches
of government.

Sign Up
For Free

Have you
already mastered these subjects? Explore Hillsdale's full
catalogue of more than 30 free online courses covering
literature, history, theology, and much more!

Explore
More Hillsdale Courses

Hillsdale College
Contact
Us

name: North Carolina Polling (via Team Cooper)
subject: Unlawful legislative maps → unlawful right-wing policy proposals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
The NC GOP’s ultra-partisan, gerrymandered legislative maps have twice been thrown out by the courts. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41947992/331009110/823540626?refcode=ea.94ff1177-cc90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.94ff1177-cc90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGZmMTE3Ny1jYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7aPJ-gRAyeoQmMxlB7HcXNXLfUTuFHiWNTTlckPu6TU=&emci=974e5250-2f90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=94ff1177-cc90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Peter, For years, North Carolina Republicans have made it clear that the most important thing to them is holding onto power by any means necessary so they can pass their radically conservative agenda. _“By any means necessary” includes gerrymandering our legislative districts so that some voters have more power than others — and so that Democrats don’t have a chance._ Earlier this week, the NC Supreme Court heard arguments about a far-right anti-voter amendment proposed by Republicans in Raleigh. **Because of their partisan gerrymandering of legislative maps a decade ago (maps that eventually got _thrown out_ because they were so partisan and unfair), Republicans had _unlawful_ power to propose those amendments.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41947994/331009113/2105705218?refcode=ea.94ff1177-cc90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.94ff1177-cc90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGZmMTE3Ny1jYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7aPJ-gRAyeoQmMxlB7HcXNXLfUTuFHiWNTTlckPu6TU=&emci=974e5250-2f90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=94ff1177-cc90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176) Roy has made it clear where he stands on that issue: Lawmakers seated under unconstitutionally gerrymandered maps should have no standing to alter our constitution. That’s why he is advocating for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission to draw future legislative maps and ensure every North Carolinian’s voice is heard in elections to come. | [I SUPPORT A NONPARTISAN COMMISSION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41947995/331009114/2105705218?refcode=ea.94ff1177-cc90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.94ff1177-cc90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGZmMTE3Ny1jYzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7aPJ-gRAyeoQmMxlB7HcXNXLfUTuFHiWNTTlckPu6TU=&emci=974e5250-2f90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=94ff1177-cc90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)

name: Steven Olikara
subject: Making Your Voice Heard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with photo of Steven Olikara and link to campaign website:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/OfS%20logo%20w%20headshot.png]
[https://www.stevenolikara.com]

Dear Peter,

Like many of you, I took time this past Tuesday to cast my vote in Wisconsin’s spring primary election. Voting is an essential component of our democracy — it’s how we make our voices heard. But there remain big challenges in our election system that we must address for voters to have a real choice in leadership. Please consider making a donation today to demonstrate the strength of our movement for a more inclusive, honest, and effective kind of politics. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0218email]

Photo of Steven Olikara heading home from the polls on Feb. 15 with link to campaign donation page:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0218email]

Voters deserve a real choice in who represents them. That’s why the first piece of legislation I’ll introduce in the U.S. Senate will change the business model of politics and make government more responsive to Wisconsinites. While campaign finance reform is a key component of this plan, we must also ensure everyone has equal and safe access to the ballot by protecting and expanding voting rights.

This may sound idealistic, but we’ve already been doing it. My organization, the Millennial Action Project, helped lead Vote Safe Wisconsin, the only successful bipartisan effort nationwide to expand access to the ballot during the earliest moments of the pandemic in 2020. We can build on the success we had in Wisconsin and beyond to achieve stronger protections and access to voting nationwide.
I need your help to win this election. Please donate now to give our campaign the resources we need to get our message out to more voters and build on the momentum we’ve established. Your donation of any amount is greatly appreciated. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0218email]

Many thanks for your support!
Steven

This is a movement to build a more inclusive, honest, and kind form of politics, and we need your help to continue reaching more voters in Wisconsin.
Button that says, "DONATE NOW" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0218email]

Facebook logo with link to Steven Olikara's Facebook profile: [https://www.facebook.com/olikaraforsenate]
Twitter logo with link to Steven Olikara's Twitter profile: [https://twitter.com/stevenolikara]
Instagram logo with link to Steven Olikara's Instagram profile: [https://www.instagram.com/stevenolikara/]
TikTok logo with link to Steven Olikara's TikTok profile: [https://www.tiktok.com/@stevenolikara]

Paid for by Olikara for Senate
P.O. Box 510216
Milwaukee, WI 53203
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8fcc903e-3c90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/7f99d383-ce90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDgwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Zjk5ZDM4My1jZTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmehlNxpOqUL2sD_u8f97bt1A1Hge89JrBkRPIKvo1E=&id=130029555 .

name: Wes Moore
subject: Guns without serial numbers are contributing to the gun violence epidemic
body:
One commonsense step we can take to get dangerous weapons off our streets and save lives is to ban ghost guns. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41950322/331013752/-1531988014?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220218ghostguns_wm_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTUwOWFjNi1jZTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYDOrHT5q4qDuZARR_FlM4eS0tHjYWhzdZkZOwQA6ug=)
---
Friend, For too long, gun violence has plagued communities across our state and country. In 2021, Maryland’s most populous city of Baltimore — where my wife and I are raising our children — surpassed 300 homicides per year for the seventh year in a row, continuing a devastating trend. **One commonsense step we can take to get dangerous weapons off our streets and save lives is to ban ghost guns — firearms lacking serial numbers — that people build from various parts or kits at home.** Ghost guns are untraceable due to their lack of serial numbers, and their homemade nature makes them all the more susceptible to land in the wrong hands. **[Banning ghost guns is one step in the right direction to get gun violence under control here in Maryland, and a bill has been introduced to do just that. Will you join me in supporting the passage of this bill to ban ghost guns ASAP?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41950323/331013767/-1951164083?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220218ghostguns_wm_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTUwOWFjNi1jZTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYDOrHT5q4qDuZARR_FlM4eS0tHjYWhzdZkZOwQA6ug=&emci=4e509ac6-ce90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=51509ac6-ce90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41950324/331013780/-1951164083?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220218ghostguns_wm_30da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTUwOWFjNi1jZTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYDOrHT5q4qDuZARR_FlM4eS0tHjYWhzdZkZOwQA6ug=&emci=4e509ac6-ce90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=51509ac6-ce90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)
---
Thanks for using your voice to call for action on this deadly issue.
— Wes

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.

clean_body: One commonsense step we can take to get dangerous weapons off our streets and save lives is to ban ghost guns. | = Friend, For too long, gun violence has plagued communities across our state and country. In 2021, Maryland’s most populous city of Baltimore — where my wife and I are raising our children — surpassed 300 homicides per year for the seventh year in a row, continuing a devastating trend. One commonsense step we can take to get dangerous weapons off our streets and save lives is to ban ghost guns — firearms lacking serial numbers — that people build from various parts or kits at home. Ghost guns are untraceable due to their lack of serial numbers, and their homemade nature makes them all the more susceptible to land in the wrong hands. | Thanks for using your voice to call for action on this deadly issue. — Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings Smith, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Rushern Baker & Nancy Navarro
subject: Momentum
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
Qualifying for Maryland’s public campaign finance program was a big deal. It unlocked close to a million dollars in matching funds and made a HUGE statement that the Baker/Navarro ticket has the support of the PEOPLE – not corporations and PACs.
One of the biggest challenges of grassroots funding is keeping the momentum going – our fundraising numbers have waned since crossing the qualifying milestone and it’s critical they pick back up. So Nancy and I are asking directly, can you make a $5, $10, or $20 dollar donation today? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
We know from all the doors we’ve knocked on and the support we’ve already received that if this election were held today, we’d have a real shot at winning. We also know that the other folks in this race have accepted HUGE checks and are going to continue to pour corporate dollars into advertising and mobilizing.
Simply put, if we’re going to compete we need to be consistently raising more money. Can you pitch in today, and help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
Rushern & Nancy
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
**P.S. because of Maryland’s Public Finance program, your donation will be eligible for a matching program explained here [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

name: Pat Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: Another PA insurrectionist called to task…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Another PA insurrectionist has been called to task. State Sen. Doug Mastriano was issued a subpoena in the Jan. 6 investigation.

Doug "Insurrectionist" Mastriano was in regular communication with Trump throughout that time. He tried to use his position in the legislature to try to reverse the fair election results in his treasonous pal’s favor. He attempted to let PA legislators pick electors and decertify the fair election. He ALSO actively participated in the siege of the U.S. Capitol on January 6!

Mastriano is now running for PA governor — can you imagine what would happen if he wins? This is a man who wants to sow doubt in our democracy, who tried to overthrow our government! Any bill designed by the state legislature to take away our rights — abortion rights and voter rights — or that put our safety at risk — with weakened gun and public safety policies — will be signed into law at his desk.

I know a couple of days ago we asked you to take action against these insurrectionists in power, but today we’re asking for your support.

Please donate today so that we can mobilize and educate voters on their rights. This is so critically important and the time to give and make a real impact is NOW.

Thank you for standing with us and up for democracy!

Pat Clark

subject: EMERGENCY 5X MATCH ACTIVE: Stop the Total Trump Takeover!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
Trump just held another one of his rallies in Texas, and this time he made even more chilling threats.

|

| Dear Peter ,
---
| We have some exciting news from the campaign trail. On Monday night, the Pennsylvania State Police FOP Pioneer Lodge #37 unanimously voted to endorse Kathy Barnette for U.S. Senate.
The Pioneer Lodge #37 of the Fraternal Order of Police was organized on April 30, 1946. Lodge #37 has the distinction of being the first organized lodge representative of members of the Pennsylvania State Police. Pioneer Lodge #37 represents members in southeastern Pennsylvania, including Delaware, Montgomery, and Philadelphia counties.
This is a HUGE show of support from our Pennsylvania state troopers, and we are honored to have their full endorsement.
---

| | | [JOIN IN SUPPORTING KATHY BARNETTE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001obyl15U0yI3dAdwE5DFAjfFaUbr5HhsKJGAfZcKdevH4nqn9wcalfjY6o8Z0rMaeg_zVd0HwapOOdkH5bq8l03Uc2NSPk-Qbr128mXLTWPRTYayLYdYlUWeene7u9mj9pOyr0NIXCCS89DM_qQIkNTfWotzj1i1hwHrRoBj8FdRGWHPbDsRuC3mXSxS5KrKzUz9ICOkFp7Y=&c=I5v8kurTQvYzO_co9Cr0C0uaM77i3gS9cMHiCgRDlqw7mzu7QKAQzA==&ch=9xc1kZsUIzM5ypg-rH9UdQjjjEs2-DD2pyntEEo0y49ghqr8sP1QVw==)
---
| Now, more than ever, first responders and police need the support of their communities. Radical Democrats across the country are doubling down on their calls to "defund the police."
In January 2022 alone, two dozen officers were shot in the line of duty. Many of them were targeted and ambushed just for wearing the uniform.
We must support our officers. We must end "soft-on-crime" policies that enable violent criminals. We must protect our communities - and our police are our first and only line of defense.
We hope you'll join Kathy in supporting these brave men and women.
---
