name: Team Latham
subject: I’m the only candidate who can defeat Warnock
body:
Herschel Walker is a gift to the far-left
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Fellow Patriot,
It's been another busy and productive week on the campaign trail! I've enjoyed talking to many of you (long standing supporters and new team members) about this race, our beloved state and country, and the great consequence of what we are doing to protect and save our nation.
Raphael Warnock and his far-left supporters don't want my campaign to succeed. In fact, they're actively cheering on one of the other Republicans in this race because it will guarantee Warnock's re-election. [Warnock's celebrity-funded campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atq5ysOJsjfcpRCVebisiOKgsSHG7g9uOpqqNFWfjmmT1Pm_waJPIZsIyDq9FlRArvEiwnnhS0DcNFdFsJKr3N_uFI17_Na0664QlpDH1h2hpPhDzG_yZos1x2CAjlGNsdsjmbDHXKAy3xZvzinJQnfoep38kuT4JGCmvbWCsyaElnggbMfheLfxftC3_n1LnNUG4v-fdBqCX4dviLWrASGUh9AvW0yORnfGb2IdfG9MbDXUL9FQnJCsJysdKkgGpAz2mOrTgY35RllNHHU8rA==&c=D7c_P4WFo_oy1VOnngVCT26_oSqhB1d5xyFLb3wMWn88hVMMHn3q1Q==&ch=ELvrPzpePrxWim6EKtlw8xoIIjXMh0JbcUVyGZUg4cIhgJeImcOKLQ==) is already cutting up the attack ads on my primary opponent with all of the baggage he brings to this race.
But the left doesn't know how to campaign against me. You'll hear a lot in this race and [you'll see ads about how other candidates used guns](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atq5ysOJsjfcpRCVebisiOKgsSHG7g9uOpqqNFWfjmmT1Pm_waJPIZsIyDq9FlRA40kpQTyGJ3eDZFeFCwL-IjCiR24ZL9kXMqVgYTyYC_rBK3Rrp2mO9o8eU-MOb7OfL9y0LwxFZPRapKxRsq3KIiRW_WOWpp_Nqvk5eOkNGJKl-ncYSjARD77zRAwxiTbKm8JVIhFVqApyM9t3NEMMj4dBfXcOxnE8EMphNLNqh_RhAOCjCAB13g==&c=D7c_P4WFo_oy1VOnngVCT26_oSqhB1d5xyFLb3wMWn88hVMMHn3q1Q==&ch=ELvrPzpePrxWim6EKtlw8xoIIjXMh0JbcUVyGZUg4cIhgJeImcOKLQ==), but when I did, I was defending our homeland as a Navy SEAL officer in Iraq and Afghanistan. That's what this primary election comes down to. Actions and experience.
---
|
---
| And it's not just experience, it's having the right experience to take back our country and renew American prosperity and strength. Raphael Warnock's experience is as a rubber stamp to Joe Biden's disastrous America Last agenda, where everyday hardworking Georgians are being strangled by inflation, out of control gas prices, and unconstitutional mandates that are forcing them out of work.
Where Warnock has the wrong experience, and my other opponent lacks experience, I'm able to draw on three critical areas from my service to our great country that prepare me to take on the leftist machine on day one in the United States Senate.

* Special Operations leader who executed America's foreign policy on the ground

* Director of Intelligence Programs on the National Security Council, advising President Trump on America's most critical missions

* White House Fellow, fighting to advance and implement the America First policy agenda

During this time, America defeated ISIS, cracked down on China, became energy independent, and lowered taxes for everyday Americans. Those aren't empty campaign promises. They're real actions, and I am proud to have been a part of the administration that accomplished them. Georgia deserves to have the America First Agenda back in Washington. And Georgia deserves a United States Senator who actually has the experience at the national level advancing these policies.

---
| I recently discussed the reasons why I'm the only candidate who can defeat Raphael Warnock on [The Wes Carroll Morning Show](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atq5ysOJsjfcpRCVebisiOKgsSHG7g9uOpqqNFWfjmmT1Pm_waJPIZsIyDq9FlRAhknJC4mc8t_fzPFuXZYw4nKis76hs3j2722qZHhavOX4Gk3sPsU32jF_occO4Le92u_-HERdVKrPH-Gsw2BJs7a0t1DCiNu5_iEUT-DeKgMhL2ckV-kAqstMlyduE50u&c=D7c_P4WFo_oy1VOnngVCT26_oSqhB1d5xyFLb3wMWn88hVMMHn3q1Q==&ch=ELvrPzpePrxWim6EKtlw8xoIIjXMh0JbcUVyGZUg4cIhgJeImcOKLQ==), and specifically how Raphael Warnock has failed our state and the importance of nominating an experienced leader to take him on and hold him accountable.
[Take a minute to watch a clip from that interview below](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atq5ysOJsjfcpRCVebisiOKgsSHG7g9uOpqqNFWfjmmT1Pm_waJPIZsIyDq9FlRABCapViO7KJSupVV5zxv1NnU4RT5HVZyph6ktat1DFV7NRnoJXFfFlmJTBhxwncjqsnPbJMegPefLKqd1sTxfXq4Awt-kLH9uzN_K-UJQtCi9HdD3_r9FAYTMFLbqmNG9tY42Ms2wZ3RFFXeCrb0uc8ryVoUN55ezPltT1j4q_-N6kEnHYuXbsA==&c=D7c_P4WFo_oy1VOnngVCT26_oSqhB1d5xyFLb3wMWn88hVMMHn3q1Q==&ch=ELvrPzpePrxWim6EKtlw8xoIIjXMh0JbcUVyGZUg4cIhgJeImcOKLQ==)

name: Jim DeMint
subject: America's Braveheart Moment
body:
Fellow Patriot:

The most important lesson Donald Trump taught conservatives was that we should play to win.
For decades, the Left was always the aggressor in America's policy battles - testing conservatives' resolve and pressing their advantages. Liberals were always on offense: pushing their economic socialism, their woke foolishness, and undermining America's sovereignty and rule
of law wherever they could. In a way, that's why Trump was so successful: he was a conservative who actually fought like a liberal.
Unfortunately, a year into Joe Biden's presidency, there are signs the lesson wasn't learned.
And that's why I hope you will help the Conservative Partnership expand its efforts to train, equip, and unite conservatives in the fight for America's future.
Some conservatives have stayed on offense - on Covid's origins, mask mandates, immigration, and Critical Race Theory. Grassroots activists, fearless conservative journalists, and a handful of lawmakers have kept the pressure on the Left like never before.
But the lazy, timid, corporate Beltway Establishment is already falling into its old habits. For instance, heading into 2022, senior Washington leaders recently announced their future policy goals:
▶︎ House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy laid out a stale, warmed-over checklist about business regulations and energy independence.
▶︎ Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell said he would not lay out a potential governing agenda at all. Nothing. Not even their traditional mumbling about tax cuts or military spending.
Did they learn nothing from Donald Trump's electoral and policy breakthroughs? Do they think conservatives took over the Supreme Court, started the border wall, raised working Americans' wages, and confronted global aggression by playing not to lose?
Washington elites are acting like the entitled noblemen in the movie Braveheart. Do you remember the scene? William Wallace, fresh from his victory at the Battle of Stirling, tells the Scottish lords that he intends to invade England rather than negotiate with King Edward
Longshanks. As usual, the nobles - who care only about themselves - scoff at the idea. Then Wallace, on his way out the door, speaks for his army, his country, and all who suffer under pathetic leaders:
"You think the people of this country exist to provide you with possession. I think your possession exists to provide those people with freedom. And I go to make sure that they have it."
Who will be America's Braveheart today?
Who will have the courage not just to hope the Left's incompetence and unpopularity yields fancier offices and a bit more power - but the opportunity to break the woke, socialist, racist, anti-American Left once and for all? Who will help advance the new American Movement and
the political revolution it demands?
We are not fighting for a party, or a candidate, or any "team" of entitled, interchangeable elites in Congress.
Like William Wallace, we are fighting for our country. For our children. For our God-given right to freedom.
CPI was founded to inspire that kind of fighting spirit and to support those who have it.
We are holding up our end and you are holding up yours. Together, we need to fight so our leaders hearts' grow brave, too.
Thank you for partnering with us and continuing to do so much to secure America's future.

For Freedom,

Jim DeMintCPI Chairman

 

CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 FaxCPI.org

SUPPORT CPI

Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

subject: Smelling Victory (and Bacon 🥓) in the Air

body:
I was up and at 'em early on Wednesday morning to attend... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indgop/smelling-victory-and-bacon-in-the-air?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Smelling Victory (and Bacon) in the Air_**
---
|
---
_**Chairman Kyle Hupfer** stands with recently-elected **Hamilton County Republican Party Chairman Mario Massillamany** and **Hamilton County Commissioners** **Christine Altman** and **Mark Heirbrandt** at the Hamilton County February breakfast on Wednesday. _
| I was up and at 'em early on Wednesday morning to attend the Hamilton County Republican Party's February Breakfast Club event at the Bridgewater Club in Westfield. Just elected as chairman two weeks ago, Chairman Mario Massillamany packed the room with a sold-out crowd! It's clear to me that Republicans are fired up and ready to get to work to win this November.

We all know what total Democratic control in Washington, D.C., has led to—we feel it in our pockets and we see it on our streets and televisions. Americans are ready for the madness to end, and Republicans will make sure that it does.

I can smell victory in the air!

Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend.

Best,

Chairman Kyle Hupfer

**P.S.** Today at 5 p.m. is the deadline to register for the 2022 Congress of Counties happening next week in French Lick, Ind. You won't want to miss it! You can register by clicking "Register Now" further down in this week's newsletter.
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| **_A Spirit of Community_**
---
|
---
_**Gov. Holcomb** gives remarks at the Leadership Prayer Breakfast._
| On Thursday morning, **Gov. Holcomb** , joined by many of our state's leaders,** ** spoke at the Indiana Leadership Prayer Breakfast at the Indiana Roof Ballroom in downtown Indianapolis. "Rebuilding a spirit of community is the long-term key to sustaining our success as a state." — _**Gov. Holcomb**_
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=80aeaebdb4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
_**Gov. Holcomb** released a video last Friday celebrating our Hoosier Olympians._
| Last Friday, **Gov. Holcomb** released a video celebrating Hoosier athletes competing at the 2022 Winter Olympics.

"With the Winter Olympics well underway, I couldn't be more thrilled to cheer on Hoosier athletes who are representing Indiana and Team USA," stated **Gov. Holcomb**.

So far, two Hoosier athletes have medaled: Justin Schoenfeld (**GOLD**) in the Mixed Team Aerials and Nick Goepper (**SILVER**) in the Freeski Slopestyle! This is Justin's first medal in the Olympics and Nick's third.

Justin is a native of Lawrenceburg and Nick is a native of Ft. Wayne.

_**Go Hoosiers and Team USA! **_
---
|
---
| **_The Science Coalition Names Sen. Todd Young Champion of Science_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8f10c0747e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
_Robert J. Bernhard of the University of Notre Dame congratulates Sen. Todd Young on being named The Science Coalition's 2022 Champion of Science._
| On Tuesday, The Science Coalition (TSC) announced the recipients of its [Champion of Science Award](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=afb2c48a49&e=1acd9bb3d6). The award honors members of Congress whose actions and votes consistently reflect their commitment to federally funded fundamental research.

“In Congress, these outstanding policymakers have gone above and beyond to elevate science and secure robust, predictable federal investment in fundamental research,” said TSC President Peter DeYoe. “Thanks to the exemplary support of these Champions of Science, the partnership between research universities and federal agencies is stronger, our economic outlook is brighter, and the next generation of scientific innovation is within reach. I offer my thanks and congratulations, and I welcome each of them to the distinguished list of Champions of Science.”

You can read the full news release [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6efccc03ab&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| **_Bad News, Mr. President_**
---
|
---
| It's a new low for Joe Biden in the latest Civiqs poll: Only 27% of Hoosiers approve of the job he's doing.

That's down from just 38% on the day of his inauguration.

You can see the poll [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3443b6c54e&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| _**2022 Congress of Counites**_
---
|
---
| Registration for the Indiana Republican Party's 2022 Congress of Counties ends _**TODAY at 5 p.m.!**_

This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates, and grassroots activists is scheduled for Friday, February 25 through Saturday, February 26, 2022, at the historic [French Lick Resort](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=954d8a306a&e=1acd9bb3d6) in French Lick, Ind.

**Thankfully** , general admission for the event was **not** impacted by **Bidenflation** and remains at [$100 per person](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=920b1e4a99&e=1acd9bb3d6).** **

You'll want to experience the 2022 Congress of Counties to kick off the election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics to help you and your county party **win** and keep Indiana on the **right** track. _**> >REMINDER: Registration ends TODAY at 5 p.m. <<**_

name: Bobby Maggio, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: This is long, but really important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This memo is long, but important.
Derek, we don’t do this often, but I’m really excited to share our 2022 Strategy Memo with you
This memo is long, but _really_ important. I hope you take the time to read it.
The stakes for this election — not just for PA, but for our democracy — are just too high not to keep yinz looped into our strategy. **If you’re the least bit nebby about our campaign plans for the months ahead, you’ll want to read this.**
[**_Will you please read our campaign memo, then consider making a contribution of any amount to help ensure we win our primary in just three months?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44278?refcode=em20220218-4631&t=24&akid=4631%2E434096%2EYSV6r5)
Every County, Every Vote. There’s just no other way to win PA.
— Bobby Maggio
Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
TO: Interested Parties
FROM: Bobby Maggio, Campaign Manager
MEMO: Strategy for 2022 In Pennsylvania, Democrats cannot afford to run the same old playbook. We have learned from watching the 2021 election in Virginia, as well as what we’ve heard on the ground, that Democrats cannot rely on just Philadelphia and Pittsburgh to win this race. Fortunately, in what will be the most important Senate race in the country this year, we have the ideal candidate for a year when traditional Democrats are likely to struggle. Lieutenant Governor John Fetterman appeals across the political spectrum, inspires genuine grassroots enthusiasm, connects with working class voters, and has proven that he can win votes in the reddest counties in Pennsylvania. **To have our best chance at flipping this crucial open seat, Democrats need to nominate John Fetterman, the only candidate in the race who has already proven he can run and win statewide in PA.** Please see below for updates on polling, our 67-County plan, and fundraising. _Polling_ You all know how John and I feel about polling. But if you're counting, we've been ahead — far ahead — in every primary poll. The results of our most recent poll from Data for Progress came in on Feb 1, 2022, and it showed John **at least 30 points ahead** of his opponents. This is great to hear, but it doesn’t mean we can slow down. We're polling ahead of our Republican opponents, but it’s a much closer race. The latest polling shows John ahead of our GOP opponents, but only two points ahead of frontrunner Dr. Oz. **Here’s what that poll means:** Among likely Pennsylvania voters, John Fetterman is ahead of Dr. Oz, meaning we’re leading this race to replace Pat Toomey and flip this ultra-competitive Senate seat blue in 2022. _But with only a two-point difference, we’ll need serious grassroots resources to compete with Dr. Oz’s self-funded campaign._ _Our 67-County Plan_ John has said this again and again, but it’s worth repeating: No town is too small, rural, or “red” for us to count out. **We’re running a 67-County campaign because every Pennsylvanian deserves someone to fight for them.** Last weekend, John and Gisele went to some of the reddest counties in PA. Turnout was amazing. In Smethport, a town of 1,600 people in a county Trump won 72%-26% in 2020, over 100 people showed up. In Clarion, a town of 5,500 people in a county that Trump won 75%-24% in 2020, 60 people showed up. In Harmony, a town of 1,100 in a county Trump won 65%-33% in 2020, 80 people showed up. And the other two stops in Warren and Venango, counties where Trump won 68%-29% and 70%-28%, respectively, also brought out dozens of folks. Support for John from red areas isn’t new, though. Last August, for example, our campaign hosted a meet and greet in Mercer County, which Trump won by over 25% in 2020, a county that some Democrats wouldn’t even bother going to. We held an event at a wing joint and had roughly 100 people come out to meet John and see him speak — in Sharon, PA, a town with a population of just 13,000 people. This proves that John doesn’t have to convince people he’s not like other politicians – they can see it for themselves. With his straight-talking, no-BS style, John defies conventional labels and appeals across party lines. He is the rare candidate with a bold populist record and the proven ability to appeal to independents and voters in Pennsylvania’s reddest and most rural counties. If we learned anything over the past few years, it’s that Democrats can’t continue to completely cede rural counties to Republicans. For years, in Pennsylvania, it has been said that winning a general election as a Democrat is all about winning Philadelphia and Pittsburgh. If we just run up the margins in urban areas, the thinking goes, then Democrats don’t have to worry about the largely red, rural counties that make up the rest of the state. Last November showed that margins matter _everywhere_ , even in counties that Democrats are never going to win. Ceding county after county to Republicans is a losing strategy. John has always believed in every county, every vote. And he is not willing to write off any region, any community, any part of Pennsylvania. In 2018, when John ran on the ticket with Governor Tom Wolf, he traveled the state and talked to voters in every corner— regardless of how red or blue. **And with John as his running mate, Governor Wolf won by more than almost a million more votes than he did in 2014. They did it by chipping away at Republican margins in rural counties.** John and Gov. Wolf won Berks County, Beaver County, Cumberland County, Erie County, and Luzerne County, all counties where Democrats have struggled at times in recent years. This notion that rural voters are immovable proved flat-out false. **Most importantly, John doesn’t just wait until election season to show up in rural Pennsylvania.** In his first few months as Lieutenant Governor, John traveled to all 67 counties to conduct a listening tour around legalizing marijuana. Whether it’s supporting down ballot local candidates or meeting constituents in every county, Fetterman has consistently shown up to rural counties and built strong relationships with communities on the ground. _Fundraising_ Our grassroots campaign has received small-dollar donations from all 50 states + all 67 PA Counties. We’ve had more than 180,000 donors make over 475,000 donations since launching our campaign one year + ten days ago. And our average donation has consistently been under $30 (actually, closer to $20), a number that demonstrates just how much our campaign relies on everyday people like YOU. But we can’t ignore the millions of dollars being poured into this race every single day. The GOP and their super PACs have poured over $32.5 million into TV and radio ads. This is shaping up to be the most expensive election in Pennsylvania history. And just last week, a super PAC supporting one of our Democratic primary opponents, Conor Lamb, announced they are going to raise $8 million to try and help Lamb win the primary election. As intimidating as it is to look at the amount of money super PACs are funneling into this race, we cannot forget the power of the people. We know that as long as the everyday folks John represents pitch in a few bucks whenever they can, we can be more powerful than self-funded GOP millionaires and the billionaires writing their super PACs six-figure checks. _Conclusion_ Democrats cannot afford to lose in Pennsylvania. We have to nominate a candidate who can excite the base and appeal to the unique independent voters of Pennsylvania. In order to win, Democrats must compete everywhere and meet voters where they are at. **In John Fetterman, Democrats have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to turn this Senate seat blue and to have an unabashed champion of the working class represent Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate.**
---

clean_body: This memo is long, but important. Derek, we don’t do this often, but I’m really excited to share our 2022 Strategy Memo with you This memo is long, but really important. I hope you take the time to read it. The stakes for this election — not just for PA, but for our democracy — are just too high not to keep yinz looped into our strategy. If you’re the least bit nebby about our campaign plans for the months ahead, you’ll want to read this. Every County, Every Vote. There’s just no other way to win PA. — Bobby Maggio Campaign Manager John Fetterman for U.S. Senate TO: Interested Parties FROM: Bobby Maggio, Campaign Manager MEMO: Strategy for 2022 In Pennsylvania, Democrats cannot afford to run the same old playbook. We have learned from watching the 2021 election in Virginia, as well as what we’ve heard on the ground, that Democrats cannot rely on just Philadelphia and Pittsburgh to win this race. Fortunately, in what will be the most important Senate race in the country this year, we have the ideal candidate for a year when traditional Democrats are likely to struggle. Lieutenant Governor John Fetterman appeals across the political spectrum, inspires genuine grassroots enthusiasm, connects with working class voters, and has proven that he can win votes in the reddest counties in Pennsylvania. To have our best chance at flipping this crucial open seat, Democrats need to nominate John Fetterman, the only candidate in the race who has already proven he can run and win statewide in PA. Please see below for updates on polling, our 67-County plan, and fundraising. Polling You all know how John and I feel about polling. But if you're counting, we've been ahead — far ahead — in every primary poll. The results of our most recent poll from Data for Progress came in on Feb 1, 2022, and it showed John at least 30 points ahead of his opponents. This is great to hear, but it doesn’t mean we can slow down. We're polling ahead of our Republican opponents, but it’s a much closer race. The latest polling shows John ahead of our GOP opponents, but only two points ahead of frontrunner Dr. Oz. Here’s what that poll means: Among likely Pennsylvania voters, John Fetterman is ahead of Dr. Oz, meaning we’re leading this race to replace Pat Toomey and flip this ultra-competitive Senate seat blue in 2022. But with only a two-point difference, we’ll need serious grassroots resources to compete with Dr. Oz’s self-funded campaign. Our 67-County Plan John has said this again and again, but it’s worth repeating: No town is too small, rural, or “red” for us to count out. We’re running a 67-County campaign because every Pennsylvanian deserves someone to fight for them. Last weekend, John and Gisele went to some of the reddest counties in PA. Turnout was amazing. In Smethport, a town of 1,600 people in a county Trump won 72%-26% in 2020, over 100 people showed up. In Clarion, a town of 5,500 people in a county that Trump won 75%-24% in 2020, 60 people showed up. In Harmony, a town of 1,100 in a county Trump won 65%-33% in 2020, 80 people showed up. And the other two stops in Warren and Venango, counties where Trump won 68%-29% and 70%-28%, respectively, also brought out dozens of folks. Support for John from red areas isn’t new, though. Last August, for example, our campaign hosted a meet and greet in Mercer County, which Trump won by over 25% in 2020, a county that some Democrats wouldn’t even bother going to. We held an event at a wing joint and had roughly 100 people come out to meet John and see him speak — in Sharon, PA, a town with a population of just 13,000 people. This proves that John doesn’t have to convince people he’s not like other politicians – they can see it for themselves. With his straight-talking, no-BS style, John defies conventional labels and appeals across party lines. He is the rare candidate with a bold populist record and the proven ability to appeal to independents and voters in Pennsylvania’s reddest and most rural counties. If we learned anything over the past few years, it’s that Democrats can’t continue to completely cede rural counties to Republicans. For years, in Pennsylvania, it has been said that winning a general election as a Democrat is all about winning Philadelphia and Pittsburgh. If we just run up the margins in urban areas, the thinking goes, then Democrats don’t have to worry about the largely red, rural counties that make up the rest of the state. Last November showed that margins matter everywhere , even in counties that Democrats are never going to win. Ceding county after county to Republicans is a losing strategy. John has always believed in every county, every vote. And he is not willing to write off any region, any community, any part of Pennsylvania. In 2018, when John ran on the ticket with Governor Tom Wolf, he traveled the state and talked to voters in every corner— regardless of how red or blue. And with John as his running mate, Governor Wolf won by more than almost a million more votes than he did in 2014. They did it by chipping away at Republican margins in rural counties. John and Gov. Wolf won Berks County, Beaver County, Cumberland County, Erie County, and Luzerne County, all counties where Democrats have struggled at times in recent years. This notion that rural voters are immovable proved flat-out false. Most importantly, John doesn’t just wait until election season to show up in rural Pennsylvania. In his first few months as Lieutenant Governor, John traveled to all 67 counties to conduct a listening tour around legalizing marijuana. Whether it’s supporting down ballot local candidates or meeting constituents in every county, Fetterman has consistently shown up to rural counties and built strong relationships with communities on the ground. Fundraising Our grassroots campaign has received small-dollar donations from all 50 states + all 67 PA Counties. We’ve had more than 180,000 donors make over 475,000 donations since launching our campaign one year + ten days ago. And our average donation has consistently been under $30 (actually, closer to $20), a number that demonstrates just how much our campaign relies on everyday people like YOU. But we can’t ignore the millions of dollars being poured into this race every single day. The GOP and their super PACs have poured over $32.5 million into TV and radio ads. This is shaping up to be the most expensive election in Pennsylvania history. And just last week, a super PAC supporting one of our Democratic primary opponents, Conor Lamb, announced they are going to raise $8 million to try and help Lamb win the primary election. As intimidating as it is to look at the amount of money super PACs are funneling into this race, we cannot forget the power of the people. We know that as long as the everyday folks John represents pitch in a few bucks whenever they can, we can be more powerful than self-funded GOP millionaires and the billionaires writing their super PACs six-figure checks. Conclusion Democrats cannot afford to lose in Pennsylvania. We have to nominate a candidate who can excite the base and appeal to the unique independent voters of Pennsylvania. In order to win, Democrats must compete everywhere and meet voters where they are at. In John Fetterman, Democrats have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to turn this Senate seat blue and to have an unabashed champion of the working class represent Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

clean_body: | = Friend, I just wanted to make sure that you saw the great news... For years, New York's 1st district has been rated a district that leans consistently Republican. Then, just last week, the experts and insiders at Sabato's Crystal Ball officially changed their rating of our race from LeanR to TOSS-UP. = | = The political insiders and pundits have done their research and released new rating changes – but in a brand new district, anything can happen. Whether this district gets swept up in a red wave or finally flips blue will come down to the strength of the grassroots campaign we're able to run. We need your help more than ever. The future of New York's 1st District is up to us to decide – if we step up now , we can do this together. = = Thank you once again, Kelley Campaign Manager Kara Hahn for Congress \----------Forwarded message---------- From: Kelley, Kara Hahn for Congress Date: February 14, 2022 at 7:05 p.m. ET Subject: UPDATE: Our race just got named a TOSS-UP Heads up team, The election insiders at Sabato's Crystal Ball have assessed the state of our race to flip NY-01 and are calling it a pure TOSS-UP. New York's 1st Congressional District: 2022 rating: Toss-Up Veteran national political prognosticators are saying what we've all known – the future of New York's 1st District is up to us to decide, team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Here's what Sabato's Crystal Ball said in their qualitative report: "We are starting NY-1, which covers some traditionally swingy areas, as a Toss-up, although this is a district Democrats should be able to win in most years(it's just that 2022 might be a bad Democratic year, which has bearing on all of our ratings)." Friends, the experts are absolutely right. We're facing strong headwinds going into the midterms, and whether we win this toss-up seat for Democrats will depend on the work we put in right now. With Roe v. Wade, action on climate change, our freedom to vote, and so much more hanging in the balance – we cannot afford to have a "bad year." Our race could easily decide control of the entire House, and Kara's the right candidate to finally flip it, but we need your help. = = Thank you very much, Kelley Campaign Manager Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress!** = =

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Joe MUST go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

I'm just going to come out and say it...

...**Joe Biden MUST be impeached!**

And when Republicans take control of the House and Senate this coming November, I will lead the charge to make it happen.

But to lead this fight, first I've got to be reelected.

And that isn't going to be easy!

**And why I hope and pray you will join me today to help IMPEACH JOE BIDEN and stop the Democrat's illegal unconstitutional sttacks on America.** [_**HELP MTG IMPEACH BIDEN
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59670877:WgWGQfHwN:m:1:2365227053:DE76A7CFA6151F022ED0DC362EFAC87F:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59670877:WgWGQfHwN:m:1:2365227053:DE76A7CFA6151F022ED0DC362EFAC87F:r) **We've all seen it.**

The CIA is gathering a massive database of American citizens!

This is illegal.

Capitol Hill police and FBI agents are spying on members of Congress!

**_This is deplorable!_**

And now we find out what we all feared is true: Hillary Clinton and the Democrats spied on President Donald Trump!

This is _TREASON_!

Plain and simple. The radical left has gone too far. And it's time we fight back.

**That's why it's time to IMPEACH Joe Biden, FIRE the Democrats, and bring back the Constitution to our government.**

And it's time we made these criminals pay for their illegal, unconstitutional actions.

**[Please join me today by chipping in $17.76 and helping me make their arrest and conviction a reality](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59670877:WgWGQfHwN:m:1:2365227053:DE76A7CFA6151F022ED0DC362EFAC87F:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59670877:WgWGQfHwN:m:1:2365227053:DE76A7CFA6151F022ED0DC362EFAC87F:r) [_**HELP MTG IMPEACH BIDEN
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59670877:WgWGQfHwN:m:1:2365227053:DE76A7CFA6151F022ED0DC362EFAC87F:r) **Peter,I simply can't do this alone.**

Because the Democrats and their RINO allies aren't just going to sit there and take it.

They are going to spend MILLIONS to defeat me in 2022.

In fact, they've already recruited a primary challenger against me!

So I need your help.

**Now more than ever, I need your help. Not only to fight back but to take the fight to them.**

The establishment and their handmaidens in the media will do everything they can to shut me down and shut me up.

But if you know anything about me, you know that isn't going to happen.

I will not let Hillary Clinton and the Democrat machine get away with committing treason by spying on a sitting U.S. President.

_I'm not going to let Joe Biden get away with his unconstitutional actions that have put our nation at risk_.

And I will not simply be quiet about the rogue FBI and CIA who are so openly violating the law to try and shut down Joe Biden's political opponents.

No, I will do everything in my power to make sure we FIRE the Democrats this year.

Then next year, we IMPEACH Joe Biden and arrest and file criminal charges against Hillary Clinton and all involved with the acts of Treason committed against our nation.

**[Will you please chip in a contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even the legal maximum of $2,900 per individual TODAY so I can keep fighting for Donald Trump's America First principles](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59670877:WgWGQfHwN:m:1:2365227053:DE76A7CFA6151F022ED0DC362EFAC87F:r)?**

I must have your support right away to keep speaking the truth and speaking up for our America First values.

Please stand with me in this all-important fight today!

**[Chip in your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59670877:WgWGQfHwN:m:1:2365227053:DE76A7CFA6151F022ED0DC362EFAC87F:r)!**

Sincerely,

Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59670877:WgWGQfHwN:m:1:2365227053:DE76A7CFA6151F022ED0DC362EFAC87F:r)

---

| Listen, this is a short email, but it’s important. Let me quickly explain why I need to raise $1,392 before my End-of-Week fundraising deadline on Sunday. [**My election is only _88 days away._ _That means I only have:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41961866/331065555/-2096412469?refcode=20220218_em_fr_b1_daysuntilelection_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTgwMjk3Mi1mMjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MrfBIQP0HzbHtJAxJD07aSBTPds1-bySwBt3Q-CuGtQ=) **_88 more days_** to knock on every door, talk to undecided voters, and connect with every single community in PA-18. **_88 more days_** to maintain my place as the front-runner in this race. It’s going to be extremely tight, so I can’t afford to lose this momentum now. **_88 more days_** to take this grassroots-powered campaign to the next level. body:
#

Hello Somebody!
We’re reaching out to see if you can **[make a $5 donation to Nina Turner for Us before the weekend.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41961883/331065601/1088907945?refcode2=cb508880-f290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220218-1-t1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjUwODg4MC1mMjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tlf3LMaaucP3tQqmH2qowdFcZ_YIpNeVXzcKsmfSs9Q=)**

First, it will help ensure our campaign has the resources to fund our organizing, advertising, and GOTV operations.
But just as importantly, every contribution is a powerful statement of solidarity for our movement. It’s standing up and saying _“I believe in the future we’re fighting for, and I will do my part to make that future a reality.”_
We have an opportunity to send a champion for Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, canceling student debt, raising the minimum wage and so much more to Congress. **But we can’t do it without you.**
**[So please, make a $5 contribution to our campaign today. We have a lot of work to do in the coming weeks and months, but as long as we continue to stand together, we’ll be able to take on anything that comes our way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41961884/331065602/1088907945?refcode2=cb508880-f290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220218-1-t1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjUwODg4MC1mMjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tlf3LMaaucP3tQqmH2qowdFcZ_YIpNeVXzcKsmfSs9Q=)**
**[DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41961885/331065603/1088907945?refcode2=cb508880-f290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220218-1-t1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjUwODg4MC1mMjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tlf3LMaaucP3tQqmH2qowdFcZ_YIpNeVXzcKsmfSs9Q=)**
Thank you!
\- Nina Turner for Us

Jahmal

subject: Endorsing a promising young man
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
When I come across promising candidates for office, I make a concerted effort to do everything I personally can to help them succeed. |

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0816cfe2c7b549b7b6a364884007a9d3&_e=h8jf920-1fHDKlIyAXba9N3jA2PMD2YAv4j0XWVIDNuj9E9pqaZqhFn7lb9Z8l01ZtSK1ghVjfWRtzuslXrm5BWEoF6mmyLNnWjlfI47R6-DctGwTLaU81519w1V7q4DcFzaISasgCUCzX0jMUeA20JQHoKYDzxWxu4ufMVPdDaznFDk8Eo00aYA6BAvS_TMIMluJB7d5VdXSZaI0qrhKgON0F2UDOBRagvVP2iNPiaRwcD634p8s2p406VSOt6H02hT9YtrvJ97AjUz91UFCZlWBMr1JZWq3zEb-M-r-APkl7r0XrPxeCtlK3pb_vGmFAVryzO_dU-DzUlNFzgxbGcHD_YNNK8tg5su9sEMks4d2YnTxcA9m6p2NZit0M66-VIAqXU_tC9qdtAiYSZuT6KjSn_ONFyPh4jTZ6YzdMKdKm3MHUguAmxph1hjJzutuZKotUmwQuTkcPylR8qJOw%3D%3D)

Peter,

While I’m not myself up for reelection for a number of years, I’m absolutely dedicated to helping Republicans win back both the Senate majority and the majority in the U.S. House.

When I come across promising candidates for office, I make a concerted effort to do everything I personally can to help them succeed. That’s why today I’m excited to endorse Mr. Rod Dorilás for Congress.

**Rod’s Dorilás’ story is quintessentially American.** His Haitian immigrant parents came to the United States without a penny to their name; to make a living they picked crops in South Florida. With hard work and a lot of perseverance, they found their own American Dream and became small business owners. And less than forty years after first arriving in the United States, their son – Rod – had the distinct honor of serving the president of the United States.

I’m proud to support the son of entrepreneurial immigrants who built their own American Dream without the help of the government, or socialist-style handouts. **Perhaps with more dedicated public servants such as Rod Dorilás in Congress, grit, determination and personal responsibility may finally win out over the left’s mantra of “give me give me give me.”**

I know it’s a lot to ask, particularly with inflation so high at the moment, **[but if there were ever a candidate worth of a $2 or $3 donation, Rod would be that candidate.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0816cfe2c7b549b7b6a364884007a9d3&_e=h8jf920-1fHDKlIyAXba9N3jA2PMD2YAv4j0XWVIDNuj9E9pqaZqhFn7lb9Z8l01ZtSK1ghVjfWRtzuslXrm5BWEoF6mmyLNnWjlfI47R6-DctGwTLaU81519w1V7q4DcFzaISasgCUCzX0jMUeA20JQHoKYDzxWxu4ufMVPdDaznFDk8Eo00aYA6BAvS_TMIMluJB7d5VdXSZaI0qrhKgON0F2UDOBRagvVP2iNPiaRwcD634p8s2p406VSOt6Hp9arK9yZbsKW4hDG46nMld_0zIxayKHeoYCt_JvFzbRMtBY4pxnpPCHRI8ULp6GdYkrW8ZdL5pswb9C8M1LeKFpJVA3HVdSmYaj-vQYx9T4RSxwLBN67I6_OUSfuw_OLPDX8udkB7PehlPrJGIZzOCLQjtpQHNCj1pjxucSO0pTsJNs0xHTL7GoSWoiUrfyh1q9n4KvzloDE-azFg5DIaw%3D%3D)**

[**Send an American Patriot to Congress
Chip in $2>> **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0816cfe2c7b549b7b6a364884007a9d3&_e=h8jf920-1fHDKlIyAXba9N3jA2PMD2YAv4j0XWVIDNuj9E9pqaZqhFn7lb9Z8l01ZtSK1ghVjfWRtzuslXrm5BWEoF6mmyLNnWjlfI47R6-DctGwTLaU81519w1V7q4DcFzaISasgCUCzX0jMUeA20JQHoKYDzxWxu4ufMVPdDaznFDk8Eo00aYA6BAvS_TMIMluJB7d5VdXSZaI0qrhKgON0F2UDOBRagvVP2iNPiaRwcD634p8s2p406VSOt6HxaMZdUthL-YCYRpH-XFUrN8hLzCsN1RIucP-xRpZ97cw9L8bMcRqPhGU4ruewW-BBgfLadiZ_TWiMNIuK2TyY5_6fhGDASpwtmSRHCbWE6NPzkDTJlhet50-oO3hmWDkJw_sNfzdaYNgHIXXzlR6b-oYU_QJh11R1m73ryvCpmjUNoYUc9gSr_w2dyeD0nkm57aqyKdMUKJ3tlkzBPS7Uw%3D%3D)
Rod is exactly the kind of representative that the American people need. As a veteran, first generation American, small business owner, and former counsel in the Department of Commerce, Rod brings the experience and energy to make real change in Washington D.C.

Rod is a fighter and the Republican candidate who can win in the South Florida district where he’s running. **[Rod Dorilás has my full backing and I’m asking you to join me in supporting his campaign today.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0816cfe2c7b549b7b6a364884007a9d3&_e=h8jf920-1fHDKlIyAXba9N3jA2PMD2YAv4j0XWVIDNuj9E9pqaZqhFn7lb9Z8l01ZtSK1ghVjfWRtzuslXrm5BWEoF6mmyLNnWjlfI47R6-DctGwTLaU81519w1V7q4DcFzaISasgCUCzX0jMUeA20JQHoKYDzxWxu4ufMVPdDaznFDk8Eo00aYA6BAvS_TMIMluJB7d5VdXSZaI0qrhKgON0F2UDOBRagvVP2iNPiaRwcD634p8s2p406VSOt6HbIhNaSQARNT67IKhuVj2VyFZzm6UD9aIdcZWayckIivtulhd2oc8KJpcK-mNlT5w8XT7iucO3g0-pCctk7VssSHK0C0_PHtzdFgE5BsWU87tLBgUQcnygmd3XvYx26YA7tz3D2xWDJWvRrCK8ii6YVqhxlbOAnHrrcfg12Tu1b00fSaZlXM8EEzliLXUOnG6jCa8vFZj4IUkdQA0ERhvjQ%3D%3D)**

[**Send an American Patriot to Congress

In solidarity,
Sen. Tom Cotton

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0816cfe2c7b549b7b6a364884007a9d3&_e=h8jf920-1fHDKlIyAXba9N3jA2PMD2YAv4j0XWVIDNuj9E9pqaZqhFn7lb9Z8l01ZtSK1ghVjfWRtzuslXrm5BWEoF6mmyLNnWjlfI47R6-DctGwTLaU81519w1V7q4DcFzaISasgCUCzX0jMUeA20JQHoKYDzxWxu4ufMVPdDaznFDk8Eo00aYA6BAvS_TMIMluJB7d5VdXSZaI0qrhKgON0F2UDOBRagvVP2iNPiaRwcD634p8s2p406VSOt6HBpa_8lLeVHZpLlSKfUegJWsBle3qR-uPy-hz59c0nAISu12yqMujCpvdvuiGac-MDvYdD9jDlIpFHia6w-lTJh6-jq35YWOSxQWWhhwTFeU2oMGkWuHUpKGee7dwfcpwQcA-Ugp5rs02cEUYpryJCIRDZK7AHPUxhZ7qZ2Q8oYitLO0zMrm2DEsDwwiER4qCLr8ibCJoUnYElbCr9afYjQ%3D%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

name: Marisa Wood
subject: UPDATE: I've been pre-endorsed by the California Democratic Party

| _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41962093/331066342/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjQxYjdjMi1mMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Td2adYRT7F6EAaxCRQawwBMcCXxlp94rcia6yaIabFU=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3941b7c2-f390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/4641b7c2-f390-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjQxYjdjMi1mMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Td2adYRT7F6EAaxCRQawwBMcCXxlp94rcia6yaIabFU=&id=124172018)._ Friend, In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to [**make a $3 contribution**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41962094/331066343/943178430?refcode=em-2.18.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjQxYjdjMi1mMzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Td2adYRT7F6EAaxCRQawwBMcCXxlp94rcia6yaIabFU=) to our campaign to stop Kevin McCarthy from becoming Speaker of the House. Things have changed significantly in my race, so I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request is so crucial.

**Last week, we got word that another one of our primary opponents dropped out of the race. Soon after, we earned 100% of the vote from local Democratic delegates to be pre-endorsed by the California Democratic Party. This is a huge momentum boost, and it's a clear sign that Democrats are consolidating behind my campaign.**

Folks on the ground in the Central Valley no longer believe the lie that McCarthy is untouchable, and we're ready to hold him accountable. But I know this is not something I can take on alone.

This needs to be OUR movement, friend -- which is why I'm asking:

[**Now that we're the Democratic frontrunner against Kevin McCarthy, we set a goal of bringing in 780 donations from across California and the country to put McCarthy on notice that we are ready for this fight. name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: My Most Personal Interview
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=389e654ed8&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
|
This is one of the most difficult and personal interviews I’ve done.

One of the reasons I am so passionate about my healthcare accessibility work – and why it’s so personal – is the death of my sister after losing her battle with liver cancer. If the insurance company had not spent nine months denying the tests her doctor ordered she would still be alive today.

In addition to my own personal story highlighting the true damage of healthcare inequity in this country, I talk about the importance of rebuilding infrastructure, building a coalition to create a food bank feeding up to 1000 undocumented and immigrant families per week in the height of the pandemic, and my vision for the 182nd district in Philadelphia.

I hope you will take a few minutes to watch.
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=e5416f778a&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

| | | **Fitler Club Fundraiser Next Week**

---
|
**Help Get My Name on the Ballot**
We need to collect hundreds of petition signatures in the 182nd District in order to get my name on the ballot – and we need your help!

[Sign up today](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=fb868e2b2f&e=3f8e2ea1e3) for a quick tutorial on signature collection - even a couple of hours of your time would go such a long way in helping us in our movement for historic representation!
**[Petition Training for Deja for PA Historic Campaign!](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=accb38136e&e=3f8e2ea1e3)**

### [Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=b6f71d2338&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=6cfafac299&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

clean_body: Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | | This is one of the most difficult and personal interviews I’ve done. One of the reasons I am so passionate about my healthcare accessibility work – and why it’s so personal – is the death of my sister after losing her battle with liver cancer. If the insurance company had not spent nine months denying the tests her doctor ordered she would still be alive today. In addition to my own personal story highlighting the true damage of healthcare inequity in this country, I talk about the importance of rebuilding infrastructure, building a coalition to create a food bank feeding up to 1000 undocumented and immigrant families per week in the height of the pandemic, and my vision for the 182nd district in Philadelphia. I hope you will take a few minutes to watch. | | | | Fitler Club Fundraiser Next Week | | Help Get My Name on the Ballot We need to collect hundreds of petition signatures in the 182nd District in order to get my name on the ballot – and we need your help! for a quick tutorial on signature collection - even a couple of hours of your time would go such a long way in helping us in our movement for historic representation! | Wear a Piece of History! Check out our where your donations will get you stickers, buttons, T-shirts, and masks to show your support of our historic campaign! | | | | Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | © 2021 Paid for by DEJA FOR PA Our mailing address is: DEJA FOR PA PO BOX 63953 PHILADELPHIA, PA 19147 Want to change how you receive these emails? name: Sen. Cortez Masto (D)
subject: BREAKING: most vulnerable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
The GOP is already blanketing Nevada with more than $4 million in attack ads to defeat me.
#
Peter, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically.
**National Journal just said I look like the most vulnerable Democratic Senator right now, which means Mitch McConnell will be zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat he needs to flip the Senate. If we lose Nevada, we lose the Senate.**
I'm no stranger to a tough race – but this is going to be the closest Senate race of the year. The entire force of the GOP is coming after me, so I can’t do this alone. I’ve got to be honest, Peter: I’m facing a major fundraising gap and I need your immediate help.
The GOP is already blanketing Nevada with more than $4 million in attack ads to defeat me. We just ran the numbers and I need to raise at least $25,000 by midnight to have the resources to fight back – but right now I'm falling short.
**Please, Peter, can you help me turn this around before it's too late?** Here's the best link to make your donation: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-220218-ccm](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41962317/331068450/-1742122964?refcode=pm_em_220218_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGMyMzZlMC1mNDkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RiZRANZC-RVPhSmcKrn_r-ypurN3nIg-_3wc1xG_F9w=)**

name: Team Jane
subject: Remembering North Texas’ Black History Heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Jane Hope Hamilton Campaign
body:
https://www.janehopehamilton.com/ [https://www.janehopehamilton.com/]
https://www.janehopehamilton.com/ [https://www.janehopehamilton.com/]

Peter,

The heroes of North Texas listed here are just some of those who would not give up. There are many, many more whose names we will never know. I look to their example, their faith, their sacrifice, and it reinforces my commitment to never give up.

NORTH TEXAS BLACK HISTORY – 30 ACHIEVEMENTS
First Black Judge in Dallas, Louis A. Bedford Jr. (1955)
First Black Chairwoman for the Dallas/Fort Worth International Airport Board, Betty Culbreath
First Elected Black City Council Member, Mayor Pro-Tem of Dallas, George L. Allen Sr.
First Black City Manager of Dallas, Richard Knight Jr. (1987)
First Black Commissioner of Dallas County and founder of KwanzaaFest, John Wiley Price
First Black woman elected to Dallas ISD School Board, Kathlyn Joy Gilliam (1974)
First Black Mayor of Lancaster, Marcus Knight (2008)
First Black Mayor of Dallas, Ron Kirk (1999)
Texas State Senator Royce West was the champion of bringing the first public university and the first public law school to Dallas and authored the dashcam and body camera laws governing police conduct in Texas.
First Black starting quarterback Dallas Cowboys, Quincy Carter (2001)
First Black head coach of Dallas Mavericks, Avery Johnson (2005)
First Black female CEO in the NBA, Cynthia Marshall, President of Dallas Mavericks (2018)
Self-proclaimed as "Texas’ oldest" Black newspaper (purchased by Black leaders in 1938) Dallas Express (1892)
In 1984, Tom Joyner re-launches KKDA’s Tom Joyner in the Morning Show , which would stay on air for 35 years
First Black CEO of Dallas Citizens Council, Kelvin Walker (2019)
First Black woman to serve on the Cedar Hill City Council, Shirley Daniels (2019)
Mt. Pisgah Missionary Baptist Church formed (1864)
First Black priest, Max Murphy, is ordained in Dallas upon graduation from St. Peters School for Black students. (1934)
First Black City Council member for Cedar Hill, Makia Epie (1995)
First Black Chair of Parkland Health and Hospital System, Dr. Lauren McDonald (2004)
First Black members of the “new" Dallas Cowboy Cheerleaders, Vonceil Baker and Deanovoy Nichols, (think blue crop tops and white shorts, 1972)
First Black: member of the Dallas ISD School Board, member of the Texas State Board of Education, surgeon and later Chief of Staff at St. Paul’s Hospital, Emmett J. Conrad
Dallas Post Tribune is the oldest, still operating Black-owned newspaper in North Texas (1947)
First HBCU in Dallas, Bishop College, relocated to the campus now occupied by Paul Quinn College (1961)
First Black female hired by the Duncanville Police Department and the first Black Sheriff of Dallas County, Marian Brown
Congresswoman Eddie Bernice Johnson is the first Black and woman to chair the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, the first Black woman ever elected to Texas House of Representatives from Dallas since Reconstruction
First Black woman elected to public office in DeSoto, Curtistene Smith McCowan
Opal Lee campaigned (including walking from her home in Fort Worth to Washington DC) to make Juneteenth a national holiday
First Black mayor in the City of DeSoto, Carl Sherman (2010)
And the U.S. Congressional Representatives from Texas who have served/are serving the nation:
ALLRED, COLIN. Democrat; Texas, 32nd District.
GREEN, AL. Democrat; Texas, 9th District.
HURD, WILLIAM BALLARD. Republican; Texas, 23rd
JACKSON LEE, SHEILA. Democrat; Texas, 18th
JOHNSON, EDDIE BERNICE. Democrat; Texas, 30th
JORDAN, BARBARA C. Democrat; Texas, 18th
LELAND, GEORGE THOMAS (Mickey). Democrat; Texas, 18th
VEASEY, MARC. Democrat; Texas, 33rd
WASHINGTON, CRAIG ANTHONY. Democrat; Texas, 18th
For over 20 years Jane has been working for our communities
Legislative Aide for The Honorable Helen Giddings
Senior staffer on the US House Rules Committee for the Honorable Martin Frost
Campaign Manager for the Dallas Democratic Sweep in 2006 which flipped Dallas County from Republican to its current status as a Democratic stronghold.
Helped elect Craig Watkins, the first African-American District Attorney in the State of Texas.
Former Campaign Manager for Dallas County Judge Clay Jenkins
Former Campaign Manager and Chief of Staff for Congressman Marc Veasey
Democratic Primary State Director for the Joe Biden Presidential Campaign
General Election Strategic Advisor for the Joe Biden Presidential and Kamala Harris Vice Presidential Campaign
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90478/images/HOPE%20is%20on%20the%20ballot.gif]
Donate Today [secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask]
https://www.facebook.com/janehopetx/ [https://www.facebook.com/janehopetx/] https://twitter.com/JaneHopeTx [https://twitter.com/JaneHopeTx] https://www.instagram.com/JaneHopeTx/ [https://www.instagram.com/JaneHopeTx/]

Paid for by the Jane Hope Hamilton Campaign
If you prefer to donate by check, please mail to:
Jane Hope Hamilton Campaign
P.O. Box 227046
Dallas, TX 75222
United States

name: Defeat DeSantis 2022
subject: Jen Psaki blasted FL GOP’s anti-LGBTQ bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Ron DeSantis has gone after public schools time and time again during his time in office. |
---

| | **Friend, did you see what White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki said about Governor DeSantis’ support for anti-LGBTQ legislation targeting kids and teachers in public schools?** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41962617/331070369/-377701381?refcode=20220218_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2QyMDE1OS1mNTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l18PRrXcrFWyoJa42PaO1fFCXr6nwncrEEE0wxQEh1I=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41962622/331070379/-377701381?refcode=20220218_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2QyMDE1OS1mNTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l18PRrXcrFWyoJa42PaO1fFCXr6nwncrEEE0wxQEh1I=)
We couldn’t agree more! **Ron DeSantis has gone after public schools time and time again** during his term in office. He recent signed a bill that _bans_ discussions that make him uncomfortable, and now he wants to ban any mention of sexual orientation or gender identity.

The bottom line is our students deserve a governor that will advocate for and protect public school students, not antagonize them for being who they are. Charlie will be that governor — but he’s going to need YOUR HELP to defeat Ron DeSantis!

**Friend, pitch in right now to help us elect a governor who cares about our public school students – all of them – this November:**

name: Danielle Allen
subject: what happened. and where we go from here.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT DANIELLE ALLEN
body:
It’s been a big week for all of us on Team Allen for MA. And now that we’ve had a chance to catch our breath, I wanted to reach out and check in.

---
| Hi Peter Willis,

It’s been a big week for all of us on Team Allen for MA. And now that we’ve had a chance to catch our breath, I wanted to reach out and check in. **I’m guessing you have some questions about what’s next — and I want to answer those, as well as share a bit more on why my campaign has run its course, and what I’ve been reflecting on this week.**

Peter Willis, the fact of the matter is, Team Allen climbed some serious mountains over the past 15 months. Together, we passed the mark of $1.3 million raised in grassroots fundraising, and made real strides on organizing in communities across our Commonwealth. **None of that could have happened without you, and I am so grateful for the energy, effort, and support you’ve brought to this push.**

Despite that progress, this February, when we got to the second week of the Democratic caucus process, our path to hitting the threshold for getting my name on the ballot disappeared in a 48 hour period. Last weekend, too few of our caucus-goers got elected as delegates at their caucuses, and the simple fact was that the math from there no longer added up. We took our tallies, analyzed the numbers, and called it like it was. We lost the contest to win ballot access.

Here’s the deal. The caucus process is the path not only to securing the Democratic Party’s endorsement at its June Convention — but also to getting your name on the ballot for the September primary, where Democratic AND unenrolled (i.e. independent) voters ultimately choose the party nominee. That second piece is what ballot access is: getting your name on the ballot for that broader primary. It’s the right to run for office. The caucus process is a great way to seek that party endorsement, and inspire Democrats to organize for the primary and general elections. It’s the right launch pad for competing for the full nomination.

But when it comes to getting your name on the ballot, that’s a different story. **The way the numbers shake out, it’s possible for candidates to get locked out of the ballot — even if, like us, they’ve got support across many communities.** That’s because, to make it through the caucuses and onto the primary ballot, you have to win the support of the plurality of caucus-goers, town by town, in multiple towns and cities. You’ve got to have a LOT of firepower to do that, at a very early stage. And since so many people don’t participate in — or don’t know about — the caucuses, we’re setting the bar too high for getting on the ballot. We’re stopping the majority of Democratic primary voters from having full choice on their ballot, and a full voice in shaping that process.

Compared with states like California and Illinois, where all it takes to get on the ballot is signature gathering, it just doesn’t have to be this hard. And I’m excited to get to work to change this! Our state is the birthplace of modern democracy, and Massachusetts Democrats are doing really powerful work to continue our leadership on strengthening our democracy. Pushing for voice and choice, by lowering the barriers to running for office and getting on the ballot, is the next step.

I’ll be entering a new phase of advocacy soon, where I’ll keep working to strengthen our democracy in all the ways we’ve been calling for — from pushing for reforms like same-day registration, to calling for the governor’s office to adhere to the Public Records Act. And when the dust settles on this election in November, I’ll work on carrying through reforms to getting on the ballot, too. **This is about healthy primaries, a healthy democracy, and voice and choice.**

Peter Willis, I cannot stress enough how grateful I am for your partnership and support. It has meant the world. And we’re moving mountains. I’ll be sure to be in touch when I have more details on what the next step looks like for me. For now, don’t be a stranger — you can always reach out at [info@allenforma.com](mailto:info@allenforma.com). I’m still here for Massachusetts and for you, and I will be here — for the long haul.

Thank you for your voice, vision, and commitment in our work to build One Commonwealth. Onward, together.

Danielle

P.S. [**Greater Boston’s Jim Braude recently interviewed me on all of this — click here to listen to our full conversation!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963222/331073867/-803653937?v=k-d0huYJOYE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjIxYmE4Yy1mNjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L7WN4VqT9aGtBJfLkUmjs8eAMxvDLL-7Pcx2H6rp8zk=&emci=74760d39-e990-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=5f21ba8c-f690-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=23957497)
---
| Learn more at [allenformassachusetts.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963223/331073872/-1879778474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjIxYmE4Yy1mNjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L7WN4VqT9aGtBJfLkUmjs8eAMxvDLL-7Pcx2H6rp8zk=&emci=74760d39-e990-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=5f21ba8c-f690-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=23957497)
---

---

Thank you for your voice, vision, and commitment in our work to build One Commonwealth. Onward, together. Danielle P.S. | Learn more at | PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT DANIELLE ALLEN THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT DANIELLE ALLEN 124 Washington Street Suite 101 Foxborough, MA 02035 United States If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
Since we launched this campaign, I’ve been AMAZED by the outpouring of support from people across the state who are ready to join our fight for Wisconsin’s working families. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963326/331074500/-366912648?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODI2ZjRkNi1mNjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HJYpF5DZDsOUldsxveq-ouLlgf-299BP8Fw9ka_keCQ=)
_Jessica is self-employed and serves on the City of West Allis Plan Commission. Jessica is running for Congress in Wisconsin. To learn more about Jessica, visit her website[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963327/331074501/-1302937906?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODI2ZjRkNi1mNjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HJYpF5DZDsOUldsxveq-ouLlgf-299BP8Fw9ka_keCQ=&emci=4a8879d3-5c90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2826f4d6-f690-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9315441). We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/4a8879d3-5c90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/2826f4d6-f690-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODI2ZjRkNi1mNjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HJYpF5DZDsOUldsxveq-ouLlgf-299BP8Fw9ka_keCQ=&id=111866430)._ Hi Peter, In just a moment, [I’m going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign for Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963328/331074502/1171894277?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODI2ZjRkNi1mNjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HJYpF5DZDsOUldsxveq-ouLlgf-299BP8Fw9ka_keCQ=) But I hope you’ll give me the chance to explain why support from grassroots supporters like you is imperative to helping us win our race. I am not a super wealthy individual. I don’t live in a gigantic house or drive an expensive car. I make an honest living working full time as a self-employed contractor while running for Congress. In contrast, my opponent Scott Fitzgerald raised over $1.2 MILLION last year with the help of his network of corporate, special-interest donors. This is why I need your help. Unlike our opponent, we don’t have a list of mega donors funneling cash into our campaign account. We’ve got something even better—a grassroots team powered by folks like you who pitch in what you can, when you can, because you believe in what we’re fighting for. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and I won’t sugarcoat it, we’re going to need a lot of resources to win this thing. But together, I know we can overcome Republican spending and continue making progress for our working families, one grassroots contribution at a time. [So, I’m humbly asking for you to make your first contribution to my campaign for Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963329/331074503/1171894277?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODI2ZjRkNi1mNjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HJYpF5DZDsOUldsxveq-ouLlgf-299BP8Fw9ka_keCQ=) In a race like this, every dollar makes a difference. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[DONATE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963330/331074504/-366912648?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODI2ZjRkNi1mNjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HJYpF5DZDsOUldsxveq-ouLlgf-299BP8Fw9ka_keCQ=)**

name: Team Jazz
subject: It's go-go time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=logo]
Hi there, did you know that tomorrow marks two years since go-go became the official music of Washington, D.C.? Go-go is also an essential part of the culture here in Prince George’s County. But here’s the thing, because of gentrification and the resulting cultural erasure, go-go was in danger of being muted in D.C. -- until community members took action. Folks banded together, and now go-go is officially recognized and here to stay.
You see, when lots of people work together, we can do amazing things. We can elect a born and raised Prince Georgian to be the youngest African-American ever to represent Maryland in Congress. We can send a fresh and boldly progressive voice with a strong record of delivering change for the people he represents to the U.S. House. We can send a representative to fight for the change that can't wait, like health care for every person, nutritious food for every neighborhood, and reforms to our unjust and often predatory criminal justice system.
But Jazz doesn’t come from money -- his family fought their way into the middle class -- so our people-powered campaign depends on grassroots donors to help us continue organizing for victory ahead of our June 28 primary. We’re in a solidly blue district, so our Election Day is just 130 days away.
Join us in building something amazing. Chip in $5, $10, $25, or the most generous amount you can to reach voters across our district with Jazz's message and vision for the future >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=body_link1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Give $5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=abx5] Give $10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=abx10]
Give $25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode2=abx25] Give $50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode2=abx50]
Give $100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode2=abx100] Give Other » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=abx-other]

Let's meet this moment,
Team Jazz
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States
