name: Paxton's Patriots
subject: Joe Biden Is In Illegal Immigrant Recruitment Mode
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign
body:
Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 18, 2022

|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 18, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** The Biden administration wants to get people here as quickly as possible before they get shut down by the courts. They are in recruitment mode, not keeping-people-out mode. Ken Paxton will always work to secure our border.

**Link: [https://www.foxnews.com/media/ken-paxton-staggering-migrant-crossings-biden-recruitment](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=8c18a34bc603437cad8379f89075e5f2&_e=lkdRMyrk1GPOpV9k-L3FY6d-7E50h1EAjHHRiaAqZZzL3LKt1OJZSMUAWR9GS7dwyhoNdmXxLSnNySVn3t8jjWarPeIHptuCFSYKRtXDVZJWMa8gsP4ThAMqDT0sbjr-h9oQoIKncG7pO73GeB1unfMoTuVdA4u3FXEY0W7BlbLIkuMO_WuSnQdIjx0Le9SFghkHW_4e2KZpQ62vzld7RKt8qqCO-NOTKRTUhVfYiks6i-joezr14jq1sF3QuridjWLbxCSFQcS0A0Q1mzbZVyTDv4jyv0otPeT_J8rMW0ZOofskRunFDOcxQU724gFbz-ZWOZsFtt5MRuhy8-Bi1IOe7QAKYGbciDj2n-5yBbk%3D)**

**Theme of the Day: Joe Biden Is In Illegal Immigrant Recruitment Mode**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know:

~ The Department of Homeland Security on Thursday proposed a new "public charge" rule that would dramatically scale back the number of benefits legal immigrants can use that would be held against them when applying for permanent residency in the United States, including food stamps and Medicaid. Policies like these are nothing but an invitation from Joe Biden to those who wish to break our laws and cross our border. Ken Paxton has won a number of major victories against Joe Biden's dangerous open-border policies and he won't stop until our border is secure.

~ Illegal immigrant encounters at the U.S. southern border reportedly increased in January to 153,941, almost doubling the number of encounters from January 2021 and quadruple the numbers from 2020. It's clear these numbers are getting worse. Joe Biden didn't even put the numbers out. Ken Paxton is involved in a lawsuit that allowed us to see those staggering numbers. Joe Biden is trying to hide them.

~ Last week, a federal judge froze key parts of SB1, legislation meant to protect our elections. Ken Paxton disagreed with that decision & immediately appealed. Last night, Ken Paxton's effort was declared victorious and the court’s decision is paused. Safe, secure elections under SB1 will proceed as intended. Ken Paxton will always fight to protect election integrity in Texas.

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=8c18a34bc603437cad8379f89075e5f2&_e=lkdRMyrk1GPOpV9k-L3FY6_esZ5Xw4nlJFxiFHUD5yXt6oynvzx9-kN7qIVdtJ4xbwsfLsSQf0Qfy7KU9zLWdisqCppFBcWzaCikx07rC8p_94XKKEumpaKDQto1nvaQkm-0N4x83zfZzUyO1VDrZEajnnZIh9bbU3xkr14KPezevT8NTnlOGhZ-2a1Ry7bsC0bg4Z0Q0xgr9tdpJBpbdYsM8O4HHMICZbqZAvfcS44QWYBSmJ08SwBuqVixtdSlf7B-EmihZQs9VDWKwC95xw%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to [join our efforts](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=8c18a34bc603437cad8379f89075e5f2&_e=lkdRMyrk1GPOpV9k-L3FY6_esZ5Xw4nlJFxiFHUD5yXt6oynvzx9-kN7qIVdtJ4xMoSOyh-RQqsS4k_J4VSsIox8d6d25gB8OYIdx7EK43PQNrQLVoO8Vu8KYaYaM343q509Ipc717p6XIHjWz5-S1gMFarh7TMXqsRYauMYdOYdZNwbG3TVrurGsqt_YrmyoiDZvR4hh1p3qtAi_t4g1bem2vdq-B7hzBXO2hQiwB_Iok_-DFKfRQfy_-sjNw10xIHcxZ9VBnQEyLsD6qRJGw%3D%3D) and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates [by clicking here.](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=8c18a34bc603437cad8379f89075e5f2&_e=lkdRMyrk1GPOpV9k-L3FY6_esZ5Xw4nlJFxiFHUD5yXt6oynvzx9-kN7qIVdtJ4xmrmHJnF8ntiRDDcwgPrvi6UeVXnQpAhQBpWPeUb7dSJ6OkgqeMDb5a6ENixL1XuuVi1HVGU0S-mxzz-zrY4ZTdZAbhb07Ehl2nxpr2qCDfDgn2mnN_RXPQL5Xh0gjbdSyhSwmQO7l8THJhWJLO2r8K6Z5Y9OgWEyBBd9toQj5w9dlVyuhg0bp3K-n0KijdYRj6OnMEi2j9tOqI_JV71ySg%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen?=
subject: I'm Running to Get Things Done!
body:
My opponent votes against every bill that would bring benefits to our district. | |
---
| | |
---
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kathleentx13
| I'm running for Congress because I want to get things done for our district - from new jobs, improved infrastructure, better and more affordable healthcare and education to making District 13 a leader in new energy technology.

My opponent has voted against virtually every bill that would help us, including:

\- Strengthening the Voting Rights Act and cleaning up campaign finance regulations;
\- Expanding GI Bill eligibility for our National Guard and Reserve members;
\- Increasing disclosure requirements for presidential and vice presidential candidates;
\- Providing funds to help families and lower healthcare costs;
\- Providing funds for transportation, utility, and energy infrastructure;
\- Protecting older applicants from job discrimination;
\- Re-authorizing funding for domestic violence programs; and
\- Expanding workplace requirements for breast feeding accommodations for new mothers

These are just some of the many examples he has voted against - or not voted at all. In some cases, he is one of only a dozen members of Congress voting against certain acts. Many bills have bipartisan support because they benefit all of us.

Like you, I'm tired of the gridlock. I want to go to Congress to solve our communities' problems.

Will you consider chipping in to help me defeat this obstructionist and bring sanity back to the Panhandle, North Texas, and Texoma?

Thanks!

---
|
---

clean_body: My opponent votes against every bill that would bring benefits to our district. | | | | | | I'm running for Congress because I want to get things done for our district - from new jobs, improved infrastructure, better and more affordable healthcare and education to making District 13 a leader in new energy technology. My opponent has voted against virtually every bill that would help us, including: \- Strengthening the Voting Rights Act and cleaning up campaign finance regulations; \- Expanding GI Bill eligibility for our National Guard and Reserve members; \- Increasing disclosure requirements for presidential and vice presidential candidates; \- Providing funds to help families and lower healthcare costs; \- Providing funds for transportation, utility, and energy infrastructure; \- Protecting older applicants from job discrimination; \- Re-authorizing funding for domestic violence programs; and \- Expanding workplace requirements for breast feeding accommodations for new mothers These are just some of the many examples he has voted against - or not voted at all. In some cases, he is one of only a dozen members of Congress voting against certain acts. Many bills have bipartisan support because they benefit all of us. Like you, I'm tired of the gridlock. I want to go to Congress to solve our communities' problems. Will you consider chipping in to help me defeat this obstructionist and bring sanity back to the Panhandle, North Texas, and Texoma? Thanks! | | "Donate!" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © Kathleen for Congress, All rights reserved. Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Mike Collier
subject: Dan Patrick is attacking public education (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
We must protect our professors and public universities. |
#
---
Today, Dan Patrick announced that he intends to demand an autocratic end to tenure policies at public universities in Texas. I’m not surprised. As everyone knows, I first got into politics because of public education, and _never_ have I seen such clear contempt for our public schools and educators. Whether it be Texas Tech or Texas A&M, the University of Houston or the University of Texas, we will see an exodus of our state’s best and brightest, doing massive and irreparable damage to our economy. **Here’s the rea****lity:****If Dan Patrick has his way, Texas will lose thousands of jobs and billions of dollars in business. This decision would forever tarnish the prestige of Texas.** **We have to fight back. ** **[We need new leadership that values our professors and public universities. Will you contribute $5 or any amount to defeat Dan Patrick and help rebuild a strong education system?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963747/331076087/-534751826?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmUzOGNkNi1mODkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sm3JEImRy4DSYB7OZQr_0yTK6yiWxMQGyThz90ILNNI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963748/331076088/1732193890?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmUzOGNkNi1mODkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sm3JEImRy4DSYB7OZQr_0yTK6yiWxMQGyThz90ILNNI=)

name: Team Ryan
subject: re: Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7646?t=1007&amount=25&akid=2325%2E3611125%2EsgU1AD ]A personal message from John Legend

Hello,

We’re at a turning point in our country. Even though Democrats have a thin
majority, Republicans are using the filibuster to block important bills in
the Senate.

50/50 is not enough. It’s clear we must expand the Democratic Senate
majority to abolish the filibuster and make the real progress American
people want. I believe Tim Ryan is our opportunity to do just that.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7646?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2325%2E3611125%2EsgU1AD ]Will you join me in supporting his campaign? Please, make a donation of
whatever you can afford to help us flip Ohio blue. Anything you give would
mean a lot to me personally.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7646?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2325%2E3611125%2EsgU1AD ]Donate

I was born and raised in Springfield, Ohio. That’s actually how I got my
start in music—performing in my church choir. I will always have a special
place in my heart for the Buckeye State.

Ohio’s U.S. Senate race in November is one of the most important fights of
our lifetime, which is why I couldn’t just sit on the sidelines. And you
can’t either.

Tim’s right-wing opponents and their billionaire backers are already
spending upwards of $40 MILLION to keep Ohio red and ensure Mitch
McConnell retakes total control of the Senate.

If that happens, friend, voting rights, a higher minimum wage,
affordable health care, high-quality education for all our kids, and more
are in jeopardy. I don’t want to think about the damage that Republicans
could do if they regain their grip on our government.

But the good news is if we win Ohio, Democrats can hold and expand our
Senate majority. Even better news? Tim is neck-and-neck with his GOP
opponents in the polls.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7646?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2325%2E3611125%2EsgU1AD ]We CAN win, but only if you help Tim fight back against the attacks
heading his way. Can I personally count on you to add a donation now to
help Tim’s campaign win this important race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7646?t=1011&amount=25&akid=2325%2E3611125%2EsgU1AD ]Donate

Tim Ryan is the leader Ohio deserves. He will do whatever it takes to make
sure working families get the support they need. That’s why we’re both
counting on your help to win.

Thank you. I know how much this team means to Tim and it’s incredible to
see so many supporters join this fight alongside us.

—John Legend

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=2325%2E3611125%2EsgU1AD ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=2325%2E3611125%2EsgU1AD ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1003&akid=2325%2E3611125%2EsgU1AD ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1004&akid=2325%2E3611125%2EsgU1AD ]Donate Once

Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1005&akid=2325%2E3611125%2EsgU1AD ][IMG]

body:
Who doesn't enjoy a long weekend? Did you know, there is no federal holiday named President's Day? Seriously, look it up. It doesn't exist.

| | Who doesn't enjoy a long weekend? Did you know, there is no federal holiday named President's Day? Seriously, look it up. It doesn't exist. Instead what we call 'President's Day' is really the official observance of President George Washington's birthday; which is February 22.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/73Ny8B-R-/c?w=zb91jKpFMc7diDqhMMqj0NcEEWVE7pvPHQiy9CW3mF0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPXByZXNkYXllbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwIiwiciI6IjJkNmJlYmI0LTEyMTEtNDZhMy1lOGM4LTYxMjM1YzhkMDgwMSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| | The origin of Washington's birthday being a holiday dates back to an act of Congress in 1879, granting a holiday to federal employees in Washington, D.C. It would later be expanded to include all federal employees in 1885. The Uniform Monday Holiday Act, passed and signed into law in 1968 then enacted in 1971, shifted several holidays to a Monday observance, creating three day weekends for federal employees and many others.
* Washington's Birthday moved to third Monday in February
* Memorial Day moved to the last Monday in May
* Labor Day moved to the first Monday in September
* Veteran's Day was temporarily moved to the fourth Monday in October but returned to its official date of November 11th (Armistice Day) in honor of the end of World War One

The name "President's Day" would be created by retailers, and now you know why there are sales of bed linens and towels on this holiday.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/73Ny8B-R-/c?w=aSdgL9dd9XRZaq_lUAYRkL-QS_k0jWcg1vxz1y9hguc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPXByZXNkYXllbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwIiwiciI6ImI5OWRmOTkzLTZlNDMtNDMxNy01YWJmLWM2NzgxYWNiMzhlMSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| | After leading our nation's forces to victory during the Revolutionary War, he was elected the first President of the United States. Ultitmately this led to him defining and designing the role of the President, pioneering the Inaugural Address, forming the Cabinet and conducting the first smooth transition of power from one administration to the next. Washington was a product of the complicated times he lived in, and thus had many failings when seen through the lens of today's standards, but I would like to mention a quote from his farewell address. "Though in reviewing the incidents of my Administration I am unconscious of intentional error, I am nevertheless too sensible of my defects not to think it probable that I may have committed many errors." George Washington was man who learned to see and fight against the obstacles to being honest and acting with integrity. He understood the frailty of the future occupants of the office he helped create might have. He had hopes that those who would succeed him in history, would approach the role with a sincere desire to do good for all and hurt to none. I admire these qualities and seek to employ them as the representative for WA-03! clean_body: Who doesn't enjoy a long weekend? Did you know, there is no federal holiday named President's Day? Seriously, look it up. It doesn't exist. | | Can't see this message? | | | | | President's Day Weekend | | | | Who doesn't enjoy a long weekend? Did you know, there is no federal holiday named President's Day? Seriously, look it up. It doesn't exist. Instead what we call 'President's Day' is really the official observance of President George Washington's birthday; which is February 22. | | | | | The origin of Washington's birthday being a holiday dates back to an act of Congress in 1879, granting a holiday to federal employees in Washington, D.C. It would later be expanded to include all federal employees in 1885. The Uniform Monday Holiday Act, passed and signed into law in 1968 then enacted in 1971, shifted several holidays to a Monday observance, creating three day weekends for federal employees and many others. Washington's Birthday moved to third Monday in February Memorial Day moved to the last Monday in May Labor Day moved to the first Monday in September Veteran's Day was temporarily moved to the fourth Monday in October but returned to its official date of November 11th (Armistice Day) in honor of the end of World War One The name "President's Day" would be created by retailers, and now you know why there are sales of bed linens and towels on this holiday. | | | | | After leading our nation's forces to victory during the Revolutionary War, he was elected the first President of the United States. Ultitmately this led to him defining and designing the role of the President, pioneering the Inaugural Address, forming the Cabinet and conducting the first smooth transition of power from one administration to the next. Washington was a product of the complicated times he lived in, and thus had many failings when seen through the lens of today's standards, but I would like to mention a quote from his farewell address. "Though in reviewing the incidents of my Administration I am unconscious of intentional error, I am nevertheless too sensible of my defects not to think it probable that I may have committed many errors." George Washington was man who learned to see and fight against the obstacles to being honest and acting with integrity. He understood the frailty of the future occupants of the office he helped create might have. He had hopes that those who would succeed him in history, would approach the role with a sincere desire to do good for all and hurt to none. I admire these qualities and seek to employ them as the representative for WA-03! TOGETHER WE WILL ! | | | | | | I want to represent WA-03 to: Defend your rights as and families. Aim for the , written into law. Protect a with protected reproductive care, written into law. I’m so honored by the tremendous support I’ve received already for my campaign. It’s obvious that Hoosiers are eager to vote out Frank Mrvan this November, and send a real conservative fighter to Washington!

| | | BREAKING via FiveThirtyEight: **Trump's disapproval rating nears an all-time high!**

_As Trump considers another run for office, we need to know where this grassroots team stands:_**

Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6225?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220218-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220218-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&akid=3044%2E9716520%2ELx2mlv)
Team -- Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that a brand new poll shows Donald Trump’s **disapproval** rating at 67% -- **_that's near an ALL-TIME HIGH!_**

The lies and scandals of Trump’s four years in office are FINALLY starting to catch up with him! And with Trump still calling the shots in GOP races nationwide, these numbers could spell **_serious_** trouble for Republicans this year.

**We need your help to confirm this poll's accuracy BEFORE Trump launches another White House bid.** We’re missing 12 responses from Pennsylvania, and our live poll expires at 11:59 PM. **Can you take a moment to respond?**

**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6225?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220218-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220218-LivePoll-DisapprovalRating-Pros-sl1&akid=3044%2E9716520%2ELx2mlv)
Thanks,

Team DSCC

name: Matt Castelli
subject: What my campaign is truly about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
My campaign for Congress isn’t just about defeating Elise Stefanik in November -- it’s about policies that will help reduce expenses for working families, expand access to healthcare, invest in our infrastructure, secure our nation, and so many more issues that impact our lives every day.
| Team,

My campaign for Congress isn’t just about defeating Elise Stefanik in November — it’s about policies that will help reduce expenses for working families, expand access to healthcare, invest in our infrastructure, secure our nation, and so many more issues that impact our lives every day.

I’m running for Congress because, together, we can finally ensure we have a true champion for Northern New Yorkers in Washington. Our district has been neglected for far too long and we can’t wait for change.

**[But, I need your help if we’re going to deliver on this promise. While Elise Stefanik can rely on Trump and his cronies to fund her campaign, I am relying on grassroots supporters like you. That’s why I need your help in reaching our $8,000 goal by midnight on Saturday — and we’re only $3,864 short! * * *
**_Opinion | Time to ban insider trading in Congress_**
By Tom Nelson

Last January, Georgia voters were hammered with TV ads highlighting their incumbent senators' use of insider information to make millions in suspiciously timed stock trades. The argument that Georgians simply couldn’t trust David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler when they were knee-deep in the swamp and profiting at taxpayer expense helped produce stunning upsets, giving us a fragile Democratic majority.

As Democrats face a tough midterm election, and trust in Congress is at all-time lows, I know most Wisconsinites like myself believe this should be an easy call. Seventy-six percent of voters endorse a ban on insider trading by lawmakers, with more Republicans and Independents approving than even Democrats. Bipartisan support from folks like Rep. Kevin McCarthy, R-California, and Sen. Josh Hawley, R-Missouri, exists for Georgia Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff’s legislation to wipe out this corrupt practice. Why won’t Democratic leaders put his bill to a floor vote and show voters we take corruption and all appearances of it seriously?

Unlike some of our current sitting senators, I’m not running for the U.S. Senate because I want to play Gordon Gekko, especially when the job is to serve the public interest. Ideally, sitting congressional members shouldn’t be worried about the bottom lines of their stock portfolio. They should put their holdings into mutual funds and CDs like the rest of us, instead of enriching themselves through positions of power.

But as Business Insider recently confirmed, this isn’t the case. In 2021 alone, 54 members of Congress violated current laws designed to prevent conflict of interests when trading stock. This is unfathomable and should not be accepted by the everyday Americans who are struggling to pay their rent or daily necessities.

Let me put this into other terms.

As we Wisconsinites all know, the Green Bay Packers are the only team in America not owned by billionaires or corporate interests, but by the people. Packers stock is the only stock owned by many Wisconsin families. And Packers stock can’t be traded. I believe this same principle should apply to our members of Congress. As representatives elected by the people, members should not be allowed to make millions — as so many did during the COVID-19 crisis — just like anyone with hypothetical knowledge of a game shouldn’t be allowed to profit. Even if I had known the Packers were going to blow the game against the 49ers, I shouldn’t be allowed to profit off that intel.

I am calling on President Joe Biden to show the same moral compass he exercised on voting rights and refrain from punting on this issue. I am equally calling on Speaker Nancy Pelosi to recognize the fallacies of saying members should be allowed to trade because, “We’re a free market economy.” Members are privy to information that the average Joe does not have, and insisting otherwise only builds on the public belief that we have a rigged economy which benefits only the elites.

Two-thirds of U.S. senators are millionaires (if elected I’d be part of the lonely one-third). We need to push for accountability and to do better.

And finally, I’m calling on Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer to allow the Ossoff legislation to come for a vote to support the end of a form of corruption that has been a slap in the face to working families. If we begin leading on issues like this, we’ll be able to weather the midterm storm and reclaim our rightful mantle as the party of the people.

_– Tom Nelson_

| When I think of my son Boone’s future and of the future of kids in South Carolina, I get worried. McMaster and his cronies are leading us down a path of widespread voter suppression, Charleston flooding, schools as police states, and crumbling infrastructure.

That’s why I love for Boone to watch me campaign, like I watched my father perform his duties as judge when I was a kid. It shows him that there is an alternative, that our leaders can and should care about South Carolinians. My campaign is for the people and by the people — I don’t take a dime from special interests because I want to work for you, not them.

I’m running to raise the minimum wage for the families struggling to make ends meet. I’m running to expand Medicaid to the thousands of South Carolinians who deserve health coverage. And I’m running to fight voter suppression and protect voting rights for everyone.

When I am governor, I’ll use the lessons I learned from my dad to build a stronger, fairer South Carolina for everyone.

Thanks,
Joe

body:
You can tell a lot about a politician by who they spend their time with
#

Hey,
We got some disturbing news today. One of our Democratic opponents has been campaigning with some of Pennsylvania’s most corrupt politicians.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41965238/331081678/-358086307?refcode2=16cd1713-fe90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220218-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmNkMTcxMy1mZTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JusRVyFbowetCDysZB9M5Np90qADlbB-kfBsIATY5Ok=)

body:

| Peter,

There’s a lot going on in the news right now. With attacks on our democracy happening at home and abroad, it is easy to feel burnt out and tired. And, Peter, that is exactly the point.

They want us to be too tired, too resigned to fight back, but we can’t back down. You can count on me to continue to fight for our democracy and deliver on the things North Carolinians need the most.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Signature Gathering Phase 2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0b0f7d3ca27a/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-6833473?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=273f3e02b9&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Friends,

We have had a remarkable February so far. We are more than halfway to our fundraising goal, and our number of volunteers has surpassed 700 as engaged and excited supporters join Team Becky every day!

We are getting ready to make our first submission to the Lt. Governor’s office. To get an accurate count of how many signatures we have so far, we need all those who have gathered signatures to return their current petition, with as many signatures as possible, by March 1.

If you do not have a pre-addressed return envelope, mail your petition to (or drop it off at):
1121 Eaglewood Loop
North Salt Lake, UT
84054
---
|
---
| Once you have returned your current petition, please print a new petition and continue gathering signatures in your neighborhood, at public locations, and events. Print a new petition [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=52f5fc9259&e=10c1db3257).

One of the best ways to collect a high volume of signatures is to go to a public location and talk to crowds. At a downtown location, we recently collected 40 signatures in just an hour! We have [a running list ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=921c8b1e4c&e=10c1db3257)of times and locations where we need your help gathering signatures. Even better, think of your community, find a busy location, and head out with your clipboard.

In addition, if you have not yet signed a packet,[ visit one of our signature gathering booths](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=654d958ed0&e=10c1db3257).

Because we have so many engaged volunteers, we are getting a lot of questions about the signature-gathering process. I sat down with our field director Alisa Mercer to get answers to many of these questions. We have the [highlights saved on Instagram](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a4b445d6d4&e=10c1db3257) and we have an FAQ [on our website](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=c0f2bf3eb7&e=10c1db3257).

The Republican primary is right around the corner and I am confident that with your help we can unseat Mike Lee!

Thank you for your ongoing support.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=181fcd048e&e=10c1db3257)

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: My incredible story of opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I can't help but think about what my grandma would say if she could see the life I lead now.
| | |
---
I have a rare 15-minute gap in my schedule today, friend. I know it doesn't sound like a lot, but free moments have been few and far between recently.
As I sit here drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I decided I need to tell you a story about why I'm running for U.S. Senate.
When I was a little girl, my family didn't have much. I grew up as one of seven siblings, living in a two-room house in Jacksonville, Florida. I went to segregated schools and worked wherever I could – washing dishes or flipping burgers at McDonald's – to help my family get by.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41965590/331083135/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2400-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGY0NmExZi1mZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iErsdt2QTlZDCkrJgHvtOs7Jq7CMpM4OaVXoX9So60I=)
My grandma lived just down the street from my family. She grew up in the Jim Crow South, and she couldn't read or write, so she made an "X" for all her signatures. As a kid, I remember sitting at my grandma's kitchen table writing letters to her sister as she told me what to say.
I can't help but think about what my grandma would say if she could see the life I lead now. She never could have imagined that I would grow up to become Orlando's Chief of Police, a Congressional representative for my home district and a candidate for the U.S. Senate.
Now, I have a chance to deliver better leadership to the people of Florida – and I promise to fight every day to expand opportunities for families like mine. If you believe in my campaign, will you contribute today?
**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41965591/331083136/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2400-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGY0NmExZi1mZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iErsdt2QTlZDCkrJgHvtOs7Jq7CMpM4OaVXoX9So60I=)**
I truly believe that only in America can a little Black girl – the granddaughter of a woman robbed of the chance to learn to read – have such an amazing story of opportunity like mine.
But for too many Americans, my story of opportunity is simply out of reach. I'm running for U.S. Senate to expand opportunities for working families like mine – so that everyone can have a fair chance to reach their own American dream.
My 15 minutes are almost up, so I'll wrap this up with one final thought: This is a historic campaign – and the GOP is trying to stack the cards against me because Marco Rubio and I are neck and neck in the polls. If you believe in this movement to expand opportunities for all Americans, I need you on my side right now.
My finance team told me we need more grassroots donations to win, so I have to ask this: Will you donate $5 right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Senate majority?

Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41965592/331083137/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2400-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGY0NmExZi1mZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iErsdt2QTlZDCkrJgHvtOs7Jq7CMpM4OaVXoX9So60I=)**

Thank you for reading my story,

Congresswoman Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41965593/331083138/1417698435?refcode=jtk2400-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGY0NmExZi1mZjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iErsdt2QTlZDCkrJgHvtOs7Jq7CMpM4OaVXoX9So60I=&emci=ebee6cb7-cf90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=58f46a1f-ff90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

subject: FiveThirtyEight: “The President’s Party Almost Always Has A Bad Midterm”

body:

body:
Hello Team, we have a quick question for you:
Do you support abolishing the Electoral College? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_B2_021822_AC_30D]
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_B2_021822_AC_30D] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-no?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_B2_021822_AC_30D]
Every Republican president since 1988 has been elected without winning the popular vote, all thanks to the Electoral College. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_B2_021822_AC_30D]
It’s the reason Trump took office, and it let him nearly stage a coup in 2021.
It suppresses the vote just as much as the GOP’s latest restrictive laws.
In short, it has to go if we want to save our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_B2_021822_AC_30D]
We’re looking for 34 respondents in Ohio to complete our poll before midnight. Take the next 10 seconds to let us know if you support abolishing the Electoral College.

name: Jessica Mason for Congress
subject: The oath we took
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41965946/331084849/1231953154?refcode=20220218_Mason&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDc4ZjdiZi0wMTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i52ZYiolYcJGFcO2zOEKRJ4AJf2QW75bV4BoDxmaQ0Y=) Hello, friends! My name is Jessica Mason. First and foremost, I’m a daughter of Dallas. South Dallas raised me, and Washington will never change me. I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 30th Congressional District because I know what it’s like to go through the struggles that so many working-class Americans face. Growing up housing insecure and food insecure in a poor Black neighborhood, my community was set up to fail by design. And I was able to escape poverty and complete my college degree by enlisting in the Navy. There is no archetype for what it means to be a veteran. Veterans are diverse and come from a variety of backgrounds and reasons for serving. For me, the Navy was my path to upward mobility. However, one common thread that all service members share is the oath we took to **always __**_“support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic.”_ As a Navy veteran and an active-duty military wife, this is an oath I continue to honor. I’ve dedicated my entire career to public service, and I intend to bring that same service-oriented commitment to Congress. **If elected, I will be the first Black female veteran in Congress.** Having the endorsement of Serve America means so much to me, and I’m grateful to be a part of their coalition to transform Congress. By electing a new generation of leaders from diverse service backgrounds, we can work to build a government that prioritizes the needs and interests of everyday Americans above all else. **My primary election is in just 11 days, and if we’re going to ensure that we elect leaders who reflect our people-first values, I need you in this fight alongside us, friends.** [**Can we count on you to split a donation of $100, $75, or even $50 right away between my campaign and Serve America to help strengthen our mission of electing more service-oriented leaders in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41965947/331084870/1231953154?refcode=20220218_Mason&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDc4ZjdiZi0wMTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i52ZYiolYcJGFcO2zOEKRJ4AJf2QW75bV4BoDxmaQ0Y=) In Solidarity,
Jessica Mason
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-30 clean_body: Since being elected, Ashley Hinson has repeatedly acted against the best interest of Iowans. = Hi Peter, Since being elected, Ashley Hinson has repeatedly acted against the best interest of Iowans. Liz’s opponent has shown time and time again that she doesn’t care about the well-being of Iowa communities. We need to show her that her time is up. Dan has always had my back. He works hard to deliver real results for working families in Michigan. Dan led the fight to lower prescription drug costs, clean up toxic PFAS chemicals, and protect the Great Lakes. Dan also helped deliver billions of dollars to help us fix the damn roads and put Michiganders back to work rebuilding our infrastructure.

But while he’s been working hard for Michigan, national groups have targeted Dan’s seat in the upcoming election.

**That’s why we need to stand with Dan today.[Michigan needs fighters like Dan Kildee in Congress, and I hope you’ll join me in supporting him by making a $15 contribution today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966190/331085513/1546385125?amount=15&contactdata=MHaIkr0ukizCsu0Bagk7KXP7tE90lXlZg3yrc6z5f8611ICLb3%2Bg%2FPLoBF4Iv4vObkMt3yY9w0itjtVH3%2Fb1V334Uw8UfGuYqDNIbkbmjAJMmQsicEcC1SM4k6nBHhd3cQOFqB%2BLXhbPuf8lNOT9SA%3D%3D&refcode2=976f6d17-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=DK_EM_FR_6MO_220218_1_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzZmNmQxNy0wMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KQ_f5iWMhvWjvPvgcHQfZ14iVWK8ByuJ9qjwDgPNLKY=)

clean_body: | = My friend Dan Kildee needs your help, and I hope I can count on you. Dan is now running in a competitive “toss-up” race. He’s facing his toughest re-election fight yet, and there are already opponents joining his race. = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly = = = = =** Dan has always had my back. He works hard to deliver real results for working families in Michigan. Dan led the fight to lower prescription drug costs, clean up toxic PFAS chemicals, and protect the Great Lakes. Dan also helped deliver billions of dollars to help us fix the damn roads and put Michiganders back to work rebuilding our infrastructure. But while he’s been working hard for Michigan, national groups have targeted Dan’s seat in the upcoming election. That’s why we need to stand with Dan today.= = Thank you so much for standing with Dan and Democrats. — Governor Gretchen Whitmer Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States ** **

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Tell Ohio Republicans STOP silencing us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Every vote in the state of Ohio deserves to be counted equally.

Team,
Ohio Republicans are at it again, and this time it’s causing a constitutional crisis in Ohio.
Despite a deadline from the Ohio Supreme Court ordering them to draw new district maps for the state legislature, they refused to pass constitutional maps, opting instead to shirk their duties entirely after having their proposed district maps rejected by the state Supreme Court not once but _**twice**_.
The first two attempts at taking away Ohio’s voice weren’t enough for the GOP to learn their lesson. Ohio Republicans won’t be satisfied until they gerrymander our communities, rig the electoral process, and silence voters who disagree with them statewide.
**[I believe every Ohio voter deserves the right to pick their leaders and feel represented, regardless of what party they belong to. If you agree, I’m asking you to add your name to our petition and tell Republicans to STOP silencing the voices and votes of Ohioans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966219/331085572/-2017588543?ms=nw_em_220218_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220218_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGU2ZDkwMy0wMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QkOZFMPwcyN1jrH3UTD-4wHuDeQpt0YtsLHE876wCM=&emci=40487bef-f290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ede6d903-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24357242)**
Here are the facts: Ohio Republicans are scared. The GOP has spent years putting corporate interests over what constituents need and they know that people around the state are sick and tired of being ignored. I know I am. They’re worried they can’t win without carving up communities and letting corrupt politicians choose their own voters.
Every vote in the state of Ohio deserves to be counted equally. No matter where you live, how much you earn, or what you look like, you deserve to have your voice heard and pick your own representation. This isn’t just what I believe – **it’s a constitutional right that Ohio Republicans are trying to take away from you.**
But instead of supporting this constitutional right and drawing fair maps, the Ohio GOP has opted to thrust the state into constitutional chaos. They’re so dedicated to extreme right-wing gerrymandering they refused to draw districts at all rather than draw ones that aren’t rigged in their favor.
**[Will you sign our petition to stop gerrymandering in Ohio? It’s time to send a message that Republicans need to learn they have to actually earn votes if they want to win, not steal them.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966221/331085575/-2017588543?ms=nw_em_220218_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220218_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGU2ZDkwMy0wMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QkOZFMPwcyN1jrH3UTD-4wHuDeQpt0YtsLHE876wCM=&emci=40487bef-f290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ede6d903-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24357242)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley** **
** **
** **
******[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966222/331085577/-2017588543?ms=nw_em_220218_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220218_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGU2ZDkwMy0wMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QkOZFMPwcyN1jrH3UTD-4wHuDeQpt0YtsLHE876wCM=&emci=40487bef-f290-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ede6d903-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24357242)******

subject: Got a minute, friends? Let's catch up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966248/331085687/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGJjYWM1My0wMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTN5twyTLIozAKG_hq0a_F436129N_-NhBNbl1N1Zzo=&emci=f2f8e6cd-0c90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=48bcac53-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15639879)

Hi team,

We hope this month has been treating you well! It feels like just yesterday we were sending you our January newsletter -- this month was short but busy! Here is an update of what our campaign has been up to in the month of February:

* * *
**Events Roundup:**

**January 26th, Rock County Dems Meeting**

Ann was invited to a meeting held by the Rock County Dems at their headquarters along with other candidates and elected officials running for office, up and down the ballot. One thing these leaders have in common: a shared belief that the people of Wisconsin deserve leaders that put them first. Ann was honored to share with the group what our campaign vision of a Wisconsin that works for _all_ looks like.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966249/331085688/-1782087676?refcode=em22_220218_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGJjYWM1My0wMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTN5twyTLIozAKG_hq0a_F436129N_-NhBNbl1N1Zzo=)
---

**February 3rd, Kenosha Dems**

Ann spoke at the Kenosha Dems monthly meeting and saw the new board get sworn in. She also bumped into Senator Wirch and caught up with him. We are excited to flip this district blue with this team! These are the leaders who will invest in our economy, our small businesses, and who will serve the people in our community. Putting our families first and not politics.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966250/331085689/-1782087676?refcode=em22_220218_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGJjYWM1My0wMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTN5twyTLIozAKG_hq0a_F436129N_-NhBNbl1N1Zzo=)
---

**February 17th, Waukesha Dems Meeting**

Ann attended the Waukesha Dems Monthly Meeting! Speaking with community members across the district is _so important_ because it allows us to hear what the people want and respond to those concerns. Thanks for having us!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966251/331085690/-1425244157?refcode=em22_220218_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGJjYWM1My0wMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTN5twyTLIozAKG_hq0a_F436129N_-NhBNbl1N1Zzo=)
---

**A special district shout out on Saturday Night Live!**

Appleton native Willem Dafoe was on Saturday Night Live, and did a great job representing Wisconsin! But we thought the other cast members' accents could use some work. What did you think? (and **fun fact -- Ann, her husband, and daughter all graduated from Lawrence University in Appleton!**)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966252/331085691/1845121133?t=120&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGJjYWM1My0wMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTN5twyTLIozAKG_hq0a_F436129N_-NhBNbl1N1Zzo=&emci=f2f8e6cd-0c90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=48bcac53-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15639879)
---

* * *

**[We are also going to be having our first campaign fundraiser in Janesville at the end of this month. There are still some tickets left. Click here to secure your place. Hope to see you there!>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966253/331085692/-1495143145?refcode=em22_220218_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGJjYWM1My0wMjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTN5twyTLIozAKG_hq0a_F436129N_-NhBNbl1N1Zzo=)**

subject: read before the holiday weekend:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arballo For Congress P
body:
our democracy is on the line, Peter

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966332/331086129/145944154?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDg1ODA1MC0wMzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wJEUed-4kaaXTi4yJHfxPtTku9TkxsUsxiGAwtwVmA0=)

**The hard truth is, if you're not with us, you're with them.** Just this week, parents showed up in force to recall school board members who would rather spend time renaming schools _than actually letting the students go to school in person._ And this was in San Francisco, one of the most liberal cities in the country. Far left liberals are trying to take over our politics, and it's time to make a choice: Are you with them, or are you with the millions of parents across the country who think enough is enough. We know we are on the right side of history. And if people across the country don't stand up and make themselves heard, they're risking more years of our freedoms being slowly depleted by woke activists. body:
Welcome to Biden’s and Malinowski’s America | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jerseyrizzo/outrage?e=f7e301a8ae)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

**Gas** prices hit the [_highest level in 8 years_](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=b373ca5d2f&e=f7e301a8ae).

**Home** prices [_rose a record 16.9%_](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=ec437b7abd&e=f7e301a8ae).

**Grocery bills**[rose 7.4%](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=55fb5c6934&e=f7e301a8ae) — the highest single year increase _since 1982_!

Friends, this is Joe Biden’s — and Tom Malinowski’s — America. And let me tell you, I’m fed up — and you should be too. This isn’t transitory. It’s not swamp talk. It’s hurting working class families and negatively impacting the lives of New Jerseyeans.

_The decline is SO obvious, even FAKE news CNN and the Washington Post are having to talk about it._

Every day, thanks to Biden and Malinowski, you are paying more for gas, more for groceries, and more for a home. Now, 2 in 5 Millennials [feel](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=cd7de5f7db&e=f7e301a8ae) home ownership will never be a possibility for them. And Boomers agree — over half believe buying a home is more difficult than it was 30 years ago. Unacceptable.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.
---
| [SEND PHIL RIZZO TO WASHINGTON TO FIGHT BACK! ](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=b6bf44ead4&e=f7e301a8ae "SEND PHIL RIZZO TO WASHINGTON TO FIGHT BACK! ")
---
| And you know what won’t defeat the policies that are crushing New Jerseyans? Weak, spineless, go-with-the-flow RINOs who haven’t been your voice for 20 years and have no reason to start now.

Fighting the Left’s machine takes guts. Standing up to Washington bullies takes a spine.

**I’m a fighter and I’m ready to go to bat for YOU.**

The American dream is being stolen from you by the Left and you need someone in your corner.

The Left has their big donors. The establishment has their cronies. I have YOU.

Chip in today so I can take the fight to the establishment first, and then to Washington and the Left.
---
| [SEND A MESSAGE TO RINOS AND THE SWAMP!](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=9fcdd81204&e=f7e301a8ae "SEND A MESSAGE TO RINOS AND THE SWAMP!")
---
| The Left likes to talk about the right side of history. Well, congratulations! We’re on it.

Let’s go!

For New Jersey,
---
|
---
| Phil Rizzo

name: Team Tom
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, February 18th for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
#

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, February 18th, 2022**
Peter,
Team Tom is buzzing as we get closer to Election Day. A little over 4 months to go until the primary, and this campaign is stronger than ever because of supporters like you! Last week, we had our first weekly Grassroots Zoom call where Tom and Shannon were able to speak to our supporters directly and thank them for all of the help that they have given our team.
This weekend, we have another schedule of busy events, and we would love to have you join us! On Sunday, we will be having a meet and greet with Tom and Shannon at Union Craft Brewing in Baltimore. Sign up **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966826/331088496/-2185082?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5MmUxOS0wNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OYNqccnnQPXSs0ghiG_0OetCvEO9iEBV7boJtRWKLw=&emci=0f600442-df90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=32892e19-0691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)** , and join us to toast to our strong grassroots movement that continues to grow across Maryland!
Your support for our campaign is invaluable, and we cannot thank you enough.
Cheers!
Team Tom
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966837/331088517/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5MmUxOS0wNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OYNqccnnQPXSs0ghiG_0OetCvEO9iEBV7boJtRWKLw=&emci=0f600442-df90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=32892e19-0691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
Tom and Shannon continued to crisscross the state this past weekend, meeting Marylanders and sharing their vision of bringing jobs, justice, and opportunity to our state. On Saturday, Tom met with leaders from Prince George’s County at Milk and Honey in College Park, while Shannon had the opportunity to meet strong women leaders from Montgomery County at Coffee Republic in Rockville.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966841/331088537/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5MmUxOS0wNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OYNqccnnQPXSs0ghiG_0OetCvEO9iEBV7boJtRWKLw=&emci=0f600442-df90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=32892e19-0691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966844/331088552/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5MmUxOS0wNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OYNqccnnQPXSs0ghiG_0OetCvEO9iEBV7boJtRWKLw=&emci=0f600442-df90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=32892e19-0691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Later that day, Tom met up with Mayor Patrick Wojahn and Mount Rainier City Councilmember Jarrett Stoltzfus, where they took a bike tour through College Park stopping at some local staples. They enjoyed chatting with Laurie from Proteus Bike shop, eating tacos at Tacos A La Madre, and learning more about Virtual X Kitchen and the Board and Brew.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966851/331088570/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5MmUxOS0wNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OYNqccnnQPXSs0ghiG_0OetCvEO9iEBV7boJtRWKLw=&emci=0f600442-df90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=32892e19-0691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Sunday was another busy day for Tom and Shannon. They started their morning with a service at Redeemers Church of Christ in Lanham. Thank you Pastor Kobby Sarpong and the congregation for allowing Tom and Shannon to join you for worship.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966853/331088579/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5MmUxOS0wNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OYNqccnnQPXSs0ghiG_0OetCvEO9iEBV7boJtRWKLw=&emci=0f600442-df90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=32892e19-0691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
For lunch, Shannon stopped by Kusina Pilipino in Lanham where she was able to try the delicious and fresh pancit. Small businesses are the backbone of our economy, and a Perez/Sneed administration is committed to ensuring small businesses thrive.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966855/331088587/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5MmUxOS0wNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OYNqccnnQPXSs0ghiG_0OetCvEO9iEBV7boJtRWKLw=&emci=0f600442-df90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=32892e19-0691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Rain or shine (or snow!), Tom and Shannon are always out knocking doors and connecting with community members. They had a great Sunday afternoon meeting Marylanders in Lanham.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966857/331088597/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5MmUxOS0wNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OYNqccnnQPXSs0ghiG_0OetCvEO9iEBV7boJtRWKLw=&emci=0f600442-df90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=32892e19-0691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Tuesday, Shannon was honored to attend the anniversary of the Royal Theater in Baltimore, which has been celebrating and preserving Maryland’s Black history for 100 years. She had the great privilege of learning more about one of the most famous and historical theaters for Black entertainment in Baltimore. Some of our country's greatest entertainers including Cab Calloway, Duke Ellington, Louis Armstrong, and more performed at the original theater.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966861/331088606/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5MmUxOS0wNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OYNqccnnQPXSs0ghiG_0OetCvEO9iEBV7boJtRWKLw=&emci=0f600442-df90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=32892e19-0691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
This week, Tom visited UpCounty Hub in Montgomery County for their hygiene drive. Grace Rivera-Oven is a leader in Maryland who has made it her life’s mission to ensure all families in our community have access to life’s basic necessities. We are so grateful for the work her and her staff are doing to better our state.
* * *
**In the News**
**[Matinee at the Royal, Celebrating 100 Years](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966865/331088616/290185311?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5MmUxOS0wNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OYNqccnnQPXSs0ghiG_0OetCvEO9iEBV7boJtRWKLw=&emci=0f600442-df90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=32892e19-0691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
_“The efforts of Mr. Hamlin along with his community partners are also being celebrated by Baltimore City resident, and running mate of gubernatorial candidate Tom Perez, Shannon Sneed. Mrs. Sneed, “We’re the new host city for the CIAA tournament, and we want people to know about great spots like this . We want to preserve places like this all-around Maryland.” _
**[Clarke: Perez and Sneed are top choices for Maryland | READER COMMENTARY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41966869/331088622/-5743710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjg5MmUxOS0wNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OYNqccnnQPXSs0ghiG_0OetCvEO9iEBV7boJtRWKLw=&emci=0f600442-df90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=32892e19-0691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
_“‘Tis the season to choose the partners to lead Maryland effectively into a thriving and inclusive future. I write to recommend Tom Perez for governor and Baltimore’s own Shannon Sneed for lieutenant governor. Both are known for their diligent records of public service and their persistence in achieving positive results. And both represent fresh perspectives on state governance and urgently seek to tackle and resolve the challenges we Marylanders must finally address.”_
* * *
**Schedule of Events**

Saturday, February 19 | 12:00 PM
8151 15th Avenue, Hyattsville, MD

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, February 18th, 2022 Peter, Team Tom is buzzing as we get closer to Election Day. A little over 4 months to go until the primary, and this campaign is stronger than ever because of supporters like you! Last week, we had our first weekly Grassroots Zoom call where Tom and Shannon were able to speak to our supporters directly and thank them for all of the help that they have given our team. This weekend, we have another schedule of busy events, and we would love to have you join us! On Sunday, we will be having a meet and greet with Tom and Shannon at Union Craft Brewing in Baltimore. Sign up , and join us to toast to our strong grassroots movement that continues to grow across Maryland! Your support for our campaign is invaluable, and we cannot thank you enough. Cheers! Team Tom On the Campaign Trail Tom and Shannon continued to crisscross the state this past weekend, meeting Marylanders and sharing their vision of bringing jobs, justice, and opportunity to our state. On Saturday, Tom met with leaders from Prince George’s County at Milk and Honey in College Park, while Shannon had the opportunity to meet strong women leaders from Montgomery County at Coffee Republic in Rockville. Later that day, Tom met up with Mayor Patrick Wojahn and Mount Rainier City Councilmember Jarrett Stoltzfus, where they took a bike tour through College Park stopping at some local staples. They enjoyed chatting with Laurie from Proteus Bike shop, eating tacos at Tacos A La Madre, and learning more about Virtual X Kitchen and the Board and Brew. Sunday was another busy day for Tom and Shannon. They started their morning with a service at Redeemers Church of Christ in Lanham. Thank you Pastor Kobby Sarpong and the congregation for allowing Tom and Shannon to join you for worship. For lunch, Shannon stopped by Kusina Pilipino in Lanham where she was able to try the delicious and fresh pancit. Small businesses are the backbone of our economy, and a Perez/Sneed administration is committed to ensuring small businesses thrive. Rain or shine (or snow!), Tom and Shannon are always out knocking doors and connecting with community members. They had a great Sunday afternoon meeting Marylanders in Lanham. Tuesday, Shannon was honored to attend the anniversary of the Royal Theater in Baltimore, which has been celebrating and preserving Maryland’s Black history for 100 years. She had the great privilege of learning more about one of the most famous and historical theaters for Black entertainment in Baltimore. Some of our country's greatest entertainers including Cab Calloway, Duke Ellington, Louis Armstrong, and more performed at the original theater. This week, Tom visited UpCounty Hub in Montgomery County for their hygiene drive. Grace Rivera-Oven is a leader in Maryland who has made it her life’s mission to ensure all families in our community have access to life’s basic necessities. We are so grateful for the work her and her staff are doing to better our state. In the News “The efforts of Mr. Hamlin along with his community partners are also being celebrated by Baltimore City resident, and running mate of gubernatorial candidate Tom Perez, Shannon Sneed. Mrs. Sneed, “We’re the new host city for the CIAA tournament, and we want people to know about great spots like this . We want to preserve places like this all-around Maryland.” “‘Tis the season to choose the partners to lead Maryland effectively into a thriving and inclusive future. I write to recommend Tom Perez for governor and Baltimore’s own Shannon Sneed for lieutenant governor. Both are known for their diligent records of public service and their persistence in achieving positive results. And both represent fresh perspectives on state governance and urgently seek to tackle and resolve the challenges we Marylanders must finally address.” Schedule of Events Healthcare, Housing, & Hope - CASA Community Panel Discussion feat. Tom Perez Saturday, February 19 | 12:00 PM 8151 15th Avenue, Hyattsville, MD Hosted by CASA in Action Saturday, February 19 | 10:30 AM Virtual Sunday, February 20 | 4:00 PM Union Craft Brewing | Baltimore, MD Tuesday, February 22 | 6:00 PM Ruxton, MD Hosted by Meg & Harry Ferguson Wednesday, February 23 | 7:30 PM Bethesda, MD Hosted by George Cohen Sunday, March 6 | 2:00 PM Frederick, MD Hosted by Tom Slater, Melanie Galloway, Dr. Syed Haque, Dr. Shahid Rafiq, and Marcie Roth Thursday, March 10 | 6:30 PM Silver Branch Brewing, Silver Spring, MD Hosted by Council President Gabe Albornoz, Council Vice President Evan Glass, Elliott Andalman & Martha Bergmark, Carole & Nick Brand, Stanley & Carol Botts, Clayton Cox & Rachel Rauscher, Mary Ellen Flynn, Tony & Toba Hausner, Andrew Kleine, Richard & Kathy Lorr, Mary McClymont, Reemberto Rodriguez, and Ellen Weiss Saturday, March 12 | 5:30 PM Eastern Kabob, Gaithersburg, MD Hosted by the Bangladeshi American Council ** Thursday, March 17 | 7:00 PM Hogan Lovells Solarium | Washington, DC Hosted by Hilary Tompkins** Wednesday, March 30 | 6 PM Virtual Hosted by Bruce Cohen Wednesday, April 27 | 6:00 PM Potomac, MD Hosted by Barbara Goldberg Goldman & Michael Goldman Volunteer with us! The location is no coincidence, folks. They want to have boots on the ground in Charles’ district to try and stop the momentum of our campaign. That’s why it’s so critical that we don’t slow down. The RNC is going to try and convince folks that Madison Cawthorn’s hand-picked candidate is the right person to represent farmers, rural folks, and the Lumbee Tribe.
But Charles grew up the grandson of sharecroppers, he’s a proud member of the Lumbee Tribe, and he’s called Robeson County home his entire life.
He has a firsthand account of the struggles folks in this region are facing – there’s no one more qualified than him to serve here.
We can’t let the proximity of the RNC field office affect our campaign. [**Will you chip in $25 or more to our end-of-month goal and help us show the RNC that their scare tactics aren’t going to work in our neck of the woods?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41967038/331088943/-1554514855?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220218_FR_RNC_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzg5MmUxOS0wNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w6KBE0nJllhPHAfDJguxQyFgvugQqAtbGVd9GAvzXB8=)

clean_body: | | | = Republicans are so intimidated by Charles’ grassroots campaign that the Republican National Committee opened a field office right down the road from our campaign headquarters. The location is no coincidence, folks. They want to have boots on the ground in Charles’ district to try and stop the momentum of our campaign. That’s why it’s so critical that we don’t slow down. = | | | = The RNC is going to try and convince folks that Madison Cawthorn’s hand-picked candidate is the right person to represent farmers, rural folks, and the Lumbee Tribe. But Charles grew up the grandson of sharecroppers, he’s a proud member of the Lumbee Tribe, and he’s called Robeson County home his entire life. He has a firsthand account of the struggles folks in this region are facing – there’s no one more qualified than him to serve here. We can’t let the proximity of the RNC field office affect our campaign. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = – Charles Graham for Congress | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. body:

Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3j29b--fgxr-4qqlpo1&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | **🚨 UPCOMING BATTLEGROUND ELECTION ALERT 🚨**
Patriot,

The **FIRST** election in the race to take back the House is SOON. Like really SOON.

The Corrupt Democrats, like Lame Duck Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Sleepy Joe Biden, and Stacey Abrams, are coming to Texas. We have to stop them.

**[We need you to step up and donate in the first chance to take back the House in 2022 before MIDNIGHT.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3j29b-1z53c-4qqlpo1/ "We need you, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, to step up and donate in the first chance to take back the House in 2022 before MIDNIGHT.")**

---
| | | **Your donation will...**
---
| | | | | [$5 → feed one more volunteer](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3j29b-1z53d-4qqlpo2/ "Generic Button")
---
| | | [$10→ buy a tank of gas to reach an undecided voter](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3j29b-1z53e-4qqlpo3/ "Generic Button")
---
| | | [$15→ put up one more Yard Sign](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3j29b-1z53f-4qqlpo4/ "Generic Button")
---
| | | [$25→ air our TV ads](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3j29b-1z53g-4qqlpo5/ "Generic Button")
---

This FIRST election of 2022 will set the tone for the rest of the year. We can not afford to lose.

Pelosi is dumping tons of dark money from her liberal elitist friends into these races. She is hoping for an easy win.

With your help, we can show her what conservative grassroots support does to an election. **[Chip in any amount you can to show Pelosi that Republican grassroots supporters will WIN back the House Majority>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3j29b-1z53h-4qqlpo6/ "Chip in any amount you can to show Pelosi that Republican grassroots supporters will WIN back the House Majority>>> ")**
---
| | | [CHIP IN HERE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3j29b-1z53i-4qqlpo7/ "Generic Button")
---
Through your donation, we can knock on more doors, make more calls, produce more TV commercials, and reach more undecided voters. Because of YOU we will be able to win back the House majority and send Pelosi packing.

We are sincerely grateful for your support in the fight to win back the house.

Thank you,

Texas Battleground Fund
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3j29b-1z53j-4qqlpo8/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3j29b-1z53k-4qqlpo9/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3j29b-1z53l-4qqlpo0/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

body:
Have you joined yet? Lisa Scheller recently started a group called ‘Lisa’s Leaders’ geared to her top supporters like YOU. Lisa wanted to provide a... Peter, Have you joined yet? Lisa Scheller recently started a group called ‘Lisa’s Leaders’ geared to her top supporters like YOU. Lisa wanted to provide a way for you to help her monthly. name: AlessandraBiaggi.com
subject: Jabari, Samra, Jeremy, Andrew, Pete, Brad, Robert, Rachel, Elijah, Gustavo, Julia, James, and you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
We have some great news, friends:
Today, Alessandra received the endorsements of 12 of her colleagues in the State Senate:
**Jabari Brisport (District 25)
Samra Brouk (District 55)
Jeremy Cooney (District 56)
Andrew Gounardes (District 22)
Pete Harckham (District 40)
Brad Hoylman (District 27)
Robert Jackson (District 31)
Rachel May (District 53)
Elijah Reichlin-Melnick (District 38)
Gustavo Rivera (District 33)
Julia Salazar (District 18)
James Skoufis (District 39)**
Over the past four years, Alessandra has worked alongside these legislators to legalize marijuana, codify Roe v. Wade, pass sweeping tenant protections and groundbreaking climate legislation, and so much more.
And she’s picking up more and more support by the day. Just last week, Alessandra received endorsements from Rep. Jamaal Bowman and NYC Comptroller Brad Lander.
Alessandra is so proud to have the support of her friends and colleagues in state government and beyond — but the truth is that if she is going to win this primary and bring her progressive movement to Congress, she’ll need your support, too.
**[Can you make a contribution of any amount you can afford to join Jabari, Samra, Jeremy, Andrew, Pete, Brad, Robert, Rachel, Elijah, Gustavo, Julia, and James in supporting Alessandra’s campaign for Congress? The contribution itself is more important than the amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-feb/?refcode=em220218-1-15&refcode2=494_59515_eOU7r9&akid=494%2E59515%2EeOU7r9)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-feb/?refcode=em220218-1-15&refcode2=494_59515_eOU7r9&akid=494%2E59515%2EeOU7r9)**
Alessandra is running for Congress because we need more Democrats who won’t back down from tough fights.
But we won’t be able to win in such a crowded primary without supporters like you, so we’re hoping you’ll stand with Alessandra in the months ahead.
All our best,
Team Biaggi

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=494%2E59515%2EeOU7r9).
