name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Session Update Jan 2022 Week 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
---
| | | | | | 2022 Session Update Week 6
---
| VA Delegate John McGuire (Navy SEAL - Father - Business Owner)
---
|
---
| The General Assembly convened on January 12, marking the beginning of the 402nd legislative session of the House of Delegates.
---
| We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live work and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice and fight for you in Richmond. We are now at crossover, which means House bills still alive are being considered in the Senate, and Senate bills still alive are being considered in the House.
---
| Governor Youngkin Promises Kept
---
|
---
| Senate Bill 739 giving parents the choice for their students to wear a mask in school, by Senator Siobhan Dunnavant of Henrico County, was signed by Governor Youngkin. This law goes into effect March 1st!
---
| Success HB 1128
---
|
---
| My bill to reduce taxes on Veteran retirement pay passed the house 98-0 with two Democrats, Helmer and Reid, voting to abstain. The Senate version passed 40-0. The Governor should sign it into law soon. Virginia is currently one of three states that fully tax veteran retirement pay. Fifty percent of retiring veterans move to other states. This bill will help Governor Glenn Youngkin keep his campaign promise, keep more veterans in Virginia, and make Virginia the most veteran friendly state!
---
| HB 108
---
|
---
| This bill says that drug dealers who distribute fentanyl and other controlled substances resulting in a fatal overdose can be charged with homicide. It passed the house 53-46. We have a fatal overdose epidemic in Virginia. I asked everyone on the floor, "How many more Virginians need die before this General Assembly takes seriously the unprecedented health emergency caused by drug traffickers?"
---
| False Mailer on School Choice
---
|
---
| I have and always will vote for school choice. This is easy to confirm online. Unfortunately, an organization named Young Americans for Liberty sent out a completely false mailer saying John McGuire is blocking a critical education freedom bill. They mailed similar mailers, which had negative and false information about a few other reliable Republicans, throughout Virginia. I'm not sure what their agenda is, but misleading fellow conservative voters only helps Democrats advance their radical agenda. Please spread the word!
---
| General Crenshaw
---
|
---
| The Secretary of Veterans and Defense Affairs, General Craig Crenshaw, and the Deputy Secretary of Veterans and Defense Affairs, Jason Pak, stopped by my office to discuss veteran related legislation. My office neighbors, Delegate Buddy Fowler and General Janice Igo, both from Hanover County, were there as well. We are working hard to make Virginia the most veteran friendly state in the country!
---
| Louisa County's Sherman Schifflet Passes Away
---
|
---
| We are praying for the family of Louisa County School Board Member Sherman Shifflett, who recently passed away. We appreciate his many years of positive service to our community. RIP, Sir.
---
| Henrico's Sydney Gunst Passes Away
---
|
---
| I attended a memorial service for Sidney Gunst with his wife, Sheila, family members, Tommy Branin - Three Chopt Supervisor, Pat O'Bannon - Tuckahoe Supervisor, County Manager John Vithoulkas, and other members of the community in Henrico county. The Henrico County Board of Supervisors honored Sydney with a rarely given distinguished community service medal, and they added signs on Cox Road at Insbrook naming it Sidney Gunst Avenue. Sydney was a highly skilled developer who founded Innsbrook, a mixed-use corporate center in Central Virginia in 1979 at age 28. Innsbrook is home to almost 500 businesses and 22,000 employees. Sydney was very active in the community and gave me, as well as many other people, business advice throughout the years. RIP, Sir.
---
| COVID Hypocrisy
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| It is a shame pandemic related policies over the last two years have destroyed families and businesses across the Commonwealth and our country. The mixed messages are ridiculous. On the same day Washington D.C. announced that they are ending vaccine mandates, the U.S. Embassy in the Ukraine told American citizens that they must be vaccinated and present a recommended negative test before fleeing the country. Do you think the thousands of Afghan refugees that flooded our planes during the botched evacuation in Afghanistan had the same strict requirements as Americans citizens fleeing the Ukraine? Meanwhile the Super Bowl had 75,000 people in attendance, with hardly anyone wearing a mask! It's past time to stop peddling fear, end the hypocrisy, and move on with life.
---
| VA Federation of Republican Women Legislative Breakfast
---
|
---
|
---
---
| It was good to see our friend and Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears at the Virginia Federation of Republican Women Legislative Day breakfast. She, along with Governor Glenn Youngkin and Attorney General Jason Miyares, spoke at the breakfast. Thank you, ladies, for all that you do for Virginia! [www.vfrw.org](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJqtnqjjBfMrWLlYvUNrNA5pmKvOyQ5fj8T8QsxrNs0A8k70ez9uKDgs21UDgtddAHad10UqnXt-UNRSkXbNli36RutqDYSZyo5EQySR29wFCXY5aU7fLOvceOdOnYRS5pLIJKVa_n4=&c=JhOUXYNU8YQ4ajmsk9hgQZ8A9xPklzSHPfwbZwnqSABZvdRd2ofB-w==&ch=DsyekBwzvKl1JltpRYTat1EblLfa38OR0_9LmBlaYGZ0JYYRD_hhqA==)
---
| Virginia's Top Cop
---
|
---
| I ran into our Attourney General and Top Cop Jason Miyares on the Capitol Steps. Isn't it great to have an AG who is a real prosecutor, supports our police, and is a strong advocate for victims?
---
| Fox Elementary School
---
|
---
| We are praying for the families and students who are affected by the burning down of this 110 year old elementary school.
---
| 2022 McGuire LEGISLATION

McGuire Legislation as Chief Patron:

* [HB 60](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJqtnqjjBfMrWLlYvUNrNA5pmKvOyQ5fj8T8QsxrNs0A8k70ez9uKB8Wkz-Imr09HoMwNh9ceTl3FPy68y3Jtdi8lW1g6IkWSDywabzHmBZb1pH8MuS6GyETRtr6l79jrOdMFBWmKb0vvL7LZUUTxvg8qWk2fMW4fQcnVnmlrwNhYW7W4vPJE2Hng1fGflMZohkakyOctZI=&c=JhOUXYNU8YQ4ajmsk9hgQZ8A9xPklzSHPfwbZwnqSABZvdRd2ofB-w==&ch=DsyekBwzvKl1JltpRYTat1EblLfa38OR0_9LmBlaYGZ0JYYRD_hhqA==)[ Economic development authority; Town of Louisa may appoint from 5 to 7 members to serve.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJqtnqjjBfMrWLlYvUNrNA5pmKvOyQ5fj8T8QsxrNs0A8k70ez9uKB8Wkz-Imr09HoMwNh9ceTl3FPy68y3Jtdi8lW1g6IkWSDywabzHmBZb1pH8MuS6GyETRtr6l79jrOdMFBWmKb0vvL7LZUUTxvg8qWk2fMW4fQcnVnmlrwNhYW7W4vPJE2Hng1fGflMZohkakyOctZI=&c=JhOUXYNU8YQ4ajmsk9hgQZ8A9xPklzSHPfwbZwnqSABZvdRd2ofB-w==&ch=DsyekBwzvKl1JltpRYTat1EblLfa38OR0_9LmBlaYGZ0JYYRD_hhqA==) This bill passed the floor 99-0. Now headed to the senate.
* [HB 108 Felony homicide; certain drug offenses, penalties.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJqtnqjjBfMrWLlYvUNrNA5pmKvOyQ5fj8T8QsxrNs0A8k70ez9uKB8Wkz-Imr096tWGm6saR7lbJQXzIGGINr0dgZ-WN6T_QmVjD1msS-39rur7fh1pLVrSqYGmWSWqRkQKxu9k7M0lXJkKslbgcvjmhYKbq6nHiSpNsmhJoScrNkoJiPSjzJDcosZ1IQcOGTu1HpMBbto=&c=JhOUXYNU8YQ4ajmsk9hgQZ8A9xPklzSHPfwbZwnqSABZvdRd2ofB-w==&ch=DsyekBwzvKl1JltpRYTat1EblLfa38OR0_9LmBlaYGZ0JYYRD_hhqA==) Passed full courts committee 10-8.
* [HB 358 Veteran-owned small businesses; waiving of fees.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJqtnqjjBfMrWLlYvUNrNA5pmKvOyQ5fj8T8QsxrNs0A8k70ez9uKB8Wkz-Imr09qKx_nzP067qJ5KnG2UyeBTcocxiHV85yl-wzjJ7XKrU4fL2hVHdbzkkLqYqolTtnE-x1FXR2ZrqXbCqyl865KriId5Swmtv2Dck2nAK68_DonSG2f1LuFREBl3cjLqodA6eDStqpdAI=&c=JhOUXYNU8YQ4ajmsk9hgQZ8A9xPklzSHPfwbZwnqSABZvdRd2ofB-w==&ch=DsyekBwzvKl1JltpRYTat1EblLfa38OR0_9LmBlaYGZ0JYYRD_hhqA==) This bill passed the House 97-0 and is headed to the senate.
* [HB 1128 R](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJqtnqjjBfMrWLlYvUNrNA5pmKvOyQ5fj8T8QsxrNs0A8k70ez9uKB8Wkz-Imr09a6oQ78mWll0S6KLhNh-DkTenZPwfLEIc2KQTYuSB9nXemUxQIEEBbyscqM_k0dCWXDbZ2pJxo22IW9zqz7EVY6gfPGawRUG_Ya1QftNwJSso562AR8LprQyh-5L9GecKjDWOk6JaVU8=&c=JhOUXYNU8YQ4ajmsk9hgQZ8A9xPklzSHPfwbZwnqSABZvdRd2ofB-w==&ch=DsyekBwzvKl1JltpRYTat1EblLfa38OR0_9LmBlaYGZ0JYYRD_hhqA==)educes taxes on military retirement pay. 02/11/22 House: Reported from Appropriations (17-Y 0-N)

---
| McGuire Legislation as Chief Co-Patron:

* [HB 4 School principals; incident reports.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJqtnqjjBfMrWLlYvUNrNA5pmKvOyQ5fj8T8QsxrNs0A8k70ez9uKDgs21UDgtdd7NMJpZxmq4jKYuEZpbqP9L4x_00zGPm6P_IHnGx9GPTIV11Iv_I0vhD2WSq1SbkTP0-LxJl4tO_JuDjxdmn2l5krI51cJeMuOA83rMN4Q5zo0ztIOFr-UiDY5xnEb6SOaH_jqF2_Psc=&c=JhOUXYNU8YQ4ajmsk9hgQZ8A9xPklzSHPfwbZwnqSABZvdRd2ofB-w==&ch=DsyekBwzvKl1JltpRYTat1EblLfa38OR0_9LmBlaYGZ0JYYRD_hhqA==) [(Predator Protection Act).](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gJqtnqjjBfMrWLlYvUNrNA5pmKvOyQ5fj8T8QsxrNs0A8k70ez9uKB8Wkz-Imr094ds44EzFlEjTq3eDUErQNQfS5pxu3jsr4TYUStyJGdpvhnc55fLvhvg6Hx1mSknOIubBKV1YUA0sECSdZKSc5i0iYMJ8fyImBGNaoUC42CbP_IvqxvxOky4ysY7CsCCykgSEV5AmYc4=&c=JhOUXYNU8YQ4ajmsk9hgQZ8A9xPklzSHPfwbZwnqSABZvdRd2ofB-w==&ch=DsyekBwzvKl1JltpRYTat1EblLfa38OR0_9LmBlaYGZ0JYYRD_hhqA==) This bill includes HB59 and passed the floor 59-40. Now headed to the senate.

| | |

|

| One of my favorite events each year while in session is the Virginia National Guard Reception. Pictured here is Virginia State Senator Mark Peake, who represents part of Louisa County in House District 56, and my brother, Rusty McGuire, Commonwealth Attorney for Louisa County. Rusty is also a Colonel O-6 in the Virginia National Guard.
---
| Virginia Legislative Education Reception & Dinner
---
|
---
| I attended the Virginia Legislative Education Reception & Dinner in Richmond with our new Secretary of Education Aimee Guidera, Senator Siobhan Dunnavant (Henrico), and other legislators. The Youngkin administration is focusing intently on education, in order to improve access to quality education, and to ensure that all Virginia students have an opportunity to succeed.

| I am committed to adhering to the principal duties of Government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
I look forward to seeing you in the District. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov or 804-698-1056.

| God Bless,

clean_body: | | | | | | 2022 Session Update Week 6 | VA Delegate John McGuire (Navy SEAL - Father - Business Owner) | | The General Assembly convened on January 12, marking the beginning of the 402nd legislative session of the House of Delegates. | We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live work and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice and fight for you in Richmond. We are now at crossover, which means House bills still alive are being considered in the Senate, and Senate bills still alive are being considered in the House. | Governor Youngkin Promises Kept | | Senate Bill 739 giving parents the choice for their students to wear a mask in school, by Senator Siobhan Dunnavant of Henrico County, was signed by Governor Youngkin. This law goes into effect March 1st! | Success HB 1128 | | My bill to reduce taxes on Veteran retirement pay passed the house 98-0 with two Democrats, Helmer and Reid, voting to abstain. The Senate version passed 40-0. The Governor should sign it into law soon. Virginia is currently one of three states that fully tax veteran retirement pay. Fifty percent of retiring veterans move to other states. This bill will help Governor Glenn Youngkin keep his campaign promise, keep more veterans in Virginia, and make Virginia the most veteran friendly state! | HB 108 | | This bill says that drug dealers who distribute fentanyl and other controlled substances resulting in a fatal overdose can be charged with homicide. It passed the house 53-46. We have a fatal overdose epidemic in Virginia. I asked everyone on the floor, "How many more Virginians need die before this General Assembly takes seriously the unprecedented health emergency caused by drug traffickers?" | False Mailer on School Choice | | I have and always will vote for school choice. This is easy to confirm online. Unfortunately, an organization named Young Americans for Liberty sent out a completely false mailer saying John McGuire is blocking a critical education freedom bill. They mailed similar mailers, which had negative and false information about a few other reliable Republicans, throughout Virginia. I'm not sure what their agenda is, but misleading fellow conservative voters only helps Democrats advance their radical agenda. Please spread the word! | General Crenshaw | | The Secretary of Veterans and Defense Affairs, General Craig Crenshaw, and the Deputy Secretary of Veterans and Defense Affairs, Jason Pak, stopped by my office to discuss veteran related legislation. My office neighbors, Delegate Buddy Fowler and General Janice Igo, both from Hanover County, were there as well. We are working hard to make Virginia the most veteran friendly state in the country! | Louisa County's Sherman Schifflet Passes Away | | We are praying for the family of Louisa County School Board Member Sherman Shifflett, who recently passed away. We appreciate his many years of positive service to our community. RIP, Sir. | Henrico's Sydney Gunst Passes Away | | I attended a memorial service for Sidney Gunst with his wife, Sheila, family members, Tommy Branin - Three Chopt Supervisor, Pat O'Bannon - Tuckahoe Supervisor, County Manager John Vithoulkas, and other members of the community in Henrico county. The Henrico County Board of Supervisors honored Sydney with a rarely given distinguished community service medal, and they added signs on Cox Road at Insbrook naming it Sidney Gunst Avenue. Sydney was a highly skilled developer who founded Innsbrook, a mixed-use corporate center in Central Virginia in 1979 at age 28. Innsbrook is home to almost 500 businesses and 22,000 employees. Sydney was very active in the community and gave me, as well as many other people, business advice throughout the years. RIP, Sir. | COVID Hypocrisy | | | | It is a shame pandemic related policies over the last two years have destroyed families and businesses across the Commonwealth and our country. The mixed messages are ridiculous. On the same day Washington D.C. announced that they are ending vaccine mandates, the U.S. Embassy in the Ukraine told American citizens that they must be vaccinated and present a recommended negative test before fleeing the country. Do you think the thousands of Afghan refugees that flooded our planes during the botched evacuation in Afghanistan had the same strict requirements as Americans citizens fleeing the Ukraine? Meanwhile the Super Bowl had 75,000 people in attendance, with hardly anyone wearing a mask! It's past time to stop peddling fear, end the hypocrisy, and move on with life. | VA Federation of Republican Women Legislative Breakfast | | | It was good to see our friend and Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears at the Virginia Federation of Republican Women Legislative Day breakfast. She, along with Governor Glenn Youngkin and Attorney General Jason Miyares, spoke at the breakfast. Thank you, ladies, for all that you do for Virginia! == | Virginia's Top Cop | | I ran into our Attourney General and Top Cop Jason Miyares on the Capitol Steps. Isn't it great to have an AG who is a real prosecutor, supports our police, and is a strong advocate for victims? | Fox Elementary School | | We are praying for the families and students who are affected by the burning down of this 110 year old elementary school. | 2022 McGuire LEGISLATION McGuire Legislation as Chief Patron: == This bill passed the floor 99-0. Now headed to the senate. == Passed full courts committee 10-8. == This bill passed the House 97-0 and is headed to the senate. taxes on military retirement pay. 02/11/22 House: Reported from Appropriations (17-Y 0-N) | McGuire Legislation as Chief Co-Patron: == == This bill includes HB59 and passed the floor 59-40. Now headed to the senate. == == This bill includes my bill HB 187 and is headed to the senate. == * == | McGuire Legislation as Co-Patron: == for list | Speaker's Bible Study | | Governor Youngkin led Bible Study this week. Attendance is growing. God is good! | National Guard Dinner | Virginia Tech Corps of Cadets Visit | | I always enjoy meeting great Americans like these! The Virginia Tech Corps of Cadets stopped by to visit me. Thank you for all that you do to prepare our young people to be future leaders of America. | Goochland GOP | | This week I gave a legislative update in Goochland. This is my 5th year representing Goochland in the General Assembly. | Rural Caucus | | I attended the last Rural Caucus this session. Thank you to everyone who supports Rural Virginia. | | | | Virginia National Guard Reception | | One of my favorite events each year while in session is the Virginia National Guard Reception. Pictured here is Virginia State Senator Mark Peake, who represents part of Louisa County in House District 56, and my brother, Rusty McGuire, Commonwealth Attorney for Louisa County. Rusty is also a Colonel O-6 in the Virginia National Guard. | Virginia Legislative Education Reception & Dinner | | I attended the Virginia Legislative Education Reception & Dinner in Richmond with our new Secretary of Education Aimee Guidera, Senator Siobhan Dunnavant (Henrico), and other legislators. The Youngkin administration is focusing intently on education, in order to improve access to quality education, and to ensure that all Virginia students have an opportunity to succeed. | CTE Caucus | | I attended the CTE Caucus and enjoyed presentations on Code Virginia, Computer Science, The Virginia Association of Career and Technical Education, and Developing Virginia's Aviation and Aerospace Workforce. | Henrico GOP Breakfast | | I hope you will stop by the Henrico GOP Breakfast tomorrow, especially if I have not seen you in awhile. name: BREAKING NEWS (via Tom Perez for Maryland)
subject: Baltimore Sun: “Clarke: Perez and Sneed are top choices for Maryland”
body:
Check this out >>

**Take a look at this headline from the _Baltimore Sun_ :**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41967433/331090507/1691752261?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220218-BaltimoreSunRR-ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTRlY2UxMC0wODkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6HdK3Pgqezf6LkLpeDsgkgCXmYAk95TCaoEWk0KjzjM=)
**Tom and Shannon’s momentum is growing, but they need your help to stay on track toward our February fundraising deadline!

[Will you rush a $5 donation to help sustain our momentum?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41967434/331090508/1691752261?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220218-BaltimoreSunRR-ND&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTRlY2UxMC0wODkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6HdK3Pgqezf6LkLpeDsgkgCXmYAk95TCaoEWk0KjzjM=)**

Hi Team,

Big news! This morning, former 32-year member and two-time president of the Baltimore City Council, Mary Pat Clarke, urged Marylanders to support Tom and Shannon in the Democratic primary for Governor, and here’s why:
→ Like us, she **sees** Tom and Shannon’s dedicated record of public service and commitment to delivering positive results for Marylanders
→ Like us, she **knows** that Tom and Shannon will show up on Day 1 ready to tackle long-neglected problems facing Maryland families
→ And like us, she **believes** in Tom and Shannon’s ability to put equity first and restore the partnership of city and state Baltimore needs and expects.

One thing’s for sure: the GOP doesn’t understand that people-powered movements in this state have been building power for years. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQhF_HHr7R5OkEDrc_ZkrefCrVUEBYJfvpE7AJnvYKHkD-wI4muY3Hf8XDSeYkzksM-0hM8OVp7TtLxKhNIcWK2H1TlQkIDwrrHa8AmcpbVK4ZAEeQQifpfk6t7Mvd873vAmNFu594aBumqEYGuDGhqnPDM3PZuxjd0n6wODpPtcZS5QewxYANbTVbqYNadySF2DwiUIKZTCRf_yLBwOOdh3Lv_tAWFAyT-lFS6AakZ6k/3jo/d0Bgb6qLRcGgRGlS_3T9jQ/h0/PaqD1kUjs6TjPPhkllh4e_gb1MozHxGeuLEUdGvqpHY) Peter, When Tennessee House Republicans approved the redistricting plan that cracks Nashville into three congressional districts, the fight for progressive change in Tennessee got tougher — but we're not giving up. [**_If you’re with us, will you consider pitching in $3 to help keep up our momentum?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEi8XvSevzzohwwJ20VROcW8nq5rKdT2XhMKYMp9PjZL7EQkjifGV0RKAUivkfrmqR9qWldgtmNMOtZiWud1tu7ewwsKSDhqImhTALi5naq0ogxrDWThnWK7TxWyTPtxIF_MFYiICeZlxVBXir_e7spQvsW3TKCtUqbTY_tt9vd_WBdFOrSX6sUzF9yHKuCE4IdJyxW52vsIkqggz8bkEIwtX5__OFcwaaMA_m1eGnTvugbQggQnaxgm03yPf_9bpDR-pXVem7_7JLh0VsI-qfYr4Py12X-WixOyfGqx9kq6TIbyV9YTZFrb54ICE-TxRY8/3jo/d0Bgb6qLRcGgRGlS_3T9jQ/h1/nHckvhYb3-FPeZUCihE9qwWndV3CELSj2G6LkjRxKqs)
One thing’s for sure: the GOP doesn’t understand that people-powered movements in this state have been building power for _years_. **Our movement for working people isn’t going anywhere.** But we’d be lying if we said the new maps don’t present challenges — there’s more ground to cover, new voters to reach, and new opponents to fight. Here’s just some of what it’ll take to bring progressive change to Tennessee and win a red-to-blue seat:
* Training organizers who can directly reach out to voters in all parts of the new districts — urban, suburban, and rural alike
* Printing materials like mailers, campaign posters, and signs
* Affording gas and bus rentals to travel across the new districts
* Hiring key campaign staff to expand capacity
* Acquiring digital tools to reach thousands of Tennesseans
* Providing PPE for staff and volunteers
* And so much more

Working class Tennesseans deserve to have another organizer in Congress to fight like hell for our future. And if you’re with us, your support today will help demonstrate to the GOP that our voices — and votes — cannot be silenced. _If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your clean_body: One thing’s for sure: the GOP doesn’t understand that people-powered movements in this state have been building power for years. | | | Peter, When Tennessee House Republicans approved the redistricting plan that cracks Nashville into three congressional districts, the fight for progressive change in Tennessee got tougher — but we're not giving up. One thing’s for sure: the GOP doesn’t understand that people-powered movements in this state have been building power for years. Our movement for working people isn’t going anywhere. But we’d be lying if we said the new maps don’t present challenges — there’s more ground to cover, new voters to reach, and new opponents to fight. Here’s just some of what it’ll take to bring progressive change to Tennessee and win a red-to-blue seat: Training organizers who can directly reach out to voters in all parts of the new districts — urban, suburban, and rural alike Printing materials like mailers, campaign posters, and signs Affording gas and bus rentals to travel across the new districts Hiring key campaign staff to expand capacity Acquiring digital tools to reach thousands of Tennesseans Providing PPE for staff and volunteers * And so much more Working class Tennesseans deserve to have another organizer in Congress to fight like hell for our future. And if you’re with us, your support today will help demonstrate to the GOP that our voices — and votes — cannot be silenced. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you for your support, Odessa Kelly HQ | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

| | Dear Fellow American, American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you’ve even seen this happening in your local schools. As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats? Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation’s history? We must insist on the **latter** , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America’s future. For this reason, we have produced the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** —and I’m writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide. **What is the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum? ** The**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College—and we are making it available **free of charge**. To be clear, the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** is not a _slap-dash_ response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children. It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844. And we need your help to make the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available **free of charge** so that it will have the greatest impact. _We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote the**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** and our other outreach efforts—including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. _ That’s an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible. One reason why your support really matters: **Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans**. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you—citizens who agree with Hillsdale’s mission on behalf of liberty. We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale’s 177-year-old mission—to provide “sound learning” of the kind needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.” With that mission in mind, we produced the **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** —and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. Will you take this opportunity to _**support the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?**_ Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty—and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty—I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today. **I’ve included a secure link for your convenience here: ** _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147677&L=79012&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtaGlsbHNkYWxlLTE3NzYtY3VycmljdWx1bT91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTE3NzZfY3VycmljdWx1bSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9LZWxsaVdhcmQwMjIwMjIxNzc2JnNjPU1LMTAyMUVNMg==)**_ Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Fellow American,

**We're doing something BIG.**

We're hosting an amazing contest, and one lucky winner from Team Herschel will win a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

On March 2, President Donald J. Trump and I are hosting the first annual "Great American Invitational" golf tournament in Palm Beach, and we're giving away one spot to a lucky winner!

In addition to winning a round of golf at President Trump's amazing International Golf Club, our winner will also win the following:
* Photo with President Trump and me.
* Admission to the awards luncheon.
* A commemorative hat signed by President Trump and me.
* Limited edition tournament shirt.
* Roundtrip airfare, ground transportation, and accommodations for one night

Donald J. Trump February 17th, 2022
So, Crooked Hillary Clinton, one of the most corrupt politicians ever to run for President, can break into the White House, my apartment, buildings I own, and my campaign—in other words, she can spy on a Presidential candidate and ultimately, the President of the United States—and the now totally discredited Fake News Media does everything they can not to talk about it. On the other hand, failed Gubernatorial candidate, Letitia James, can run for the office of AG on saying absolutely horrendous and false things about Donald Trump, a man she doesn’t know and has never met, go on to get elected, and then selectively prosecute him and his family. After viewing millions of pages of documents over many years, they come up with a “Fringe Benefits” case on a car, an apartment, and on grandchildren’s education. She is doing everything within their corrupt discretion to interfere with my business relationships, and with the political process. With the rest of the case, even Cy Vance, who just left the DA’s office without prosecuting anything additional, because there isn’t anything additional to prosecute—THERE IS NO CASE! The targeting of a President of the United States, who got more votes while in office than any President in History, by far, and is a person that the Radical Left Democrats don’t want to run again, represents an unconstitutional attack on our Country—and the people will not allow this travesty of justice to happen. It is a continuation of the greatest Witch Hunt in history—and remember, I can’t get a fair hearing in New York because of the hatred of me by Judges and the judiciary. It is not possible!

Donald J. Trump February 17th, 2022
Endorsement of Wesley Hunt
Wesley Hunt will be a great Congressman for Texas’ new 38th Congressional District! A West Point graduate, who bravely flew Apache helicopters in combat, Wesley served our Nation with honor. name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew?=
subject: Imagine No House Freedom Caucus
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# _**IMAGINE NO FREEDOM HOUSE CAUCUS**_
---
| Patriots,

Have you ever stopped and considered what our politics and our country would look like if there was no House Freedom Caucus?

Establishment-favorite John Boehner might still be the Republican leader. Amnesty would remain the de facto Republican policy position on immigration. Billions in wasteful spending would consistently pass without a single recorded vote. The Russia collusion hoax may have never been exposed. And gutless Beltway insiders would ignore the integrity of our elections and radical Critical Race Theory being taught to our children.

The Left’s march through our institutions, aided by a feckless GOP establishment, would continue unimpeded with **no one fighting back against their tyranny** and giving voice to the millions of freedom-loving Americans across our nation.

That bleak scenario is exactly what we’re facing at the state level. And it’s precisely why the State Freedom Caucus Network (SFCN) was created.

Even in deeply red states, conservative lawmakers find themselves outgunned and outmanned by long-time establishment Republicans dedicated to preserving their power and doling out political favors instead of protecting their constituents from the radicalism of today’s Democrat party.

The State Freedom Caucus Network is modeling the success of the House Freedom Caucus to bring an end to the establishment’s stranglehold on our state legislatures and finally push conservative policies across the finish line. But **we need your help to succeed.**

All too often, the political focus remains on the day-to-day happenings in our nation’s capital when critical cultural and political battles are being waged much closer to home with far more immediate consequences. These state-level battles **must be won if freedom is to be preserved.**
---
| Since the State Freedom Caucus Network officially launched in December 2021, freedom caucuses have already taken off in both the Georgia and Mississippi legislature with additional states soon to be announced.

We are methodically building an operation to equip conservative state lawmakers with the high-level staff, resources, strategy, and community they need to transform state legislatures into conservative policy powerhouses to defeat the radical Left and keep Americans prosperous, secure, and free.

This work is vital.

The House Freedom Caucus has fundamentally changed the equation in Washington D.C. and the American people finally have champions who give voice to their cause at the federal level. We now need those same champions in every state capital across the nation.
**Will you consider helping our efforts? Even $10, $25, $50 will make a huge difference for our efforts to expand the fight for freedom to your state legislature!**
---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=4790f6c3f9&e=64ecec6d03 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE")
---
| **Thanks to your help and your commitment to the ideas that have made America the indispensable nation, we know we will win.

Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth
President, State Freedom Caucus Network**
---
| |
### Find Your Local Representative
### SFCN is committed to building the army we need to win.
---
| [ ](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=2c26ea50c2&e=64ecec6d03)
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 State Freedom Caucus Network, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
State Freedom Caucus Network300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003-1021
[Add us to your address book](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=da5d5ac349) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=7256df9da1&e=64ecec6d03&c=da5d5ac349).
---

name: Charles Booker
subject: What you deserve, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

I want to tell you something,
Peter:

You deserve great healthcare.

You deserve to not live in poverty.

You deserve fully funded public schools. You deserve quality housing,
clean air, clean water, and internet. You deserve safe roads and bridges
to walk on and drive over. You deserve rapid public transit. And you
deserve justice and community safety.

But far too many of our politicians and lawmakers believe that asking for
these things, or even wanting them to begin with, is radical.

What a joke.

So many lawmakers in Kentucky ignore us and tell us that we’re not
deserving of these things. They say that wanting to feel safe and cared
for — to lead a dignified life — is radical. All while they turn their
backs on us to make themselves richer, more powerful, and more corrupt.

Look. I’ve lived in poverty. I’ve been unhoused. I’ve lost family members
to gun violence. I am still paying off my student loans. And I know that
when our politicians ignore our struggles, or wave them off as “radical” —
our pain only continues.

Peter, that’s
exactly why I’m running for Senate. Because something has to change. And I
know that together, we have the power to change the future of Kentucky.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220218?refcode=em20220218-1583&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1583_346206_01ej24&akid=1583%2E346206%2E01ej24 ]If you’re with me — if you’re with us — please chip in
$5 to our campaign today.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220218?refcode=em20220218-1583&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=1583_346206_01ej24&akid=1583%2E346206%2E01ej24 ]Contribute $5

Thank you,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220218-1583-footer&t=1021&refcode2=1583_346206_01ej24&akid=1583%2E346206%2E01ej24

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1583%2E346206%2E01ej24

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

subject: Fast Facts Friday

body:
|
---
### **\- INDems Celebrates The Jobs Act’s Investment for Grand Calumet River, Frank J. Mrvan Delivers Again for Hoosiers -**
Democrats celebrated [The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act’s](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968015/331092948/1107218545?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) announcement to clean up the Grand Calumet River in Northwest Indiana. [According to a release by the Environmental Protection Agency](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968016/331092949/1995524457?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535), the river is an “area of concern” and The Jobs Act will fulfill its commitment to revitalize water infrastructure systems - like the Grand Calumet River - across Indiana: President Joe Biden and Congressman Frank Mrvan made a promise to solve some of today’s biggest kitchen-table issues facing voters in Northwest Indiana – and they delivered on that very promise. Now, Hoosier families will have access to cleaner, safer water across Lake County. **In contrast, not one Indiana Republican in Congress supported The Jobs Act.** Despite GOP [U.S. Senator Rob Portman confirming this infrastructure law would combat inflation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968017/331092950/-710919159?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535), Indiana Republicans like Todd Young voted “NO” - putting their culture wars and partisanship ahead of a brighter future for Hoosier families.
### **\- What’s the INGOP’s Plan to Fight Inflation? Nothing. -**
Indiana Democrats called on the Indiana Republican Party to announce their plans to address [global inflation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968018/331092952/-960528490?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) in the Hoosier State. President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats have focused on delivering the kitchen-table issues that matter most to voters - including the fight [against global inflation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968020/331092953/-960528490?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) \- but it appears the Indiana GOP cares more about their culture wars than producing results. **_Not a single Indiana Republican has come up with a legitimate solution to address inflation._** The Indiana Republican Party’s strategy is similar to their decade-long attack on the Affordable Care Act, where Republicans voted to repeal the health care law (dozens of times) [without producing any alternative plan themselves](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968022/331092955/-2146524063?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535). So, just like their culture wars at the statehouse - the Indiana GOP is pursuing a national partisan strategy for short-term, electoral gain. Here are the facts: Republicans like [U.S. Senator Rob Portman](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968023/331092956/-710919159?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) and [more than 56 economists](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968025/331092958/-1238167972?u=90379082c3d9e6a03baf3f677&id=c8fcf2d175&e=5168c6b8af&refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) agree that Democrats’ economic agenda - including [The Jobs Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968027/331092960/1107218545?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) and the Build Back Better Act - will ease the burden current inflationary measures have on families. The Biden Administration also announced plans to strengthen the nation’s supply chains and address key bottlenecks by passing legislation like the [COMPETES Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968028/331092961/-1689549134?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535). Every single Indiana Republican in the U.S. House voted [“NO”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968029/331092963/-1689549134?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) on this opportunity.
### **\- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Continues -**
It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. To do that, Indiana Democrats will also begin its biennial tradition of approving a party platform that includes all voices across the state. **_Hearing dates and locations are available below._** Please take a look at a draft of the Indiana Democratic Party’s 2022 Platform, [“The Hoosier Promise” ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968031/331092964/-1920848487?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535)and consider submitting your suggestions online. Your ideas are valued and important and we’d like to craft a strong platform – with your help – and spread the news across the state during this critical election year.
### **\- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring -**
**War Room Director** The Indiana Democratic Party seeks a War Room Director to build an innovative program to hold the Indiana Republican Party accountable and inform and educate Hoosier voters year in and year out. A mix between rapid response and lead researcher, the director will work with the IDP team to push back against misinformation, disinformation, and conspiracy theories so all Hoosiers have the freedom to make better and informed decisions on the issues facing our state and country. **Voter File Administrator** The Indiana Democratic Party seeks a Voter File Administrator (VFA) to work on our data team to better serve candidates, committees, and local parties as we seek to build a stronger Democratic Party in the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategy, technology, and voter targeting and contact. IDP is making strides on this front and we want to add to our team with this important role. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at [https://www.indems.org/jobs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968033/331092966/1076440731?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535)
### **\- Indiana Democratic Party Seeking Interns -**
The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. _Benefits_
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

_Intern Duties_ Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

_Qualifications_ Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

**_How to Apply_** Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org.
## **\- Opportunities -**
### **\- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Rochester -**
[Saturday, February 26](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968035/331092967/-2105029623?refcode=idp-em-220218-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY2YTM0YS0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5dcWtDVRXENi8FfH7NNALOi5M3f6BzViu6CtAltiR0=&emci=572be0f2-0291-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e366a34a-0a91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535), 2 - 3:30pm EST
### **\- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Statewide Virtual #1 -**

clean_body: | \- INDems Celebrates The Jobs Act’s Investment for Grand Calumet River, Frank J. Mrvan Delivers Again for Hoosiers - Democrats celebrated announcement to clean up the Grand Calumet River in Northwest Indiana. , the river is an “area of concern” and The Jobs Act will fulfill its commitment to revitalize water infrastructure systems - like the Grand Calumet River - across Indiana: President Joe Biden and Congressman Frank Mrvan made a promise to solve some of today’s biggest kitchen-table issues facing voters in Northwest Indiana – and they delivered on that very promise. Now, Hoosier families will have access to cleaner, safer water across Lake County. In contrast, not one Indiana Republican in Congress supported The Jobs Act. Despite GOP , Indiana Republicans like Todd Young voted “NO” - putting their culture wars and partisanship ahead of a brighter future for Hoosier families. \- What’s the INGOP’s Plan to Fight Inflation? Nothing. - Indiana Democrats called on the Indiana Republican Party to announce their plans to address in the Hoosier State. President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats have focused on delivering the kitchen-table issues that matter most to voters - including the fight \- but it appears the Indiana GOP cares more about their culture wars than producing results. Not a single Indiana Republican has come up with a legitimate solution to address inflation. The Indiana Republican Party’s strategy is similar to their decade-long attack on the Affordable Care Act, where Republicans voted to repeal the health care law (dozens of times) . So, just like their culture wars at the statehouse - the Indiana GOP is pursuing a national partisan strategy for short-term, electoral gain. Here are the facts: Republicans like and agree that Democrats’ economic agenda - including and the Build Back Better Act - will ease the burden current inflationary measures have on families. The Biden Administration also announced plans to strengthen the nation’s supply chains and address key bottlenecks by passing legislation like the . Every single Indiana Republican in the U.S. House voted on this opportunity. \- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Continues - It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. To do that, Indiana Democrats will also begin its biennial tradition of approving a party platform that includes all voices across the state. Hearing dates and locations are available below. Please take a look at a draft of the Indiana Democratic Party’s 2022 Platform, consider submitting your suggestions online. Your ideas are valued and important and we’d like to craft a strong platform – with your help – and spread the news across the state during this critical election year. \- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring - War Room Director The Indiana Democratic Party seeks a War Room Director to build an innovative program to hold the Indiana Republican Party accountable and inform and educate Hoosier voters year in and year out. A mix between rapid response and lead researcher, the director will work with the IDP team to push back against misinformation, disinformation, and conspiracy theories so all Hoosiers have the freedom to make better and informed decisions on the issues facing our state and country. Voter File Administrator The Indiana Democratic Party seeks a Voter File Administrator (VFA) to work on our data team to better serve candidates, committees, and local parties as we seek to build a stronger Democratic Party in the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategy, technology, and voter targeting and contact. IDP is making strides on this front and we want to add to our team with this important role. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at \- Indiana Democratic Party Seeking Interns - The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field. We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school. Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects Qualifications Applicants must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed able to work on multiple tasks at once How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. \- Opportunities - \- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Rochester - , 2 - 3:30pm EST \- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Statewide Virtual #1 - h, 6 - 7:30 PM EST \- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Statewide Virtual #2 - , 6 - 7:30 PM EST \- Indiana Stonewall Democrats Community Fundraiser - , 6 - 8:00pm EST ### | | | = | = [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968185/331093379/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJkNTQwMC0wYjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqV_yvGlTK5tGRD7IHhMoh-_OPsV_YMsfhNElVqEUgY=&emci=bc45d4b4-ed90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=18bd5400-0b91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12898431)

Friend,
The GOP-controlled state legislature has set in motion **another wave of election-related bills that are even more restrictive** than the ones passed last year. Most of these bills are based on radical conspiracy theories centered around their belief the 2020 election was stolen.
[**Kirsten is fighting to _protect_ our democracy and Arizonans' right to vote**.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968186/331093380/2089498197?refcode=X_021822_VoterRestriction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJkNTQwMC0wYjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqV_yvGlTK5tGRD7IHhMoh-_OPsV_YMsfhNElVqEUgY=) [**Will you stand by her by chipping in _anything_ you can today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968187/331093381/416963966?refcode=X_021822_VoterRestriction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJkNTQwMC0wYjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqV_yvGlTK5tGRD7IHhMoh-_OPsV_YMsfhNElVqEUgY=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968188/331093382/2089498197?refcode=X_021822_VoterRestriction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJkNTQwMC0wYjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqV_yvGlTK5tGRD7IHhMoh-_OPsV_YMsfhNElVqEUgY=)
---
Let’s not forget that these are the same Arizona Republicans who ordered a $5 million dollar audit in an attempt to legitimize Trump's false claims of voter fraud. It's no secret that GOP leaders like Kelly Townsend want to silence our votes with bills like...
**SB 1056** , _**which**_ _** would impose misdemeanor criminal charges on anyone who “misplaces” a ballot. **_
**SB 1055** , _**which**_ _** **__**would impose misdemeanor criminal penalties on contractors providing election-related equipment for “maliciously” tampering with ballots or failing to reject mail-in ballots without signatures.**_
And now Kelly Townsend is running for Congress, where she could do even more harm to voting rights. Don't let politicians like Kelly Townsend silence your vote. By supporting Kirsten, you can help stand up for the democratic rights of everyday Arizonans!
[**Can we count on you to join our fight to protect voting rights by chipping in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968189/331093383/2089498197?refcode=X_021822_VoterRestriction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJkNTQwMC0wYjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqV_yvGlTK5tGRD7IHhMoh-_OPsV_YMsfhNElVqEUgY=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968190/331093384/416963966?refcode=X_021822_VoterRestriction&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJkNTQwMC0wYjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqV_yvGlTK5tGRD7IHhMoh-_OPsV_YMsfhNElVqEUgY=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41968191/331093385/41694283?refcode=X_021822_VoterRestrictionrecurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJkNTQwMC0wYjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqV_yvGlTK5tGRD7IHhMoh-_OPsV_YMsfhNElVqEUgY=)

| | 🚨 **ENDORSEMENT ALERT** 🚨
We the People's campaign for Governor has received the endorsement of [Stand for Health Freedom](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=87f489021f&e=fe4b890356), a grassroots organization dedicated to medical freedom and ENDING VACCINE MANDATES!

Why are they getting involved in our race? Because they know that **I WILL NEVER BACK DOWN** on defending healthcare freedom and will **ALWAYS** protect the constitutional rights of Michigan citizens.
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=87e40e29b7&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [**_Click here to read Stand for Health Freedom's full endorsement and watch my interview with their Executive Director Leah Wilson._**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=8c111d0812&e=fe4b890356)
The momentum behind our campaign is growing, folks, and we can feel it at every Meet & Greet and every event we attend across our beloved state.
_“**Eternal vigilance is the price of liberty; power is ever stealing from the many to the few." **-**** Wendell Phillips_
This moment that we're in as a state and as a nation requires all who love freedom to **TAKE ACTION** to get our liberty back and restore a government where power belongs to **WE THE PEOPLE!**

[**Celebrate this HUGE endorsement by chipping in $50, $25, $10 or even just a few bucks and help build on this momentum -->**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=210b00ce7a&e=fe4b890356)

body:

[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsg9321p49thbfgdcv971is8j15un605825h6qn0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9cjl69q66ddn6jjm6d1jcljj4phm6iq60ttjejgr2t72cdi32pj6e5q33chn61jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9ddhcupb6phlcipm4ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgmaoj2cpgm8ob24no)

subject: I’m in danger.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zsgjiamvqgllt6d75hm841ht7e6t843ig4anegv8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpr1pjiecob6stge6oj0o72clr71dr2cspbdc9im3gm2pr36hhj1chl6donecrn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6lj39o5jcorr4cb666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5im4oj6c5i6aoh5u)
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z668opcahvct6ma7fsidms7s3rha3lj99jdf8kb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9h6cob4clh2bs)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **
| | [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $500 DONATION](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2znanhh8ufah4bt5d2chl7f9ar8s0cpuulelvoimg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5c9h6cob4clh2bs)

God Bless you and your generosity,

name: Clay Aiken
subject: YMCA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
Do any of you have that place that... in the moment you didn’t realize the impact it was making... but looking back you realize just how much it shaped your life? For me, that place is the local YMCA right here in the Triangle.
During summers when I was a kid, I attended my local YMCA summer camp in north Raleigh while my mom worked. I loved every minute of it... the welcoming environment, playing outside with my friends. In fact... when I attended summer camp the Y didn’t even have a building... It was just a big field. Wow they’ve come a long way and thank goodness!
Those days in the summer camp weren’t my last... After graduating high school, I got a job teaching children at that same Y. In fact, I ended up running one of their summer camps at one point.
This may be shocking but my time at the Y is something I think about quite a bit as I’m running for Congress. It was there that I fell in love with teaching — especially teaching children with special needs. It’s also the place where I first used my voice to advocate for inclusion and that became the foundation of the work we do with the National Inclusion Project... more on that later...
My love for North Carolina got me to this point and it's our state and region that will help our campaign cross the finish line. I’ve always been a “roll your sleeves up, get to work, and get involved” type of person. Now, I’m asking you to do the same...
Volunteer for Clay for NC
sign up [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QVt_jPUTUUeJqAp-98v6og2?emci=2abcef81-2e89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
Donate to Clay for NC
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=02182022_FRTY/SpecialEd_1&amount=25]
Clay
P.S. I want to thank you all for giving towards my budget deadline this week! I’m so happy that our campaign is growing and our chorus is getting bigger with workers and supporters. If you didn’t have a chance to give, there is still time... donate now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_staffing?refcode=02182022_FRTY/SpecialEd_1&amount=25]
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]

Durham, NC 27709

clean_body: [] Do any of you have that place that... in the moment you didn’t realize the impact it was making... but looking back you realize just how much it shaped your life? For me, that place is the local YMCA right here in the Triangle. During summers when I was a kid, I attended my local YMCA summer camp in north Raleigh while my mom worked. I loved every minute of it... the welcoming environment, playing outside with my friends. In fact... when I attended summer camp the Y didn’t even have a building... It was just a big field. Wow they’ve come a long way and thank goodness! Those days in the summer camp weren’t my last... After graduating high school, I got a job teaching children at that same Y. In fact, I ended up running one of their summer camps at one point. This may be shocking but my time at the Y is something I think about quite a bit as I’m running for Congress. It was there that I fell in love with teaching — especially teaching children with special needs. It’s also the place where I first used my voice to advocate for inclusion and that became the foundation of the work we do with the National Inclusion Project... more on that later... My love for North Carolina got me to this point and it's our state and region that will help our campaign cross the finish line. I’ve always been a “roll your sleeves up, get to work, and get involved” type of person. Now, I’m asking you to do the same... Volunteer for Clay for NC sign up [=] Donate to Clay for NC DONATE [] Clay P.S. I want to thank you all for giving towards my budget deadline this week! I’m so happy that our campaign is growing and our chorus is getting bigger with workers and supporters. If you didn’t have a chance to give, there is still time... donate now. [] Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse. Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [] DONATE [] Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina Clay Aiken for North Carolina PO Box 13274 Durham, NC 27709 United States If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to unsubscribe: .

According to a study that came out this week, the Southwest is experiencing the driest period in _1,200 years._ That's an unbelievable number.

I've been fighting to secure a drought-safe water supply for Arizona since I became Mayor of Phoenix. In Congress, I've brought home millions of dollars to invest in our water infrastructure and support strategic planning. **But a problem this big requires long-term investment and attention.**

**One of my top priorities is protecting Arizona 's water supply. But I need to win reelection if I'm going to keep up this fight.**

**[Arizona needs people in Congress with the experience and know-how to address our water supply issues. With a race this close, your recurring donation can make all the difference. Will you make a monthly contribution by chipping in now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/H9d4DuWstbn6dU4ONgD4DLqWvl2A7MIDXb-jgSTIfho=/GzYL4cIRnbypO5ZzyJLfa7EhXFWMr9uW74Ba54aKqaw=?refcode=X_021822_Drought&recurring=1)**

Thank you!

name: Team Jayapal
subject: We want your thoughts on the upcoming midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
November may be months away but investments, organizing, and decisions right now can lead to victory (or defeat).
#
Peter,
This is a critical point in the election cycle. November may be months away but investments, organizing, and decisions right now can lead to victory (or defeat).
**So, Pramila and our team want your input on pending legislation and how what Democrats do now will impact 2022 midterms.[Take just two minutes and complete our 2022 Midterm Election Survey right now »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/midterm-election-survey-2022/?source=em20220218-1042&t=1&akid=1042%2E420207%2EsiNcep)**
**[Take the survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/midterm-election-survey-2022/?source=em20220218-1042&t=2&akid=1042%2E420207%2EsiNcep)**
So far in 2022, Pramila has been balancing the legislative and electoral work of an election year. The work will only get tougher as more primaries get underway and the general election nears. That’s why we want to understand the thoughts of our grassroots supporters before we get any further into this midterm election year.
**[Can you take our Midterm Election Survey today to help advise how we’re thinking about 2022?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/midterm-election-survey-2022/?source=em20220218-1042&t=3&akid=1042%2E420207%2EsiNcep)** _Your input right now is so valuable as election work heats up._
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220218-1042-footer&t=4&refcode2=1042_420207_siNcep&akid=1042%2E420207%2EsiNcep)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=1042%2E420207%2EsiNcep)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1042%2E420207%2EsiNcep)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Blue Senate
subject: Democratic Focus Group: Personal Invite for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
**Here's the situation, friend:** Experts everywhere from Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ to CNN are reporting that the GOP is favored to deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell – and they only need to flip ONE seat red to do it.
That means we can't afford to make a single mistake if we're going to prevent a McConnell-led Senate from obstructing President Biden's agenda at every turn, but the GOP is spending MILLIONS to crush Democrats across the country – and polling shows must-win battleground races locked neck-and-neck.
**This is urgent, friend. The only way we can build a strategy strong enough to defend our razor-thin majority is with the insights of top Democrats. That's why we pulled together a list of the most dedicated members of this team, and your name is on it, friend.**
**[Will you join our invite-only Democratic Focus Group to share your critical grassroots insights on our strategy to fight back against the GOP's megadonors and defend our narrow Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41969140/331097557/-1072294119?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1640-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTAwYjkzMS0wZjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NYyPMTqMxVlvNNed8ooXSH1rSrtdEX_MYbnOZQ-mqC0=&emci=62fbbe1b-e190-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7100b931-0f91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3800590)**
| | [BEGIN THE FOCUS GROUP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41969143/331097560/-1072294119?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1640-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTAwYjkzMS0wZjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NYyPMTqMxVlvNNed8ooXSH1rSrtdEX_MYbnOZQ-mqC0=&emci=62fbbe1b-e190-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7100b931-0f91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3800590)
---
The stakes of this fight couldn't be higher. As Republicans do everything they can to roll back our most fundamental rights, everything from reproductive freedom to voting rights to health care is on the line in November.
**That's why we need our top supporters to weigh in on the best strategy to win key battleground races and keep McConnell out of power – but we still don't have your responses, friend. Please, we're counting on you to join our invite-only focus group before it expires at midnight tonight.**
**Here's the link we generated _specifically_ for you: [surveys.signforgood.com/rosen-digital-focus-group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41969146/331097563/-1072294119?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1640-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTAwYjkzMS0wZjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NYyPMTqMxVlvNNed8ooXSH1rSrtdEX_MYbnOZQ-mqC0=&emci=62fbbe1b-e190-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7100b931-0f91-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3800590)**
Thank you for taking the time to share your input. It really is invaluable.

clean_body: | | | Here's the situation, friend: Experts everywhere from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight to CNN are reporting that the GOP is favored to deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell – and they only need to flip ONE seat red to do it. That means we can't afford to make a single mistake if we're going to prevent a McConnell-led Senate from obstructing President Biden's agenda at every turn, but the GOP is spending MILLIONS to crush Democrats across the country – and polling shows must-win battleground races locked neck-and-neck. This is urgent, friend. The only way we can build a strategy strong enough to defend our razor-thin majority is with the insights of top Democrats. That's why we pulled together a list of the most dedicated members of this team, and your name is on it, friend. | | The stakes of this fight couldn't be higher. As Republicans do everything they can to roll back our most fundamental rights, everything from reproductive freedom to voting rights to health care is on the line in November. That's why we need our top supporters to weigh in on the best strategy to win key battleground races and keep McConnell out of power – but we still don't have your responses, friend. Please, we're counting on you to join our invite-only focus group before it expires at midnight tonight. Here's the link we generated specifically for you: Thank you for taking the time to share your input. It really is invaluable. Team Rosen | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada PO BOX 27195 LAS VEGAS, NV 89126 United States
