name: Erica Smith
subject: My personal story navigating our broken healthcare system
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

I want to share my personal
story navigating our broken for-profit healthcare system and why I take
the fight for universal healthcare so personally.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40736?refcode=em20220218-899&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=899%2E3698%2EaPqSp6 ]I hope you’ll take a moment to read it, and then donate to our campaign
for U.S. House in North Carolina, so I can take our fight to guarantee
healthcare as a human right to Congress.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40736?refcode=em20220218-899&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=899%2E3698%2EaPqSp6 ]Donate

I had a medically-fragile son, who I gave birth to prematurely at around
24 weeks gestation. He needed several specialists, and he also needed
breathing equipment — it wasn’t optional; he literally would not have been
able to breathe without it.

Yet, our health insurance and children's Medicaid didn’t cover anything
vaguely close to what was needed to cover the medical equipment his very
life depended on.

I had a mortgage and four kids, and I didn’t know how I was going to
afford the medical bills and put food on the table.

I picked up part-time work teaching at an alternative school. We sold
everything we had, including my eldest son’s car — the same one he relied
on to commute to and from his job.

This was our reality, and we had health insurance.

The thing is, my story isn’t unique. Thousands of people in our country go
bankrupt, forego care and medication, or die because our healthcare
system prioritizes profits over people. That is fundamentally wrong and
wholly immoral.

I’m ready to fight for
universal health care in Congress and guarantee healthcare as a human
right. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40736?refcode=em20220218-899&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=899%2E3698%2EaPqSp6 ]If you’re ready to fight with me, make a contribution of
$5 or whatever you can to our campaign today.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40736?refcode=em20220218-899&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=899%2E3698%2EaPqSp6 ]Donate

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Erica
Erica Smith for Congress

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40736?refcode=em20220218-899&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=899%2E3698%2EaPqSp6 ][IMG]

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220218-899-footer&t=1024&refcode2=899_3698_aPqSp6&akid=899%2E3698%2EaPqSp6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=899%2E3698%2EaPqSp6

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Data and Communication Manager
subject: John Selker’s Health Care in Oregon Policy Conversation is Tuesday, Feb 22nd at 7pm!
body:
John Selker of Corvallis is running to represent the people of Oregon District 4 in the US Congress since Peter DeFazio announced his plans to retire. John is an entrepreneur, OSU Distinguished Professor, woodworker and problem solver. He is hosting a weekly series of Policy Conversations on Zoom to learn more about what is important to the people of our large and diverse district, and to help people understand John’s position on key issues.

**On Tuesday Feb. 22****nd****at 7 pm** on Zoom, John Selker is hosting the third in a series of Policy Conversations, this time **focused on Health Care in Oregon. **
****

The conversation will begin with two guest speakers: **Charlie Fautin, RN and MPH** , **is recently retired Public Health Administrator for Benton County Health Department**. **Mark Weiss, chair of Mid-Valley Health Care Advocates** , recently retired from a long career in counseling and teaching at Linn-Benton Community College.

To register for the Policy Series and receive a Zoom link and passcode, go to

<https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJEsc-morjkrGtLAqp_BDXZlyG2v79a47D2R>

When: Feb 22, 2022 07:00 PM Pacific Time (US and Canada)

After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the meeting.

We will also be joined by **Bruce Thomson, MD,** longtime **family medicine doctor** in Corvallis and formerly with the **Benton County Health Department.**

Melanie Place
Data and Communications Manager
[communication@selker4congress.org](mailto:communication@selker4congress.org)
Cell: 541-286-0109
John Selker for Congress Campaign, Candidate 4th House Seat
[Twitter](https://twitter.com/JohnSelker)
[FB](https://www.facebook.com/groups/352472833546656)
[https://selker4congress.org](https://selker4congress.org/)
<https://www.facebook.com/john.selker/videos/253974480183077>

clean_body: There’s too much at stake to fall behind on a single fundraising goal. | = | Peter, Any day now, Pennsylvania will be implementing new congressional district maps based on the latest census. I won’t sugarcoat it: we could be in real trouble. Republicans have made it clear that I am a top target in the midterm elections. I am on the National Republican Campaign Committee’s “offensive target” list, Republican groups are spending big on attack ads against me, and I already have three far-right Republican opponents. There’s too much at stake to fall behind on a single fundraising goal.= | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = I'll be honest with you: Republicans wouldn’t be pouring cash into my seat if they didn’t think they had a real chance to flip it. subject: Bidenflation & Bare Shelves Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Block for NM](http:// "Paid for by Block for NM")
body:
Isn’t Build Back Better Great? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-6793365?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=ff861e55c1&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Last month, the Department of Homeland Security & Emergency Management posted on social media about national supply chain issues with the public service announcement “only take what you need”. Wouldn’t it be nice if those who serve in state and federal government had that mindset?
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=df87718a65&e=102b599530)
---
| **The Radical Democrats continue to take while hard working Americans foot the bill.**
Biden’s dark winter has brought us an increasingly fragile supply chain, unreasonable COVID-19 vaccine mandates, subsequent labor shortages, escalating inflation, and he dares to call reports of bare shelves misleading!
It’s time to remove the predatory power of bureaucrats who love big government while catering to special interests for a padded wallet. Big government and big business enriched themselves while a stranglehold was placed on the entrepreneurial spirit of everyday Americans in small business.
Meanwhile the price of gas has doubled and it costs more to buy less groceries to feed American families. The ridiculous doublespeak of the failed Biden administration is trying to mislead Americans with a self-congratulatory stance, but is anyone buying that bill of goods? C’mon man!
**It’s time to tell the government to take only what is needed from the American people.**
As your next governor, I will make it my mission on day one to fight off the looting and piracy of the radical Left.
Please show your support for taking big government to the shed and schooling them in the art of fiscal responsibility by considering a generous donation of any amount to my campaign today:

name: Beto HQ
subject: Our make-or-break $750,000 goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Reporters are already starting to reach out to ask if we're going to be outraised by Abbott and his corporate mega-donors again.
#
**Here’s the deal:** Usually we have 30-31 days to hit our monthly fundraising goals, but this month _we only have 28 days_. **On top of that, we have our next TEC mandatory filing deadline tomorrow!**
Reporters are already starting to reach out to ask if we're going to be outraised by Abbott and his corporate mega-donors again.
We set a goal to raise $750,000 before midnight on Saturday (the next TEC deadline) and with a short month, we don’t have the time to catch up if we fall short of our goal by tomorrow night.
[ Will you please make your first contribution of $3 or more to help hit this make-or-break goal and power our campaign to defeat Greg Abbott?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53239?refcode=ema20220218-176805&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=176805%2E444211%2ECGH3Bz)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53239?refcode=ema20220218-176805&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=176805%2E444211%2ECGH3Bz)**
All eyes are on this campaign to see if we have what it takes to flip Texas. We can't let something as trivial as a 28-day month keep us from hitting our goals and having the campaign infrastructure we need to take on Greg Abbott.
Our organizers and volunteers are hard at work to reach 3 million voters before March 1st. We’re building the biggest, boldest organizing program that Texas has ever seen to defeat Greg Abbott and elect Beto.
[ Donate now to help build a campaign that can reach every Texan. We can't count out a single vote.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53239?refcode=ema20220218-176805&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=176805%2E444211%2ECGH3Bz)
**[Donate »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53239?refcode=ema20220218-176805&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=176805%2E444211%2ECGH3Bz)**
Thank you. Together, we'll work for every single vote and write no one off. That’s how we win.
— Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220218-176805-footer&t=23&refcode2=176805_444211_CGH3Bz&akid=176805%2E444211%2ECGH3Bz)**

name: Jessica Mason
subject: Our undocumented friends and neighbors deserve better.
body:
My opponents seldom speak to our sizable immigrant population.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41959192/331053506/-1288899752?refcode=220218_FR_immigrationgraphic_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGQxYTY4NC1lNzkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Lu-WFFANQ-NZI6WSHG5gzTGab5Ix5ee-Ty4CkG0kMg=) **TLDR: We only have _11 DAYS_ until the primary election. clean_body: My opponents seldom speak to our sizable immigrant population. | | | = TLDR: We only have 11 DAYS until the primary election. Jessica Mason is the only candidate in this race who is not afraid to boldly champion real policy solutions for our underserved undocumented community. = If you've saved payment with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through instantly: = = Happy Friday! One of the things I love most about TX-30 is that our district is richly diverse. Yet my opponents seldom speak to or address the unique needs of our sizable immigrant population. That’s why fixing our broken immigration system is one of the top priorities in my New Deal — because I know that investing in our immigrant communities means investing in America’s future. = Unlike status quo politicians and other candidates in this race, I refuse to let out-of-touch leaders stall progress for undocumented Americans — and I’m not afraid to demand better for our immigrant friends and neighbors who play such an important role in moving our country forward. I’m fully dedicated to ensuring a safe place where ALL human beings are treated with equal dignity and respect — regardless of immigration status. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **********=******** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** = In Solidarity, Jessica = **********************EXPRESS DONATE to Jessica Mason for Congress******************** ********************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:******************** ********************= ""******************** | ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** ---|---|---|--- Jessica Mason was born and raised in Dallas and has experienced firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that impede the success of Texas working families. name: Morgan Harper
subject: BREAKING: The Ohio Democratic Party endorsed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
They will continue doing this, folks.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220218-680-footer-ak&t=2&akid=680%2E90090%2ELUR1OH)
Hey,
I asked the Ohio Democratic Party to remain neutral in our Senate race. **Late last night, they didn’t listen, and endorsed our opponent Tim Ryan before a single vote was cast in the Democratic primary election.**
**[We won’t be deterred. Rush a $5 contribution right now to help us stand up to the corrupt establishment.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26041?t=3&akid=680%2E90090%2ELUR1OH)**
It’s clear that those in charge will continue to tip the scales in favor of our establishment opponent. Despite Tim Ryan’s past anti-abortion and pro-gun stances, despite his failed record for delivering change to his constituents, despite him being one of the largest recipients of special interest lobbying money in the entire U.S. Congress, **they’ll still do anything to hand him the nomination.**
**It's official: It’s us against the machine.**
**[If you’re looking to support a true grassroots, people-before-profit candidate, rush a contribution right now so we can fight back.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26041?t=4&akid=680%2E90090%2ELUR1OH)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26047?refcode=em20220218-680&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=680%2E90090%2ELUR1OH)**
Ohioans are sick of an establishment that picks winners and losers without any regard to what the people want. Check out just some of the reactions to the announcement from voters online:
_**“There is a primary process for a reason, this is disappointing.”**_
_**“Let voters decide who is the best candidate not out of touch elite party members.”**_
_**“As an Ohio Democrat I feel incredibly disrespected by the actions you have taken in endorsing candidates before the primary process has allowed the voters to weigh in. You have no party without the voters.”**_
The stakes may have just gotten a lot higher, but with enough grassroots support, our people-powered movement can stand up to the party establishment and win.
**[Can you help us fight back against the party machine by rushing a contribution today?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26041?t=24&akid=680%2E90090%2ELUR1OH)**
Thank you for your support.
Onwards,
Morgan
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/26041?t=25&akid=680%2E90090%2ELUR1OH)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220218-680-footer&t=26&refcode2=680_90090_LUR1OH&akid=680%2E90090%2ELUR1OH)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=680%2E90090%2ELUR1OH)

| Peter, did you hear?
Florida set a new all-time-record with nearly 118 million domestic visitors to the state in 2021!

And that's not all - Florida's businesses are booming, too, as hotel revenues also reached record highs last year. Despite two years of lies, COVID fear-mongering, and relentless attacks from the dishonest corporate media, America's greatest Governor was never going to let unscientific Faucian mandates dictate how Floridians live. Millions of Americans are fleeing to Florida from blue states because they are sick and tired of draconian lockdowns, and they want their freedom back. And the best part is that among the millions of tourists who have traveled to Florida are a handful of hypocritical lockdown liberals from across the country. Yes, we're talking about failed CNN anchor Chris Cuomo who was just spotted in Palm Beach. But that's okay, Chris...we like freedom, too! clean_body: | | | | == | Peter, did you hear? Florida set a new all-time-record with nearly 118 million domestic visitors to the state in 2021! == And that's not all - Florida's businesses are booming, too, as hotel revenues also reached record highs last year. Despite two years of lies, COVID fear-mongering, and relentless attacks from the dishonest corporate media, America's greatest Governor was never going to let unscientific Faucian mandates dictate how Floridians live. Millions of Americans are fleeing to Florida from blue states because they are sick and tired of draconian lockdowns, and they want their freedom back. And the best part is that among the millions of tourists who have traveled to Florida are a handful of hypocritical lockdown liberals from across the country. Yes, we're talking about failed CNN anchor Chris Cuomo who was just spotted in Palm Beach. But that's okay, Chris...we like freedom, too! And as long as Ron DeSantis is your governor, Florida will always be a free state, and it will continue to prosper Team DeSantis | | == | == == == | Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor | | | | | | | Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Our message is resonating, and it wouldn't be possible without your support!

# **_"...shall not be infringed"_**

Thank you to the folks at GLOCK for a great tour of the factory in Smyrna this week — and thank you for the Georgia jobs you provide. Unlike Raphael Warnock, who fully supports Biden's attack on the Second Amendment, I will always stand strong for our rights in the U.S. Senate.

---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c0ac6b979ad45f6d/714969e31a76d302c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

[**Head here to help sponsor our get out the vote efforts.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c0ac6b979ad45f6d/f94dd489dcf5ec91c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c0ac6b979ad45f6d/aa5bc3ef3673c350c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Shared our message this week with a packed at house at the Morgan County Republican Party! Republicans across this state know me, they know my record, and they know that it's going to take trusted conservative experience to defeat Raphael Warnock in November. Thanks to everyone who joined us.
---
---
# **_San Francisco_**
---
---
San Francisco voters — yes, that San Francisco — voted to recall three regressive members of their school board this week. The reason? They spent more time catering to a woke agenda, indoctrinating children, and trying to cancel Abraham Lincoln than safely reopening schools. We've been holding that line here in Georgia now for a while, and it's time we send that same message to DC in November.
---
---
# **_Why Won't Herschel Debate?_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c0ac6b979ad45f6d/d4198b6ff3c1e8dac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
One week ago today, I called on Herschel Walker to come out of hiding, open his campaign events to the public, and debate the issues. He hasn't responded. Fellow Republicans, we MUST have this conversation about Herschel's issues before the primary in May. Otherwise, the entire Georgia Republican could be damaged and a conservative Senate majority will be at risk. [**Join us in calling for Herschel to debate here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c0ac6b979ad45f6d/c9c5d8cf607f81a0c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

Our opponents have raised and spent millions to preserve the status quo in Washington. With your help, we're going to stop them. **[With less than 100 days to go until the primary, every dollar counts and I hope you'll contribute whatever you can here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c0ac6b979ad45f6d/0d6517bc3acde213c3d6b838967d376c/37793)** Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support!

Gary Black

---
I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---

name: Wes Moore
subject: Updates from Wes Moore for Maryland - Upcoming Events!
body:
Check out some of our upcoming events!

| | Friend - Happy Friday, and thank you so much for all of your support of Aruna and me over these past nine months - being a part of this campaign is energizing every day, and a constant reminder of the opportunities ahead of us as a state.
I wanted to make sure you saw some upcoming events we have, both in-person and virtual, over the coming months. I hope you can come out and join us to hear the latest on the campaign and our plans for the next decade for Maryland - and bring some friends and family with you! You can reach out to my team for more information by replying to this email. I am excited about the direction we are headed and more confident than ever that we will do this together. clean_body: Check out some of our upcoming events! | | Friend - Happy Friday, and thank you so much for all of your support of Aruna and me over these past nine months - being a part of this campaign is energizing every day, and a constant reminder of the opportunities ahead of us as a state. I wanted to make sure you saw some upcoming events we have, both in-person and virtual, over the coming months. I hope you can come out and join us to hear the latest on the campaign and our plans for the next decade for Maryland - and bring some friends and family with you! You can reach out to my team for more information by replying to this email. I am excited about the direction we are headed and more confident than ever that we will do this together. Bless you and thank you! clean_body: Rebecca Kleefisch is the only person I trust to fire Tony Evers. | Friend, Tony Evers has failed Wisconsin. He sided with rioters while Kenosha was set ablaze, he sided with liberal union cronies over your children’s education, and in the end, he had the gall to tell you it was best for you. I won’t beat around the bush, if we don’t FIRE Tony Evers this November, then we too will have failed Wisconsin, Friend. And there’s only one person I trust to finish the job – my very own Lieutenant Governor, Rebecca Kleefisch. I hate to admit it, but this toss-up governor’s race is going to come down to fundraising. The DGA has already amassed a warchest of over $54 million to prop up Evers along with his $10.5 million in cash on hand. His entire reelection strategy has become buying this race, and it’s clear why... The latest polling shows that a majority of Wisconsin voters would NOT vote to reelect him. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Will you sign on to support democracy reform?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Our democracy is sacred, and it's our responsibility to protect it. But the past years have shown us that our democracy is not guaranteed. That's why I'm fighting to preserve it every day in Congress.

Former President Trump tried to undermine our democracy at every turn, and far too many of his colleagues looked the other way even when Trump's actions threatened our democracy. Now, voting rights are under attack like never before, and our elections are still flooded with cash from dark money groups.

[**Our democracy will always be worth fighting for, and we need to take steps to ensure its preservation for generations to come. Will you add your name to tell Congress we need democracy reform now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/z7nd2xhQzJyBuzNxJaQxfkGVUItAqKCMRDpMogfLMM8=/1_qRVrxmNYGOlhQeWIwz9W8qKxf8mtgU7eubVxo26Qw=)

It's simple: there's been too much money, too many special interests, and too little accountability in Washington, D.C. That's why I was proud to vote to pass the Protecting Our Democracy Act in the House to take measurable steps to restore checks and balances to our government. And it's why I voted for the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act to strengthen the voice of the American people in our democracy and end the influence of big money in our elections.

No matter who the president is, we need to restore the guardrails of our democracy, preserve voting rights, and get big money out of politics to protect our democracy.

[**Sign on to our petition now to send a message to Congress that it 's time to support democracy reform >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/z7nd2xhQzJyBuzNxJaQxfkGVUItAqKCMRDpMogfLMM8=/1_qRVrxmNYGOlhQeWIwz9W8qKxf8mtgU7eubVxo26Qw=)

Thank you,

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/z7nd2xhQzJyBuzNxJaQxfkGVUItAqKCMRDpMogfLMM8=/tXvZAGV_Kxl5cI5YdD1SdW8DaCVmww4sp346H-Ad3Jo=?refcode=em22_220218_pro1_adv_gq_act_ja_de_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220218_pro1_adv_gq_act_ja_de_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Phil
subject: one quick question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
I'll keep this quick, friend, because it's incredibly urgent: **I just put a meeting on Marco's calendar to go over our focus group results, but I noticed your response is still missing. We're meeting first thing tomorrow morning, so I have to ask:[Can you share your answers right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41970315/331103005/-1472696829?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk436-su-nd&refcode=jtk436-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODQ4NTdlMC0xNjkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GtPkw5JtV-e3f6nP-MiQvDIY0Az9yvcoT5VUh6nq4s=&emci=5be84780-4b90-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=b84857e0-1691-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6085109)**
---
We handpicked this focus group to make sure we heard from our most engaged and informed supporters – the folks on the ground who we know we can count on to tell us the truth. Marco is relying on that kind of insight from you to win his race and lead us into a brighter future – one where Trump puppets like Kari Lake (R) can't drive our potential into the ground.
**But if we don't hear your feedback, we can't turn it into a winning strategy and flip Arizona blue. So trust me when I say your response isn't just important – it's urgent. Please, we have to ask:**

Peter -

**The last time inflation was this high, mullets were unironically in style.**

In 1982,_E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial_ was released, Michael Jackson's _Thriller_ album debuted, Joe Biden was in his 9th year as a Senator, **and inflation was 7%.**

Now 2022, inflation is expected to hit a whopping 7.2% by March! **Biden's tax and spend ideology has driven inflation to a 40 year high, and it's showing no signs of stopping.**

The prices of gas, housing, electricity, cars, and almost everything else is skyrocketing. Life is becoming alarmingly more expensive for the American middle class. The dollar doesn't go as far as it did even just two years ago.

With rising inflation combined with labor shortages, supply chain issues, and total economic uncertainty, **it's hard to believe that Biden and the Left have the interests of everyday Americans at heart.**

Democrats hold the House by a slim margin, and Republicans only need to take a few seats to regain the Majority. _Democrats have no idea how to run this country and a conservative majority is the only thing that can set our nation back on track._

In November, Republicans will take back the 13th Congressional District seat being vacated by turncoat Charlie Crist. **But we need to make sure a strong conservative takes that seat.**

I'm the right Republican for this seat, but I need your help to make it to Washington. [**Can you chip in just a few dollars to help my campaign for Congress in Florida?**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=37b46b5f6fcc4e80a5d25629162ab121&_e=wWID9PfPKBJd26qNYBUiadG-1cZzaT7V5oG40wAQLlWEiTiret-r0QaXObvhHptXpgEAGkJAuiyxt18eGrtLekQo63QKcTMlYaMFZ43n1xLwxtIS9KVmzWQH6IbS_G7-amGwsk9a8Xx77WfvIl9UlL1NOCeMU02OMrQmFsQOt6vcZupM06uDwa8TPZKxEHcT8xHu_f-67oW_wShPdHeg4z7yTi_wfCKRPkjxFr_rr17Nby5tuj3BhTw4Aq95nWowsyWRSz5cn8-onKIuypKwec9yOkMdX9zb-WDB-6f7O71KZbKjvC1bt_d0rsXL5kKUhVjNdiIEKDuQBSO7t9PJVoKnDy4aI0N8tJzdWppiMdmBTPXmbP3SJlitlj5Y_DcjehhXnS8J_1FhzOwYy9b73G4VYXm7S2mS4WCsRYv6pOo%3D)

Here’s where we are.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41970645/331105662/1627587959?refcode=EM_C_220218ds_n_jw_actives_5_ng_na_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjU5ZGQ5MC0xNzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=126oUSrI4Ba4-I4OOx9vNFzWsyXLrX_tFRmRiiBSKeI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41970646/331105663/1627587959?refcode=EM_C_220218ds_n_jw_actives_5_ng_na_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjU5ZGQ5MC0xNzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=126oUSrI4Ba4-I4OOx9vNFzWsyXLrX_tFRmRiiBSKeI=) Friend,

I’m Jacob, Rep. Blunt Rochester’s Communications and Outreach Coordinator. I wanted to reach out today about an exciting opportunity for students to get involved in our campaign!

Our campaign is joining with the DCCC and Rep. Jamie Raskin to participate in Democracy Summer! This program is dedicated to training and educating the next generation of Democratic political activists, organizers, and leaders.

We’re looking for dedicated high school and college students to join Team LBR as fellows this summer. Each participant will participate in an exciting online seminar and curriculum designed by Rep. Raskin focused on the history of social and political change in America and the progress of political democracy, while simultaneously training as organizers and volunteer activists with the reelection campaign here in Delaware!

**[You can click here to apply! The deadline to apply is March 15, 2022. If you know a student that may be interested in this life-changing program, please forward them this email -- this is an opportunity they won’t want to miss!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41970647/331105664/-1189087047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjU5ZGQ5MC0xNzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=126oUSrI4Ba4-I4OOx9vNFzWsyXLrX_tFRmRiiBSKeI=&emci=776e49e2-1091-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ab59dd90-1791-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=11913588)** | | **[Apply to Democracy Summer School!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41970648/331105665/-1189087047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjU5ZGQ5MC0xNzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=126oUSrI4Ba4-I4OOx9vNFzWsyXLrX_tFRmRiiBSKeI=&emci=776e49e2-1091-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ab59dd90-1791-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=11913588)**
---
**[If you’re not a student, but still want to help young people get involved with our campaign, you can click here to make a donation to our reelection efforts!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41970649/331105666/1627587959?refcode=EM_C_220218ds_n_jw_actives_5_ng_na_na_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjU5ZGQ5MC0xNzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=126oUSrI4Ba4-I4OOx9vNFzWsyXLrX_tFRmRiiBSKeI=)**

Thanks for your time!

Jacob Wasserman
Communications and Outreach Coordinator
** **
**Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Peter, I'm reaching out personally to explain what your support would mean to me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Writing to you from here in Cedar Rapids ...
| | |
---
Hi Peter,

I'm writing to you from my home in Cedar Rapids. We've been on the road a lot lately, meeting Iowans across the state – and I've got to say, I'm feeling really fired up and grateful for this team. I know we have what it takes to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley and expand our Senate majority, which is why I'm reaching out to you personally, Peter. Will you make your very first contribution to our campaign by giving just $5? I promise it will make a meaningful impact in our race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA). I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain.
Right now, polling from the Des Moines Register shows Sen. Grassley has a record-low approval rating with Iowa voters. He's vulnerable, and Republicans know that he's on thin ice. It's probably why the Senate Republican campaign arm has been actively attacking me, and they have more than $39 million in the bank to go on attacking me and protecting their Trump-endorsed incumbent. I want you to hear this from me: I have every intention of winning this race, but I cannot do it without an unprecedented movement made up of people like you donating $5, $10 or $20 at a time. Your hard-earned dollars build up this movement.
More than $39 million in Republican money is a lot to compete with. The full backing of Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump is a lot to compete with. But we _can_ compete and win if we build up the strongest grassroots movement possible! That's why it's so important that you make your first contribution of $5 or whatever you can spare to defeat Sen. Grassley. The best link to donate is right here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41970651/331105804/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk690-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5ZGQ5MC0xNzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WPIBAnpcmXbjhH1ZZszmF5pJV4pdmjJNfnzmPXS5-EI=)**
I am not someone who backs down from a challenge, and I've gone up against people like Sen. Grassley before: I won an election against a man double my age, flipped a House seat blue and became the youngest woman to pass legislation through the House. Still, as a young woman in public service, I can't count the number of times I've been underestimated or counted out.
The pundits and so-called experts will say what they want to say, but at the end of the day, I know that with lots of hard work and unwavering grassroots support, we will flip this Senate seat blue.
This is personal. Right now, working families in communities across Iowa are being failed by a senator who has left them behind. Those families are _my_ family. Dad was a union pipefitter-welder, and Mom worked for the Dubuque public school system. They inspired me to show up for my community, which is exactly why I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley. It's time to lift up the voices of Iowa's working families in the Senate.
Peter, I appreciate you sticking with me as I write about what this race means to me. I'm going to bring this email to a close. But before I do, I've got to press the importance of building up a grassroots movement again. When you chip in $5, along with hundreds of other people, it adds up to something powerful. It adds up to a campaign that can compete and win. So please, will you make your first donation to help me win in Iowa and defeat Sen. Grassley? Here's that link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41970652/331105805/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk690-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5ZGQ5MC0xNzkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WPIBAnpcmXbjhH1ZZszmF5pJV4pdmjJNfnzmPXS5-EI=)**
With so much gratitude,

Abby

clean_body: Writing to you from here in Cedar Rapids ... | | | Hi Peter, I'm writing to you from my home in Cedar Rapids. We've been on the road a lot lately, meeting Iowans across the state – and I've got to say, I'm feeling really fired up and grateful for this team. I know we have what it takes to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley and expand our Senate majority, which is why I'm reaching out to you personally, Peter. Will you make your very first contribution to our campaign by giving just $5? I promise it will make a meaningful impact in our race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA). I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain. Right now, polling from the Des Moines Register shows Sen. Grassley has a record-low approval rating with Iowa voters. He's vulnerable, and Republicans know that he's on thin ice. It's probably why the Senate Republican campaign arm has been actively attacking me, and they have more than $39 million in the bank to go on attacking me and protecting their Trump-endorsed incumbent. I want you to hear this from me: I have every intention of winning this race, but I cannot do it without an unprecedented movement made up of people like you donating $5, $10 or $20 at a time. Your hard-earned dollars build up this movement. More than $39 million in Republican money is a lot to compete with. The full backing of Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump is a lot to compete with. But we can compete and win if we build up the strongest grassroots movement possible! That's why it's so important that you make your first contribution of $5 or whatever you can spare to defeat Sen. Grassley. The best link to donate is right here: = I am not someone who backs down from a challenge, and I've gone up against people like Sen. Grassley before: I won an election against a man double my age, flipped a House seat blue and became the youngest woman to pass legislation through the House. Still, as a young woman in public service, I can't count the number of times I've been underestimated or counted out. The pundits and so-called experts will say what they want to say, but at the end of the day, I know that with lots of hard work and unwavering grassroots support, we will flip this Senate seat blue. This is personal. Right now, working families in communities across Iowa are being failed by a senator who has left them behind. Those families are my family. Dad was a union pipefitter-welder, and Mom worked for the Dubuque public school system. They inspired me to show up for my community, which is exactly why I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley. It's time to lift up the voices of Iowa's working families in the Senate. Peter, I appreciate you sticking with me as I write about what this race means to me. I'm going to bring this email to a close. But before I do, I've got to press the importance of building up a grassroots movement again. When you chip in $5, along with hundreds of other people, it adds up to something powerful. It adds up to a campaign that can compete and win. So please, will you make your first donation to help me win in Iowa and defeat Sen. Grassley? Here's that link again: = With so much gratitude, Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

Peter,

I'm excited to share that President Donald Trump just endorsed me in my race for Texas' 15th Congressional District!

I'm running because Texas deserves a voice in Congress who will fight for our Texas values of faith, family and freedom.

**Now, I'm honored to have Pres. Trump standing alongside me and our supporters in this fight.**

Early voting is currently underway in my primary election, and election day is less than two weeks away. To avoid a runoff and continue straight on to win this seat in November I need your help to keep our campaign running at full power.

name: Team Hern for Congress
subject: Border security
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Kevin has been joined by more than 40 GOP colleagues in asking DHS Sec. Mayorkas to step down. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/11c372339c9bbf86/58aebe37383260b0c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, Kevin is proud to lead the charge calling for DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas to resign his post, following a year of crisis and failure at the Southern border. Over 40 of his Republican colleagues in the House joined him in signing a letter calling for his resignation from President Biden’s Cabinet. Both Biden and Mayorkas have continued to ignore the very real danger to millions of Americans. It’s not just a border issue anymore either — every single state is dealing with the fallout from the Biden Administration’s failure at the Southern Border. Did you know that there is enough fentanyl coming across the border to kill EVERY AMERICAN 7 TIMES OVER – that's right – 7 TIMES OVER?! The Congressman recently appeared on Newsmax to discuss the call for Secretary Mayorkas to resign, and detail the many dangers that are ever-present to Americans now thanks to his failures at the border. [**< <CLICK HERE TO WATCH KEVIN ON NEWSMAX >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/11c372339c9bbf86/9e70c513ada1a808c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/11c372339c9bbf86/b724ea7c46e83783c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Kevin is deeply concerned by the crisis at the border, and doing everything he can to fight for safe policies that keep both Americans and immigrants safe. **You can help the fight for border security by chipping in a special donation right now.**
---
[**CHIP IN FOR BORDER SECURITY >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/11c372339c9bbf86/81cdce8bdb5ece1ec3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Make no mistake. People are racing to the border from over 160 countries around the world because the Biden Administration has sent them an open invitation. Secretary Mayorkas needs to step down, and we need to get to work enacting border policies that WORK. Thanks for your help,
Team Hern for Congress
---

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: What’s on the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We need all hands on deck to deliver for Vermont and the country.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=108%2E61531%2Egakmt7)
Hello,
We need all hands on deck if we’re going to keep Vermont, and the Senate, blue.
With the Senate hanging in the balance, we cannot afford to lose a single seat. And this election, our entire progressive agenda is on the line. Voting rights, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, lowering prescription drug prices, reproductive justice, racial and economic justice — _it all depends on if we can win here in Vermont and keep the Senate blue._
[**That’s why we need your help. In order to deliver progress for the country, our campaign needs the resources necessary to win. Can you chip in right away to send Peter’s progressive voice to the Senate?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1418?t=3&akid=108%2E61531%2Egakmt7)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, you donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1418?t=14&amount=3&akid=108%2E61531%2Egakmt7)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1418?t=16&amount=15&akid=108%2E61531%2Egakmt7)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1418?t=18&amount=28&akid=108%2E61531%2Egakmt7)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1418?t=20&amount=50&akid=108%2E61531%2Egakmt7)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1418?t=10&amount=100&akid=108%2E61531%2Egakmt7)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1418?t=12&akid=108%2E61531%2Egakmt7)
---

---
We know this much: Mitch McConnell and national Republicans will spare no expense trying to buy this seat and take back the Senate. Our campaign isn't taking money from corporate PACs — instead we’re powered by folks like you pitching in what they can, when they can. We _need_ your support to ensure we keep fighting back.
**Peter has delivered as Vermont’s Congressman, and once elected, he’ll deliver as Senator.**
[**Pitch in $15 or whatever you can to show you’re ready to keep this seat — and the Senate — blue.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1418?t=7&akid=108%2E61531%2Egakmt7)
Thanks for your support,
Team Welch

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22feb?refcode=eem_20220218_f_t_donate&refcode2=108_61531_gakmt7&akid=108%2E61531%2Egakmt7)
---

---

---|---|---

Richmond, VT 05477

body:
| | | [ ](https://charlieforgovernor.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f407e0a8a35bc04db6508d81&id=938aad259d&e=df21354de5)
---
| **NEWT GINGRICH ENDORSES CHARLIE FOR GOV.**
"I was born in Harrisburg, raised in Central Pennsylvania and still have family there so I care deeply about the future of the Keystone State.

"I've seen the devastation that Tom Wolf and Josh Shapiro have caused. It's absolutely essential that we defeat them this year.

"I'm proud to endorse Charlie Gerow for Governor. Charlie has a long record of fighting for individual liberty and economic growth. His ability to take on the Left in the media is well-known. He will beat Josh Shapiro and make Pennsylvania great again."

clean_body: | | | | Two MASSIVE endorsements. | Peter, First, President Trump endorsed Harriet Hageman. Then yesterday, Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy endorsed Harriet in her bid to defeat Cheney. And now, House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik, endorses Harriet Hageman! Look at what Elise Stefanik had to say >> Elise Stefanik ran against Cheney for Conference Chair and WON, she knows what it takes to beat Liz Cheney. That is why she stepped up and endorsed Harriet. Harriet knew it was time to stand up and be the voice for Wyoming the moment that Liz Cheney abandoned her State and the GOP while picking personal fights with anyone who disagreed with her. It’s time to take back our country and restore an America First Agenda. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

subject: We’re facing a supply chain crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erika Benfield for Congress
body:
Biden is failing America [](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=f63547e930164bac9ebac016ab842d58&_e=atEAddCfSy5--FO1FsI403RXmxO9RvKpf52gjSkf_N_PFObfgkKFsqzN9YZYEQ8Ny75FuQ4jsaPOdC_u61reckI6l3mEddbZ_7uw8pulHzf8twjuWfhQdocTURKLNujoqx9wa_oMv5fkgLlJX_zvJncow0z4pB4yosdZqbsIPokSsSUx75CQqICnoR_GFlj_gLv7nCHYYuEE46MaRyWE5YJXRJwe-DitenyAylsFl7soJx8_5w1AOWFw-J--SX0P3_4uRVm1wdYCPMg9cddhgxJ5gIQV5v6x-PDWD6IZ27XQuFZ12kpfPHd84FNoNRprRaj4wbpjDH2D3HPf1DByoQ%3D%3D) Hi Peter, Supply chain issues are plaguing the nation, and Biden’s failed leadership has left America’s businesses in turmoil. You can see it for yourself any time you head to the grocery store. Now more than ever, we need business-focused Republicans to be elected to Congress so we can clean up the Biden Administration’s mess. clean_body: Biden is failing America Hi Peter, Supply chain issues are plaguing the nation, and Biden’s failed leadership has left America’s businesses in turmoil. You can see it for yourself any time you head to the grocery store. Now more than ever, we need business-focused Republicans to be elected to Congress so we can clean up the Biden Administration’s mess. This is one of the many reasons why I am running to be your next Congresswoman. Times are challenging, but I sincerely appreciate any amount you are comfortable contributing. We’re doing everything we can to kick Nancy Pelosi and her far-Left extremists out of Washington, and I am grateful for your support. Thank you, Erika Benfield Candidate for Congress, FL | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Erika Benfield for Congress

| | Peter, We officially launched our campaign for Michigan’s new Eleventh District this week, and the response has been overwhelming. We’re building a progressive, grassroots team that can win, but we need to hear directly from you. [_**Can you add your name to personally endorse our campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963209/331073638/-183017515?refcode=em_20220218_f_n_endorse&ms=em_20220218_f_n_endorse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzkyMzY2Zi1mNjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bt9_EiTIoCjbiegLpNrSFSiy9L5OD5XSUYuwlcYsmzo=&emci=b01aa2d6-e990-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=dc92366f-f690-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=22034926) Andy’s been busy in Congress, fighting for our progressive ideals. He introduced legislation that will allow Congressional staffers to unionize. And in the light of the tragic Oxford High School shooting in the district, he unveiled a bill that will protect our kids from unsecured firearms and enhance gun safety education for young Americans. But potential opponents and the GOP are counting on us to give up, and are willing to do anything to chip away at our successes. That’s why we need your support now more than ever to hold and expand our Democratic majorities this November. Our campaign is looking to add as many names as we can to our list of supporters by midnight tonight, and it would be an honor if you endorsed our campaign. Our campaign is making national headlines, and we’re proud to have the support from some of the biggest leaders in the progressive movement — from the SEIU to Senator Elizabeth Warren, the momentum is continuing to build. [_**We need all hands on deck to show the strength of our movement, and the simple but powerful action of signing on to show your support is the first step. Thank you for being in this fight.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963210/331073639/-183017515?refcode=em_20220218_f_n_endorse&ms=em_20220218_f_n_endorse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzkyMzY2Zi1mNjkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bt9_EiTIoCjbiegLpNrSFSiy9L5OD5XSUYuwlcYsmzo=&emci=b01aa2d6-e990-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=dc92366f-f690-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=22034926) As Andy likes to say, let’s go! Nicole P.S. name: Team Kovacs
subject: We need EVERY MAGA supporter on board!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN KOVACS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Help John bring back our America First agenda!>>>
| | |
---
Fellow Conservative, You know what’s at stake in this race –America is on the WRONG TRACK under one-party Democrat rule in the D.C. Swamp. In just over a year, Biden and Pelosi have DESTROYED all the great success our country achieved under President Trump. **John is the only America First outsider in this race –and he’s 100% committed to flipping this seat red, firing Pelosi, and bringing back our MAGA agenda in the House.** But he can’t do it alone –we need all hands on deck to TAKE BACK our country this November!

Peter, just in case you missed it yesterday, I wanted to follow-up personally: _**Latino Victory Fund endorsed our campaign for Congress!**_ | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963824/331076468/355891186?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220218LVF2_dyc_allop_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGJhYWEzZC1mOTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QD4M0SgtsrArrwVwh9oAoGeFc7GsX2W-vatEk4tqGRc=)
---
40 years after my parents came to Colorado from Mexico with the hope that their kids would live the American Dream, I’m honored to accept Latino Victory Fund’s endorsement.
I know intimately the struggles that Latino families face everyday. With Spanish as the language we spoke at home, I remember starting to learn English from watching Sesame Street. I have treated patients who came to my pediatric clinic simply so they could have a pediatrician who shares their cultural background and is fluent in their language.
The Latino community here is my community — their love, support, and unfailing belief in me is a foundational reason for why I’m in this race. And believe me when I say: **I’m not going to let them down.**
[**Will you make a contribution TODAY to stand with Latino Victory Fund in support of our campaign for Colorado’s 8th District?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41963825/331076471/355891186?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220218LVF2_dyc_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGJhYWEzZC1mOTkwLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QD4M0SgtsrArrwVwh9oAoGeFc7GsX2W-vatEk4tqGRc=)

clean_body: | = Peter, just in case you missed it yesterday, I wanted to follow-up personally: Latino Victory Fund endorsed our campaign for Congress! | = 40 years after my parents came to Colorado from Mexico with the hope that their kids would live the American Dream, I’m honored to accept Latino Victory Fund’s endorsement. I know intimately the struggles that Latino families face everyday. With Spanish as the language we spoke at home, I remember starting to learn English from watching Sesame Street. I have treated patients who came to my pediatric clinic simply so they could have a pediatrician who shares their cultural background and is fluent in their language. The Latino community here is my community — their love, support, and unfailing belief in me is a foundational reason for why I’m in this race. And believe me when I say: I’m not going to let them down. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = For far too long, Latinos have been shut out of our politics, with their voices and values silenced. MEET KELLI
---
Dr. Kelli Ward is an osteopathic physician and former Arizona State Senator from Lake Havasu City, AZ. During her tenure in the state legislature, Ward established a proven track record of working hand in hand with all Republicans to pass legislation that increased freedom, opportunity and prosperity for all Arizonans. Kelli Ward cares deeply about the people of the great state of Arizona and demonstrates this everyday as the Chairman of the Republican Party of Arizona.

| Team, when it comes to the AZ GOP and voter suppression, things have taken a drastic turn.

The AZ GOP are throwing everything they have at us in hopes of ensuring GOP victories in 2022. They have proposed everything from **allowing the legislature to overturn election results to completely banning early voting.**

We’ve been successful in organizing opposition against the worst bills, but there’s still a chance bad voter suppression legislation will get passed.

If we flip the governor’s mansion and the AZ legislature, we stop these efforts in their tracks.

| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/P4raFv-_)

This is the most important email I have ever sent you.

\-- I watched Republicans launch **more than 400** voter suppression bills nationwide to keep Democrats from ever winning another election.

**\-- Now, MSNBC just warned that if we lose our democracy in this election, "we are unlikely to get it back during our lifetimes."**

I cannot overstate the severity of this situation:

**[If we want to save our Majorities and STOP Republicans from barging back into power for the rest of our lives, I'm going to need every single Democrat to step up and do their part in this historic election. I'm calling on 3,000 Democrats to confirm their 2022 Memberships before midnight tonight. Can I count on you to step up? I cannot overstate how catastrophic the consequences would be if Democrats lost our Majority in this pivotal election >>](https://links.e.dccc.)** | | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

subject: One of many reasons to recall Gascon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Support the Recall of District Attorney George Gascon
body:
Gascon's office became friendly with the murderer's family and decided to let him out of jail. Gascon's office became friendly with the murderer's family and decided to let him out of jail. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e46c2de4f4ae4806877e09a6fc3a65d7&_e=iIAfLKD1Rp0D90rh6jonWA0v7OUtYMHei_9dF1u_H7Y_AA0jsTs8UXtW3lKcHBrkXIX0Jb_bBD3PnqEVEab3w3d4-ILlo1VdyBDdVEaLf7wU-GczyKM9Oy7jlIQ2w8AtYFLb86jG5XBuXIYG0YDkzDui9d7IDKK-lLLgP-1LJVR_Y30CXZvHjAjhxkAO2fsDQmXO-3yoO-2bSdnz13gwI_0b1trvkGaPOIzLznusX4xnFiD6vjyDJqTgn2EqksLt04-eGdG0I_XIXCMdYHCzgGzi8TEVC0X74GdYTbXZX-9VppnNR_t7ps1nIe-Ch-ZHsVhWCoToy_l7kEmzrSbGGPuKZsK5q8Gmtpo006YC3oJ7-qfJHl-mVpDRuMYRANGeOd8CaktUIYaegggYJmlj935C1Jz26rCBT4gnsXIE6Dv4dLOkl_voak4gnWFtdcoB)
---
Peter,

**A killer will only serve six years of a 50-year sentence because the prosecutor declined to present any evidence on orders from George Gascón himself!** That’s right, Gascón wanted to let this murderer out of jail and sent a Deputy DA to do his dirty work.

He was convicted of murder and robbery and received sentencing enhancements for gang and gun crimes after killing a man in cold blood outside a restaurant in Palmdale.

**Gascón's office became friendly with the murderer's family and decided to let him out of jail. There's jailhouse evidence of this![If you weren’t in favor of recalling George Gascón at the beginning of this email, are you now?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e46c2de4f4ae4806877e09a6fc3a65d7&_e=iIAfLKD1Rp0D90rh6jonWA0v7OUtYMHei_9dF1u_H7Y_AA0jsTs8UXtW3lKcHBrkXIX0Jb_bBD3PnqEVEab3w3d4-ILlo1VdyBDdVEaLf7wU-GczyKM9Oy7jlIQ2w8AtYFLb86jG5XBuXIYG0YDkzDui9d7IDKK-lLLgP-1LJVR_Y30CXZvHjAjhxkAO2fsDQmXO-3yoO-2bSdnz13gwI_0b1trvkGaPOIzLznusX4y0u8iNesjpPJY363SmGX8egh3Pqyiv7OllsBoT5MwOj3y_omHZhRgX0rxURefnSqpUogjSbvQWyWtgtJe3736zIsNWvD-cUTXqunllriIigmh44xWaJMc1T5V6ebur3ApJYQ1iAMv6MHw41j0yqa0SksZUyA7rcYxruvmJAYjCxLxx8hV4fjijckEF7T2oBu9bVtApBJJCrYSIjXZzFr4u)**

Even the defendant's family was shocked that this was happening. In the jailhouse recording, the murderer’s mother said, _**"We never thought the district attorney would be on our side."**_

The Deputy District Attorneys of the LA DA's office are not Public Defenders. They are supposed to represent the people, not become friends with the defendant's family.

**George Gascón thinks that he makes the rules, that he is above the law, and he is responsible to no one.** Peter - we know that's not true, and we now have an opportunity to tell him that straight to his face.

[**We are officially circulating the petition to recall Los Angeles District Attorney George Gascón!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e46c2de4f4ae4806877e09a6fc3a65d7&_e=iIAfLKD1Rp0D90rh6jonWA0v7OUtYMHei_9dF1u_H7Y_AA0jsTs8UXtW3lKcHBrkXIX0Jb_bBD3PnqEVEab3w3d4-ILlo1VdyBDdVEaLf7wU-GczyKM9Oy7jlIQ2w8AtYFLb86jG5XBuXIYG0YDkzDui9d7IDKK-lLLgP-1LJVR_Y30CXZvHjAjhxkAO2fsDQmXO-3yoO-2bSdnz13gwI_0b1trvkGaPOIzLznusX4zDeTk_2TV_vzXP5WGX9JSf82GOgm4n7FRp2oXB6DRlxxD8NdbXN5Gk_TEpAuVzxsim83vJfWFh40QeyS6GpxhCk8Z73UbxHo15rhgUd3j1Ve9Lr85zFIxZX_tspRDNBs2EfzuONPgqbzZgoVUv4rBT8WxuD6BphEA7bKXy3eD4TXI5BP-HjRTLg5Lq-Vt00szt830islgsW7dXBOC_KDQ1)

As I'm sure you know, Los Angeles is a mega county. **We need to gather signatures from at least 10% of registered voters, that’s more than 560,000 signatures.** [**To be blunt, we're going to need a lot of cash to make that happen.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e46c2de4f4ae4806877e09a6fc3a65d7&_e=iIAfLKD1Rp0D90rh6jonWA0v7OUtYMHei_9dF1u_H7Y_AA0jsTs8UXtW3lKcHBrkXIX0Jb_bBD3PnqEVEab3w3d4-ILlo1VdyBDdVEaLf7wU-GczyKM9Oy7jlIQ2w8AtYFLb86jG5XBuXIYG0YDkzDui9d7IDKK-lLLgP-1LJVR_Y30CXZvHjAjhxkAO2fsDQmXO-3yoO-2bSdnz13gwI_0b1trvkGaPOIzLznusX4zLSSY_9qAG7tQlruD1wlh4rhPnpw8yDdntM-zGI6oJTJRVParv9qPyNqPjsgy2W5PJFoJnPpxWs0spNA72JwZ3t3mg0CDy-E0wOftvWrvmYdntYmrnnKk8FbAf6MYU8tJ-tnwEG6XlNYwLWyx3ddaBl5sqZnqHnoppb-R1ziLu5bi3ECDAsRnL5S8A1NwbPzr_BEe0PvDQCrrbpq8NE9_k)

[**Can you help us end George Gascón's reign of terror over Los Angeles County by chipping in $10 right now to help us distribute 20 petitions?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e46c2de4f4ae4806877e09a6fc3a65d7&_e=iIAfLKD1Rp0D90rh6jonWA0v7OUtYMHei_9dF1u_H7Y_AA0jsTs8UXtW3lKcHBrkXIX0Jb_bBD3PnqEVEab3w3d4-ILlo1VdyBDdVEaLf7wU-GczyKM9Oy7jlIQ2w8AtYFLb86jG5XBuXIYG0YDkzDui9d7IDKK-lLLgP-1LJVR_Y30CXZvHjAjhxkAO2fsDQmXO-3yoO-2bSdnz13gwI_0b1trvkGaPOIzLznusX4zOkZgZRA5TAnJmvHLohLuzO4gwV1k-c5aDw6hUyHGccnZN6IkwEvPGBd9JnkT7Qh8yHAqgJ6CQez-wD4_KVHy6lea_rYryEaUCZnqf-AP5DyyOitIFnxmAmruRBUSOCJuvw8FjxPNDxWz8gQZzsCzGLtSAU3eenmJZ_i0aP5FBlP-yX47YgnkCaQ-BUHG5xNkLwJ222ficNB-FPIq72rPb)

Gascon's office became friendly with the murderer's family and decided to let him out of jail. | Peter, A killer will only serve six years of a 50-year sentence because the prosecutor declined to present any evidence on orders from George Gascón himself! That’s right, Gascón wanted to let this murderer out of jail and sent a Deputy DA to do his dirty work. He was convicted of murder and robbery and received sentencing enhancements for gang and gun crimes after killing a man in cold blood outside a restaurant in Palmdale. Gascón's office became friendly with the murderer's family and decided to let him out of jail. There's jailhouse evidence of this Even the defendant's family was shocked that this was happening. In the jailhouse recording, the murderer’s mother said, "We never thought the district attorney would be on our side." The Deputy District Attorneys of the LA DA's office are not Public Defenders. They are supposed to represent the people, not become friends with the defendant's family. George Gascón thinks that he makes the rules, that he is above the law, and he is responsible to no one. Peter - we know that's not true, and we now have an opportunity to tell him that straight to his face. As I'm sure you know, Los Angeles is a mega county. We need to gather signatures from at least 10% of registered voters, that’s more than 560,000 signatures. Thank you for your support! Greg Foster Campaign Manager Recall DA George Gascón Committee P.S. If you live in Los Angeles County, we need your signature now! | Paid for by Committee to Support the Recall of District Attorney George Gascon ID#1440808 500 West Colorado Street, Unit C #455 Glendale, CA 91204 Committee major funding from: Gerald J. Marcil, Geoff Palmer, Ioaban LLC and affiliated entities Don't want to receive any more of our emails:

clean_body: Our final ad-buy deadline before election day is TONIGHT. | Friend, Early voting is in full swing and tonight’s 10:45 P.M. ad-buy deadline is our FINAL buy before our March 1 election. But as it stands, we’re still $23,875 short for our placement. As I write you this email, Texas voters are already casting their ballots – and every minute our ad goes unaired is a potential voter lost. As the very first election of 2022, we can’t leave anything to chance. Winning this race is the first step in our battle to take back the House from Pelosi’s control. With only 5 seats needed to END her majority, this truly is our make-or-break moment of the election year, Friend. But if we can’t make our final ad placement, it could all be for nothing come election day. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. body:
The RINOs are loose again...😐
---

| Unapologetically American. Undeniably Original. The Candidate for We the People.

This week: Counterpunch - Responding to Grant County Republican Party Chairman
---
[Watch it here live today at 7:00 pm.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cBTvUpSbLXFZ0yUT91pbFYZLR7HTE5ctIcnw0JTYk4jmNSDHO9ZK6woLKwLnJJrWtzlGzSKBO61lbCHyl6K2z42gCs3La2Y0GvBl_N7kssco2YHAjkRu0ew_E1ppyVWw9lJAK6zP_4JiBJpNTa-qPBKPPcCaDohtZPl6jfd_xhk=&c=GYjC1hAote60nBY9jisDjm3EKPsDLoHjOetdrYGqLzl_0DYfvmYtyg==&ch=kwmmRq96_2Q8W2EQdIfVcwfTESiB5xVmMwBcEAdJdycl8CSspq11kw==)

| We're coming to Goldendale, WA in Klickitat County on February 26, 2022, to Stand Up for America and we want to see you there!
[Click here for location and event details.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cBTvUpSbLXFZ0yUT91pbFYZLR7HTE5ctIcnw0JTYk4jmNSDHO9ZK6woLKwLnJJrWvgWAz0ATvKgQ55RRpxImd_7BrRz5eHgV3nQsgUWKvvah5NA0qBbLCqFDpG7FHo7v9dAOrsTYO5cLqiDEdxVxPNSFDaTEm0LCv6D16S80gwwtVaiVq3e_cEuRX9o6QA41_I8zUqX_U3JuvoEcuZGqt2Rvduf1KFm0&c=GYjC1hAote60nBY9jisDjm3EKPsDLoHjOetdrYGqLzl_0DYfvmYtyg==&ch=kwmmRq96_2Q8W2EQdIfVcwfTESiB5xVmMwBcEAdJdycl8CSspq11kw==)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| We Need Unity Not Conformity.
---
| | |
---|---
|
Some bad actors in the liberal Mainstream Republican Party in Washington State, instigated by the Grant County Republican Chairman Mike McKee, have been spreading the rumor that I bashed the Republican Party based on comments I made a few months ago at a campaign event. Tonight, I am going to air the never-before-seen video recording of my comments. [You can watch the Livestream at 7:00 PM here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cBTvUpSbLXFZ0yUT91pbFYZLR7HTE5ctIcnw0JTYk4jmNSDHO9ZK6x7OK5F_n0xKlra3-5p7eiAvKnaoBu76MkgBGuGT4_3jLPoRzjVj88rtDTm2nrOZofsM7UsuJhYzFX3hdJ-LCNjq8wWqEGyUQaBnGvsqSl-Q962GVOEUEzo=&c=GYjC1hAote60nBY9jisDjm3EKPsDLoHjOetdrYGqLzl_0DYfvmYtyg==&ch=kwmmRq96_2Q8W2EQdIfVcwfTESiB5xVmMwBcEAdJdycl8CSspq11kw==) I have a good idea that these bad actors wouldn't have lied about the exchange had they known we had video evidence of what was actually said.

I want you to see the video so you can see the truth for yourself. While I completely support the platform of the Republican Party and the values they espouse, the Republican Party will always take a back seat to my loyalty to God, Family, and Country--in that order.

As I stated in the video, I have always been a Republican. As long as the Republican Party platform supports our Constitutional rights, the Right to Life, and reflects the will of We the People within that framework, I will always be a Republican. However, I will not stand silent while the liberal Republican so-called "elites" in the party side with the Democrats to undermine true conservatives who are fighting for the American people. If that's the Grant County Chairman's definition of unity then I want no part of that type of "unity" because it's not unity at all--it's conformity. If unity is spreading rumors behind someone's back as the Grant County Chairman did, I want no part of that unity either. Talk about fracturing the party.

We need people in office who will not conform with party politics at the expense of We the People. The days of trying to play nice, reach across the aisle and reason with the radical left are gone and have been gone for a long time. We need Republicans who have a backbone, who will stand up and fight for America. This isn't politics as usual for the Democrats and RINOs who are trying to ruin our country. For me, this is a fight for freedom, this is a fight for the American people and this is a fight to save our Republic and the freedoms we grew up with.

I will not back down. I will fight like no one you have ever seen. Too many patriots who've come before us have sacrificed everything they had to ensure our individual freedom and liberty for me to do anything different. That fighting spirit is one of the main reasons [President Trump officially endorsed our campaign last week (read it here).](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cBTvUpSbLXFZ0yUT91pbFYZLR7HTE5ctIcnw0JTYk4jmNSDHO9ZK6x7OK5F_n0xKL9O4-mquiWpJz1V0KJw7bG9B0WCEGY_X9rMH-CytsEOw50xweOaixjWrwcO_NljFSxl6rqYOE7-2pyhtcgyzKOoNUtbZLPZw_tJvNLzHwoUyVEAKRm96jsBTVgVfu7Ep&c=GYjC1hAote60nBY9jisDjm3EKPsDLoHjOetdrYGqLzl_0DYfvmYtyg==&ch=kwmmRq96_2Q8W2EQdIfVcwfTESiB5xVmMwBcEAdJdycl8CSspq11kw==)

There is no better way to cause fracturing and division than by spreading rumors. I'm not a fan of rumors. I prefer truth and there it is. If you're like me and prefer the truth, give the Grant County Republican Party Chairman Mike McKee a call at 509-421-5933 or send him an email to [mike@mikesbbqquincy.com](mailto:mike@mikesbbqquincy.com) and tell him to stop fracturing the Republican Party by spreading misinformation about our campaign. We need unity among conservatives--not conformity with the RINO wing of the Republican Party disguised as unity.

In Liberty,

Loren

The Candidate for We the People. | | | == | | | | Upcoming Events | Watch Loren's weekly show, Loren Live! at 7:00 PM every Tuesday evening on Facebook, YouTube, and now streaming on Twitter! More platforms are coming soon! This week: Counterpunch - Responding to Grant County Republican Party Chairman == | | We're coming to Goldendale, WA in Klickitat County on February 26, 2022, to Stand Up for America and we want to see you there! == | | | | | | | We Need Unity Not Conformity. | | | ---|--- | Some bad actors in the liberal Mainstream Republican Party in Washington State, instigated by the Grant County Republican Chairman Mike McKee, have been spreading the rumor that I bashed the Republican Party based on comments I made a few months ago at a campaign event. Tonight, I am going to air the never-before-seen video recording of my comments. == I have a good idea that these bad actors wouldn't have lied about the exchange had they known we had video evidence of what was actually said. I want you to see the video so you can see the truth for yourself. While I completely support the platform of the Republican Party and the values they espouse, the Republican Party will always take a back seat to my loyalty to God, Family, and Country--in that order. As I stated in the video, I have always been a Republican. As long as the Republican Party platform supports our Constitutional rights, the Right to Life, and reflects the will of We the People within that framework, I will always be a Republican. However, I will not stand silent while the liberal Republican so-called "elites" in the party side with the Democrats to undermine true conservatives who are fighting for the American people. If that's the Grant County Chairman's definition of unity then I want no part of that type of "unity" because it's not unity at all--it's conformity. If unity is spreading rumors behind someone's back as the Grant County Chairman did, I want no part of that unity either. Talk about fracturing the party. We need people in office who will not conform with party politics at the expense of We the People. The days of trying to play nice, reach across the aisle and reason with the radical left are gone and have been gone for a long time. We need Republicans who have a backbone, who will stand up and fight for America. This isn't politics as usual for the Democrats and RINOs who are trying to ruin our country. For me, this is a fight for freedom, this is a fight for the American people and this is a fight to save our Republic and the freedoms we grew up with. I will not back down. I will fight like no one you have ever seen. Too many patriots who've come before us have sacrificed everything they had to ensure our individual freedom and liberty for me to do anything different. That fighting spirit is one of the main reasons == There is no better way to cause fracturing and division than by spreading rumors. I'm not a fan of rumors. I prefer truth and there it is. If you're like me and prefer the truth, give the Grant County Republican Party Chairman Mike McKee a call at 509-421-5933 or send him an email to mailto:mike@mikesbbqquincy.com and tell him to stop fracturing the Republican Party by spreading misinformation about our campaign. Fellow Conservative,

Governor Youngkin is taking the crucial first steps to stop the disastrous mask mandates that Radical Left politicians are forcing on the American people. name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: Senate Republicans are boycotting this critical vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
GOP political stunts reached a new low.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4285?t=2&akid=12944%2E53494%2En7CqF_) Friend, This Tuesday, President Biden's five Federal Reserve nominees were supposed to face a committee vote, but instead, Sen. Pat Toomey sabotaged the process by leading the Senate Banking Republicans in a cheap political stunt. _They refused to show up to do their jobs_ , and now Biden's nominees are stuck in limbo. We need these five nominees confirmed ASAP—their positions at the Federal Reserve are critical to tackling today's record-high inflation, securing jobs, and mitigating the serious threat that the climate crisis poses to our financial system. Sen. Toomey's political blockade on Tuesday shows that in order to get what they want, Republicans are willing to sabotage the economy and ignore the overwhelming consensus (among regulators, countless businesses, and the finance industry) that climate change is a profound threat to our financial system and must be addressed. Senate Majority Leader Schumer can't buckle under the Republican pressure to stop the confirmation process—we need to advance every one of these nominees together ASAP, leaving no one behind. [**_Will you sign our petition calling on Senator Schumer to ignore the Republicans' stunts and fight to advance all five candidates who need to start getting to work fighting inflation and protecting our economy from climate risk?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4285?t=3&akid=12944%2E53494%2En7CqF_) Thank you, Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen Action | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4285?t=4&akid=12944%2E53494%2En7CqF_)

| Fellow Democrats,
We know what it means to be fearful for our democracy. We felt it on January 6th of last year, when insurrectionists stormed the Capitol trying to overturn a the results of a free and fair election. I feel it today as well, looking at Ronny Jackson's Twitter!

[](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=97895e2d8e&e=4712f71bea)

Ronny cheers on the anti-democratic movement in Canada that explicitly takes inspiration from the January 6 insurrection.

Good thing we know how to stand up to wannabe authoritarians like Ronny, we did in 2020 by electing President Biden, and we can do it again in 2022. But it's going to take all of us.

[Can you chip in $5 today to stand with Democrats in protecting American democracy?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=a24e32ffd9&e=4712f71bea)

All my thanks,

Kathleen Brown
Democrat for Congress
TX-13

Good thing we know how to stand up to wannabe authoritarians like Ronny, we did in 2020 by electing President Biden, and we can do it again in 2022. But it's going to take all of us. All my thanks, Kathleen Brown Democrat for Congress TX-13 | | "Pitch in to Protect Democracy!" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © Kathleen for Congress, All rights reserved. name: Alex Padilla
subject: It's an election year
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
I hope you'll give me a chance to explain
#

I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate. But first, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why your contribution — _particularly right now_ — is so important to our success.
The unfortunate reality is that Republicans, both in California and across the country, are more committed to preserving the status quo than solving the problems we’re facing.
And now that we’re in an election year, they’re going to be coming after us. They’ll do — and spend — whatever they can to try to stop our movement. _That’s because they’d love nothing more than to replace California’s first Latino U.S. Senator with a right-wing Trump supporter who will vote in lockstep with Mitch McConnell._
**It’s incredibly important that we have the resources to take on the deep-pocketed Republicans and special interests who will be coming for this seat, so I am asking you directly:**
[**Can you please make a contribution to our people-powered campaign today? Every donation will go right to work doing the organizing and on-the-ground outreach it’s going to take to win this race.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-feb22?refcode=em220218-1-30&t=1&refcode2=653_159979_FbfWtx&akid=653%2E159979%2EFbfWtx)
