name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: Bill McSwain On Release of Louisville Candidate Shooter
body:
Bill McSwain said that the swift release of Quintez Brown was an example of the importance of implementing pre-trial detention for violent felonies. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-on-release-of-louisville-candidate-shooter?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**February 18, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain On Release of Louisville Candidate Shooter

_The release of Quintez Brown is an example of the importance of pre-trial detention for violent criminals _

**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, on Friday condemned the release of social justice activist Quintez Brown, who stands charged with attempted murder after opening fire on Jewish mayoral candidate Craig Greenberg in his campaign headquarters. Despite the severity of the charges, Brown was bailed out by a local Black Lives Matter chapter and released from custody less than 48 hours after the crime took place.

In his statement Friday, McSwain emphasized the importance of bail reform, arguing that the woke-first policies of liberal politicians have created an environment that rewards violent criminals and endangers law-abiding citizens:
---
|
> **_"Instead of working to protect law-abiding citizens, liberal politicians across the nation are ignoring rising crime rates that they have caused - because they care more about the progressive agenda than the safety of their citizens.
>
> To release a violent criminal like Quintez Brown less than 48 hours after attempted murder is despicable and dangerous. Anyone who is charged with a violent felony should face automatic pretrial detention. Anything less is a slap in the face to the victims of these crimes, as well as a callous disregard for public safety.
>
> While Brown's release took place in Kentucky, we must prevent similar scenarios in Pennsylvania by ending revolving door criminal justice. There is no reason for violent felons to be let loose on our streets, and as Governor, I will implement measures to protect law-abiding citizens from becoming the victims of individuals who are a known danger to society."_**
---
|
---
| McSwain's plan to restore law and order to Pennsylvania, including the implementation of automatic pretrial detention for violent felonies, is [available here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=245b210fb4&e=b1ec95759b).
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=f6c312293a&e=b1ec95759b)
###

subject: Big Money Candidates Won’t Save our Democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress
body:
Let’s flip our district from Big Business to Public Interest | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ad898066490a/happy-holidays-and-new-year-from-team-smilowitz-15863307?e=0faa9de128)
---
| | [ ](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=4c1c47e9bc&e=0faa9de128)
---
| | Dear Peter,
This is Ben Smilowitz, Democrat for Congress in Maryland’s 6th Congressional District.

I’m writing to share some quick updates on the campaign’s progress. It’s been a busy past few weeks. I’ve been **connecting with several thousands of voters across the district** , introducing myself and my campaign and listening to their concerns.

**My grassroots campaign has already** built a team of dozens of dedicated volunteers and we’ve enlisted the support of fundraising and compliance firms to bolster our efforts, none of which would be possible without your help **– THANK YOU!**

My focus is on the public interest. As you know, **I am a longtime social justice advocate and have championed a range of causes that put people first.** For the last 15 years, I have worked to improve our nation’s response to disasters and strengthen local organizations on the front lines of climate and public health disasters, including COVID-19. **I am ready to take these fights to Congress to prioritize our families, our democracy, and our planet.**
---
| |
---
I am proud of our accomplishments, but I also recognize that we need the support of people, just like you, to reach voters across the district. I’m up against an incumbent who **still leads** his multi-billion dollar business while serving in Congress. We all know that our democracy is not going to be saved by a representative who spent $25 million to buy his election.

**We are rapidly fundraising to achieve our goal of doubling our cash on hand by the end of the month. **__Can you donate to our movement to help us reach that goal?__
---
| [Chip In To Support Our Campaign Today](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=206697c0e2&e=0faa9de128 "Chip In To Support Our Campaign Today")
---
| _We have an opportunity to change the current political landscape, get big money out of politics, and put people first._

**Peter, I am always available to connect with you. If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback, please do not hesitate to reach out. I’m excited to represent YOU on Capitol Hill.**

With a sincere commitment to accountability and transparency,
Ben
**Ben Smilowitz
Democrat for Congress (MD-06)**

Gaithersburg, MD 20884
[ben@bensmilowitz.com](mailto:ben@bensmilowitz.com)
(301) 578-5888

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, It was an exciting week for the campaign, as Jane continues to gain momentum towards the May 3rd primary. With the endorsement from U.S. Senator Rob Portman and former Trump Adviser Kellyanne Conway, a brand-new ad, and events all across Ohio, Jane is making her case to voters as to why she is the best, America First candidate for U.S. Senate in Ohio. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **U.S. Senator Rob Portman Endorses Jane Timken** On Wednesday, the campaign was proud to announce the endorsement from U.S. Senator Rob Portman to fill his seat. Senator Portman has built a reputation in the Senate as a respected conservative leader who can bring people together to deliver results. Senator Portman’s endorsement adds to the growing enthusiasm behind Timken’s candidacy and is a clear shift in this race. Recent polling shows that Jane has surged on the ballot and is within striking distance of the lead. We are thrilled to have his endorsement and look forward to working with him to ensure that Ohio’s U.S. Senate seat remains Republican. **Former Trump Adviser Kellyanne Conway Endorses Jane Timken** Former 2016 Campaign Manager and Senior Counselor to President Trump Kellyanne Conway endorsed Jane Timken for U.S. Senate on Wednesday. We are honored to have Kellyanne’s support and guidance as we head into the most crucial part of this campaign. Joining the campaign as Senior Strategist, we are confident that the insights and leadership that helped support President Trump’s incredible successes across the country will help Jane as we fight to keep Ohio’s crucial U.S. Senate seat red. **From the Trail** On Saturday, supporters in Wayne County hosted a great meet and greet in support of Jane. Jane discussed how she’d combat inflation, get Ohioans back to work, empower parents in schools, and secure the border. [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f9bda355847f46cfb74b8b6d7b3fbc3d&_e=1OuTOufKCGvps0J4BLLCrod_mVNQiK300uC9SEdELDjCO5YNcL35W1zRCyG8eEDYSDXTHcNiEdrLmXBleOU-G7k71Q_Zu2JDxK8lczonNbVH0JrXk-nOVTxdUqgzJBd9YTLFykm6DJR6GmC532pWXMNw-oAekEn06phT1-YGSRC4naaUfxRDGaYzkyqS1wkarjjks_HoWZ7r4qQ8Weg0bus2S6j7zy_74pA_kjqTXCAR6cxs_PEhwCJm5v1IN-xGRz16KQH-ucJmgrniJfovmBfL9ICDtFGrZWieWyVA6ULXHdi7000iSHuT0GZokUpnEJ8HY8XyynryHNbFKNtpLQ%3D%3D) In Huron County, State Rep. Dick Stein and State Central Committeewoman Patty Stein hosted an event for Jane and her supporters. It was great to visit Norwalk and talk directly with Ohioans about what Jane can accomplish with her brand of strong, conservative leadership. [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f9bda355847f46cfb74b8b6d7b3fbc3d&_e=1OuTOufKCGvps0J4BLLCrm29jZ20PhweWtuzSaiQVnqTIAXRmp6uLwSQS2jyDOJhcsczygZMPRJK7DRoKoYJWujbzPdOwtH0zFthGHrGz3zs-Wb_Asd3hAyPLT_eMyiDRLFzStOeZ64eNA4N0wU_6k2tn9zifsglMml-Bb6o3-0PJFSZTCufIoMMrfmrFlK678rUYbU8k1UG8JkbFfQldChg9I0RBrmTUJn5wLAHch_rQ2_mrsyVCZeymE_53DY8PgomNfjCxeXbZipGjmhV5w%3D%3D) On Saturday night, Jane joined the Buckeye Big Buck Club for their annual banquet. It was great to see such a big group of Ohio sportsmen celebrating Ohio’s wildlife and advancing our Second Amendment rights. As a U.S. Senator, Jane will always stand up for your Second Amendment rights. Jane joined the Logan County GOP for their monthly luncheon on Monday. It is always great to be in Bellefontaine and always great to talk to a group of fired up conservatives. Thanks to Logan County Chair Ranae Lentz for having us! **Overcompensating** This morning, the campaign released our newest ad, titled “Overcompensate”. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f9bda355847f46cfb74b8b6d7b3fbc3d&_e=1OuTOufKCGvps0J4BLLCrs_dBGg0MPUHT6SXA-CiiajfmiUTCAGEKBu7mhTN0VBASS7hEoHghKmPq3BH_bzv_Ef7f1xK4N_DCkVjGbBpPYfg5MIeXiFfrX4CbRpmo32oZHzF0gaYM9t0mwWB6NdvuO62fnhMHdj6QMjya4NWEi-K11dZcJJ3RIb_y5ctoweDth2N2-wzqRFS9P1Gxhj0jQXv7tBYp6rg2gQ_6a5BACu34n2PA7PVE0XeHZEh7PoN3nqa0N_PRreuzmBws-a1x73DR1yO1_ptIIn_d29od4Q%3D)
For the past five years, no one in Ohio has worked harder than Jane Timken to advance conservative leadership and the America First movement. While the other candidates quit on Ohioans, openly bashed President Trump, or just sat on the sidelines while there was work to be done, Jane was in the trenches fighting for your families and to give you a voice in Washington. While the other candidates talk a big game, they are just overcompensating.

I hope everyone has a great weekend.
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Time for a new Republican Party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
We need a real opposition to fight the Left | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066177?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=192eab5c1a&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Dear Patriot:

We found out last week that the CIA is collecting bulk data on every single American—illegally spying on the very people it claims to protect.

Special Counsel John Durham released more information about how Hillary Clinton and the DNC illegally spied on President Trump and his campaign during and after the 2016 election.

Republican Rep. Troy Nehls revealed that the Leftist assassination squad known as the U.S. Capitol Police broke into his Congressional office and photographed confidential material in an attempt to intimidate him.

Canada, our neighbor to the north—our largest trading partner—declared martial law and brutally broke up peaceful protests against its draconian and tyrannical Plandemic lockdowns, mandates, and internal passports.

And all of that was just in the last few days.

**Meanwhile, where is our Republican Party? Where are our self-proclaimed conservative “fighters,” our “warriors,” the people who tell us they represent us?**

They’re **__nowhere__** to be found.

They’re **_absolutely silent_** —just like they were silent when Communists stole the 2020 election.

My RINO opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, hasn’t said **__one word__** about the Deep State spying on his constituents.

He hasn’t said **__one word__** about the Democrats’ Russia hoax or their illegal espionage against President Trump.

He hasn’t said **__one word__** about the rogue Feds breaking into his own colleague’s office and intimidating him.

He hasn’t said _**_a single thing_**_ to support the heroic Canadian truckers fighting for their freedom, and he hasn’t said anything about Prime Minister Trudeau declaring martial law and suspending Canadians’ civil and human rights.

He only talks about “human rights” when it gives him the pretext to incite war in far-flung places like Ukraine so he can please his Deep State Military-Industrial Complex donors.

**Steve Womack doesn’t care about what happened to President Trump—he undermined Trump at every turn, blamed Trump for January 6 th, and called Trump supporters, along with anyone who tells the truth about election fraud, “un-patriotic, un-American extremists.”**

_My opponent isn’t alone, though. Almost the entire Republican Party is AWOL, fiddling on the roof while our country is turned into a totalitarian police state._

_It’s time to get these worthless jellyfish out of office and replace them with warriors who will stand up against the Deep State and FIGHT for the people._

**We’re running out of time—we might only have 1 or 2 elections left to turn this ship around before we really do lose it forever.**

**[_Step 1 in taking our country back is to REPLACE every single one of the toothless RINOs that keep holding us back_ _._

_I will FIGHT the Deep State, and they know it. That's why the __Establishment_ _ is doing everything it can to stop me._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=946684d029&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me tell the GOP Establishment that the people are DONE with their cowardice_ _ \-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=969e702a40&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, who aren't going to tuck tail and run when they get called mean names._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=3a943f76bb&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=df31924d93&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---
| |
---

NeilforArkansas.comPO Box 652Bentonville, AR 72712-0652

name: Andy Montesinos, Bethesda Restaurant Owner
subject: Maryland's restaurants need our support now more than ever
body:
We need help now, so that we can continue to be part of our community. We hope that the Maryland General Assembly strongly considers Doug's proposal to help our great small businesses when we need it most. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkjfxhCXAfn_D1mityz8LI2tmVPRXW3zdbGZKrUX9Nn4pb_l7PvKf6VvA0CB-Nwm5sUELowEv-2J7WUeW-mImRHd1tBE6EW3iWjrmDCt7vcD50XqiDtZeuHLKm7Y6nOn3EBs9Ibh9yj_jQIg1f3Vgt-4nPB_wADMdFvuP2Rugmhikt-UNOioP6sX0j4CAS0WnYqp-5gECyxRxV_lS0DTUAdMRdXMstCHFsPzsgCaDeu2yZtQvrwru2_ptHa4-p7dX2NGhbhcZTcOprJ5CIEKRERolqgpI07ds5o1dE9dxWeR5Ga05BSyYwRhO0YrHBr4E3fv5sbZ9GAJGEcyHu_M0m6BLlQqkD8addSrBwq4LMxSw/3jo/GuE3oTkaSKinySqTi4kgAw/h0/-ALLu_xTq96vnItRXNpBmQG2oDmFiZ6NJ-BrFUqISHs)
---
Hi friends, With the rising prices of food and supplies, small restaurants, like mine, need help from the State and County governments more than ever. **Doug's proposal to waive the sales and use tax for a few months would help us a lot.** The rise in number of COVID cases continue to make customers wary about going out to restaurants and the back-and-forth of regulations since March 2020 have added to the challenge small and family-owned businesses have been facing. **The pandemic still exists and so do its consequences.** We have already lost many of our great small, family-owned businesses permanently due to taxes and rising costs of goods. We need help NOW, so that we can continue to be part of our community. We hope that the Maryland General Assembly strongly considers Doug's proposal to help our great small businesses when we need it most.
---
**[Send a letter to Governor Hogan and your state representatives saying you support Doug's proposal today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkjfxhCXAfn_D1mityz8LI2tmVPRXW3zdbGZKrUX9Nn4pb_l7PvKf6VvA0CB-Nwm5sUELowEv-2J7WUeW-mImRHd1tBE6EW3iWjrmDCt7vcD50XqiDtZeuHLKm7Y6nOn3EBs9Ibh9yj_jQIg1f3Vgt-Wiq0CgnaDTtyQkcDTH8jCPs9MAjp_b3SkHiXDjyrvCQliLnVQ_Vugs1cJ_yZQ1C2eZxmCEhUWTTDf_JF1uBPCkZHQhoiuEeSt5aomVzREySw1jo7cD3TFNb5M0TizEGC_jr-zO8YVWxNpt8jZqMtr4pzDJDOvNS0U-37d_-9QXNm6yrHrmfQ-d8KzrjKX6L_ojM63q8kcNeSLRrWrPsi8A/3jo/GuE3oTkaSKinySqTi4kgAw/h1/rbLmyi01CC4ulAXtzNgmIwOykTykoW0H2S_enEDCNBg)**

clean_body: We need help now, so that we can continue to be part of our community. We hope that the Maryland General Assembly strongly considers Doug's proposal to help our great small businesses when we need it most. | | Hi friends, With the rising prices of food and supplies, small restaurants, like mine, need help from the State and County governments more than ever. Doug's proposal to waive the sales and use tax for a few months would help us a lot. The rise in number of COVID cases continue to make customers wary about going out to restaurants and the back-and-forth of regulations since March 2020 have added to the challenge small and family-owned businesses have been facing. The pandemic still exists and so do its consequences. We have already lost many of our great small, family-owned businesses permanently due to taxes and rising costs of goods. We need help NOW, so that we can continue to be part of our community. We hope that the Maryland General Assembly strongly considers Doug's proposal to help our great small businesses when we need it most. Thank you, Andy Montesinos Bethesda Restaurant Owner By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Friends of Doug Gansler, please .

name: Tim
subject: logging off?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ][IMG]

Folks, I know what many of you are thinking—why is Tim emailing me at 5
p.m. on a Friday? I was just getting ready to finally unplug for the
weekend...

If that’s you—great! I know you deserve it. Before you sign off, let’s all
take a moment to thank the labor movement for making this possible.

But we also know that for too many Americans, clocking out from one job
means clocking in for the next. People are working harder than ever
before, missing birthdays and weekends just to scrape by.

Our economy is broken, and that’s why I’m fighting so hard to tip the
balance of power back to working people. But to do that, we have to stop
Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1015&amount=28&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]If you’re with me, will you chip in $28 to help us win the race that
will decide Senate control? We can’t let McConnell and his GOP cronies
take back the Senate just so they can pass even more tax breaks for the
rich at the expense of hardworking Ohioans.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1016&amount=28&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Donate $28 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1017&amount=50&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1018&amount=100&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1019&amount=200&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1020&amount=250&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1021&amount=30&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Other Amount

I know from my own family that workers are better off when they’re able to
collectively bargain for fair wages and better working conditions.

The 40-hour week, workplace safety, the end of child labor, and more—all
because strong unions fought to protect and expand workers’ rights, and
because Congress listened to working people and passed legislation to turn
those protections into law. We need to do it again.

Unfortunately, my millionaire GOP opponents disagree—and have the full
support of billionaire-funded super PACs and dark-money mega-donors.

We have to win this Senate seat to expand our Democratic majority and give
Ohio the most pro-worker delegation in the Senate and make real change for
our working families. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1022&amount=28&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]So, before you unplug
for the weekend, will you make a grassroots donation of $28 right now to
flip Ohio blue and continue the fight to protect working families?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1009&amount=28&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Donate $28 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1010&amount=50&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1011&amount=100&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1012&amount=200&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1013&amount=250&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7725?t=1014&amount=30&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Other Amount

Thanks,

Tim Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7988?t=1007&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ]Tim Ryan with Starbucks employees

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=2382%2E3611125%2Euobdq_ ][IMG]

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Help the Obamas protect voting rights!
| | | **ALERT: YOUR SIGNATURE IS REQUESTED!**

Barack and Michelle Obama are asking all Democrats to OPPOSE the GOP's "Jim Crow 2.0" laws! **[Add your name right now to join them in this important fight>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220218-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220218-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&akid=3032%2E9716520%2EI8EYpu)**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220218-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220218-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&akid=3032%2E9716520%2EI8EYpu)
| | [I STAND WITH THE OBAMAS](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220218-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220218-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&akid=3032%2E9716520%2EI8EYpu)
---

Team -- President Obama was crystal clear: "The future of our country is at stake" if we don't protect voting rights.

The pace of the GOP's vicious scheme has escalated RAPIDLY over the last year.

\-- **FIRST:** Trump spread lies about election fraud and REFUSED to concede to President Biden.
\-- **THEN:** A far-right mob stormed the Capitol on January 6 in an attempted insurrection.
\-- **NOW: GOP officials are ATTACKING voting rights across the country to try and seize power by reducing our ability to vote.**

They've introduced over 400 bills to restrict access to the ballot already -- _and they are NOT slowing down!_

That's why Barack and Michelle Obama are leading the fight to protect voting rights and why we've launched a MASSIVE petition to join them -- ****_but our records indicate you may not_****** _have stood with the Obamas yet, and we're still 7.4% short of our 100,000 signature goal!_**

Don't let Barack and Michelle down! **[Click here to add your name and join the Obamas in OPPOSING the GOP's voter suppression>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220218-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220218-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&akid=3032%2E9716520%2EI8EYpu)**

| [I STAND WITH THE OBAMAS](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220218-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220218-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&akid=3032%2E9716520%2EI8EYpu)
---

Thank you for stepping up,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: Cora Neumann
subject: Zinke has never been more vulnerable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
Zinke not only abused his position as Secretary of the Interior for personal gain, he lied to ethics officials about it. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41967921/331092166/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGJkMmUxZi0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OWxwFgp_3fasoCOzREi28sKpM9CYxkoPJw8nzeQW9T8=) Friend, Before we break for the weekend, I need to ask you to **[contribute $3 to help us defeat Ryan Zinke in MT-01.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41967922/331092167/655314317?refcode=em-2.18.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGJkMmUxZi0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OWxwFgp_3fasoCOzREi28sKpM9CYxkoPJw8nzeQW9T8=) **There's been a game-changing update in my race, so I hope you'll hear me out about why your donation is so important. **This week, federal investigators concluded that my opponent Ryan Zinke not only abused his position as Secretary of the Interior for personal gain, he lied to ethics officials about it.** This confirms what Montanans have long-known about Zinke. His career has been defined by corruption and putting personal and political interests ahead of the needs of the people. And his tenure at the Department of the Interior will forever be remembered for having overseen the "largest sell off of public lands in U.S. History." **Zinke has never been weaker or more vulnerable.** No Montanan wants to be represented by a liar -- and that goes for both Democrats and Republicans. If there was ever a chance to win this swing seat, 2022 is the year to do it. [**We're laying the groundwork to reach undecided voters with the truth, but right now we’re $12,917 short of our end-of-week goal and can use a boost to get back on track. Can you chip in $3 today? Anything you give will help us elect an independent voice who will fight for Montana.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41967923/331092168/655314317?refcode=em-2.18.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGJkMmUxZi0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OWxwFgp_3fasoCOzREi28sKpM9CYxkoPJw8nzeQW9T8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41967924/331092169/655314317?refcode=em-2.18.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGJkMmUxZi0wYTkxLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OWxwFgp_3fasoCOzREi28sKpM9CYxkoPJw8nzeQW9T8=)

clean_body: Zinke not only abused his position as Secretary of the Interior for personal gain, he lied to ethics officials about it. | = Friend, Before we break for the weekend, I need to ask you to = There's been a game-changing update in my race, so I hope you'll hear me out about why your donation is so important. This week, federal investigators concluded that my opponent Ryan Zinke not only abused his position as Secretary of the Interior for personal gain, he lied to ethics officials about it. This confirms what Montanans have long-known about Zinke. His career has been defined by corruption and putting personal and political interests ahead of the needs of the people. And his tenure at the Department of the Interior will forever be remembered for having overseen the "largest sell off of public lands in U.S. History." Zinke has never been weaker or more vulnerable. No Montanan wants to be represented by a liar -- and that goes for both Democrats and Republicans. If there was ever a chance to win this swing seat, 2022 is the year to do it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your support, Cora = Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. | Amongst the wealthy and powerful there wasn’t a mask in sight. But, the very next day, thousands of kids had to mask up at school. Unbelievable hypocrisy. The evidence seems clear, it’s time for mask requirements on our kids to end. [I believe it’s time to unmask our kids, but I want to hear what you think. Let me know in our poll below: Should we still require masks in schools?](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=e%2BlHqQR4V3v4VMvJ3m0NDL9Oyn7EjMegyw%2Bn2w4NNScploHe4Vrn5PZheM9ZoBrx3I7BnmjmyZ3CRbhCR0YCIkHj%2BdlVIxV1uQ%2FqTlIUbOIftDAExafw7Q%3D%3D&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FUBMAG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DaHCmWNxg0MXN0YUMtQO9bvaxhnlwof1NxU0FpszEIbFYgOJ0FynyUQkiDf8GB9Rh0&I=20220218223230.00000095b1c8%40smtp-ad2-50-phx&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjI0OTEzMzIzOTI7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE5NjM0OTk2ODs%3D&V=3&S=_HlrLiu3C-ACbTbGTJSGqIxQfiyOAS3lAdQYVwewu9U) Randy

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Parents vote out San Francisco school board
body:
Spicer & Co in the news and more. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/78e97e06366c/parents-vote-out-san-francisco-school-board?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | |
---
## ICYMI: San Francisco parents overwhelmingly vote to remove school board members...
This was a great story and segment on _Spicer & Co_. Two parents who opposed the recall of Gavin Newsom and proudly voted for Biden, led an effort to recall the school board in San Francisco because of their handling of COVID in schools. Check it out:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=63f69ea1d1&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | | | | |
---
## _Spicer & Co_ in the News:
[**Dershowitz Tells Newsmax Hosts, ‘I Haven’t Seen Anything That Points Directly to Hillary Clinton’ in Durham Probe**](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3ada06f229&e=f6564bbe3b)**— via Mediaite** “Newsmax host **Sean Spicer** laid out the facts of the case before asking Dershowitz, “What’s the real deal?”“Well, as usual it’s split down the middle,” he replied. “It is a big deal and it constitutes probable cause for believing that people in the Clinton campaign were certainly involved in dirty politics. Whether they crossed the line to criminality – let’s not rush to judgment.”
| | | | | | |
---
## Great trip to Texas...
Had a great week of events in Texas talking about _Radical Nation_ , thanks to Parker County GOP, Tarrant County GOP, and Texas Federation of Republican Women for having me.
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
If you’re interested in hosting an event, reach out to contact@seanspicer.com.
| | | | | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Durham probe: Media outlets avoid, downplay latest developments implicating Clinton campaign](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6ff6c165d9&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox News ABC, CBS, NBC completely ignored the court filing from Special Counsel John Durham.
|
---
[Biden administration requests $30 billion for COVID response](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c32b08d8ef&e=f6564bbe3b) — Axios Seriously another $30 billion — do they have any clue where the trillions are?
|
---
[Big Tech Has a New Ally: The U.S. Chamber of Commerce](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b925ea8e94&e=f6564bbe3b) — via BloombergShocker.
|
---
[GOP eyes ambitious agenda if House flips](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=aabf83b0f8&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The HillHouse Republicans to lay out agenda if they take back the majority... Senate GOP... not so much.
|
---
[Building Back Stagflation](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=086fbe5023&e=f6564bbe3b) — via National ReviewA great break down on why inflation is high in the US because of Biden’s policies.
|
---
[How much members of Congress are spending on personal security](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fac7faf460&e=f6564bbe3b) — via AxiosPretty amazing analysis from Axios, Freshman GA Senator Warnock spent $600,000.
|

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Complacency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We know that it’s only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. We know that it's only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0b9ec10492a7495499a0be802c0363ab&_e=QtTUzB6UVIGFAyWt4f4Ks4D3vj7hd9lIcN87Za-_MzcP5TAEFRS2Q9a6YrkS5E2bcVsUVVx4R2biu7KkTYNyRTM9ACXdE8t1_FBMUksNKpjPgMRY_q0SLI45yL-gTwjOLT-Wi-ClKuBNZPa2bmomjMf8fZjb6c36meslMBw7OliKfnD9b-ft3lu0ooAhSFpVvK4AFPbdmuXgdPd2Q-kDOHu5GIwsMBNCToFYacPrmb1zOzji7bGAZoOJNh9C35JhwTO_m7brzRJKxoqqK_RlGTCQ4tuvxYWmXQsCWXh7AsA3bfREARwfS-DEjmdc7t9TNUx_Biyrvjz9EsNJ3zGsNbJmuBWCrBMaZ--FLWVn-GXp5aKYRC-7_i1nyO-2iiAngyIQg26ckl0Yvn1hfw035d-A38YzsIXpK-K1O4dJ2KPHIs5KtdZocXUfpPzZQ_k4qlTvIf2CiPcSv3Uf_PZB2w%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**_FIRST_** , Raphael Warnock won a 2021 special election by about 100,000 votes - out of more than 4 million ballots cast - becoming the first Democrat to win election to the Senate from Georgia since 2000.

**_THEN_** , Senator Warnock, using the national donor list he built during the 2021 runoff race, raised $32 million in his bid for a full six-year term in this fall's midterm elections.

**_NOW_** , we're in a “statistical dead heat” in the race for Georgia's Senate seat. BUT Warnock's got more than $23 million in the bank (cash) that he is using to make an $861,000 ad buy.

That's why we're asking you to help us close the gap between what our opponent has in the bank and what we've got in our reserves.

_This race is going to be the most expensive race of the 2022 cycle._

We know that it's only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. **[It's going to take thousands of hours of work to catch up with our opponent's fundraising, which is why we're emailing you today.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0b9ec10492a7495499a0be802c0363ab&_e=QtTUzB6UVIGFAyWt4f4Ks4D3vj7hd9lIcN87Za-_MzcP5TAEFRS2Q9a6YrkS5E2bcVsUVVx4R2biu7KkTYNyRTM9ACXdE8t1_FBMUksNKpjPgMRY_q0SLI45yL-gTwjOLT-Wi-ClKuBNZPa2bmomjMf8fZjb6c36meslMBw7OliKfnD9b-ft3lu0ooAhSFpVvK4AFPbdmuXgdPd2Q-kDOHu5GIwsMBNCToFYacPrmb1zOzji7bGAZoOJNh9C35JhnDFhn81Km5leoPy5yiafglx7gS_ENEsIUrPD2yT4gLI8o_b5g6929tJd4DY3m2D_P57b0AIqpaF2F_RwZIMSYKSNODyWVPD0WBUzRmQ_wJDxxlK1aFq2AQPq1Al2kgb3KJbAO5-MuYzqcAJFXSZInkE788pzTXS7-4qwkudXOETqW2-Z9OCWi-zMdV_IsntnW8L576xxVR1HJS4W4SFO9A%3D%3D)**

One of our biggest hurdles is complacency. We must start NOW.

**[Team Herschel is looking for 4,000 conservative patriots to make a gift of $6 or more today to help us close the fundraising gap with our opponent. Can we count on you to head to our donation page now and make YOUR contribution?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0b9ec10492a7495499a0be802c0363ab&_e=QtTUzB6UVIGFAyWt4f4Ks4D3vj7hd9lIcN87Za-_MzcP5TAEFRS2Q9a6YrkS5E2bcVsUVVx4R2biu7KkTYNyRTM9ACXdE8t1_FBMUksNKpjPgMRY_q0SLI45yL-gTwjOLT-Wi-ClKuBNZPa2bmomjMf8fZjb6c36meslMBw7OliKfnD9b-ft3lu0ooAhSFpVvK4AFPbdmuXgdPd2Q-kDOHu5GIwsMBNCToFYacPrmb1zOzji7bGAZoOJNh9C35JhJpbCA7bga6O7-hdrbsilriGNdQnG4yucgNhg48xs0r8DbxImviA6CCLAwy6Dz_n2M50voWbfcCjrODc0Fr9kc-OI9Ua6vMJpXRIy3nin415HiOtI7Ecjkc83cdkEvx21eaj5UzIA0WYj3c7W0kU57g0LKx3GhTRUZjh0UCPJohoouH7N3Qh0nqEtpnTX3sLtl4M_BKNAy87klv6SHSzwIg%3D%3D)**

My very best,

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0b9ec10492a7495499a0be802c0363ab&_e=QtTUzB6UVIGFAyWt4f4Ks4D3vj7hd9lIcN87Za-_MzcP5TAEFRS2Q9a6YrkS5E2bcVsUVVx4R2biu7KkTYNyRTM9ACXdE8t1_FBMUksNKpjPgMRY_q0SLI45yL-gTwjOLT-Wi-ClKuBNZPa2bmomjMf8fZjb6c36meslMBw7OliKfnD9b-ft3lu0ooAhSFpVvK4AFPbdmuXgdPd2Q-kDOHu5GIwsMBNCToFYacPrmb1zOzji7bGAZoOJNh9C35Jh1TulNFH8XeGZJScbQ81v2nAHnfHKrHy0RIudaay6G7e39GTbeBJiMW9QGK3WuZvMRv6Go_xtkHT6VvrrXpdg8Lr0m2FsUttzva93chjTYcCxlP9CacVxhuobSIqFGIJYVKYhJPGhJumBIvXl5Y_I-Ks_lSisDGBXZNcmaT8lneiUeItwSRQuH-m0u55Cf0IhI8vD3CN4y_z6IIbWSOf3Kg%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for Senate

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0b9ec10492a7495499a0be802c0363ab&_e=QtTUzB6UVIGFAyWt4f4Ks-PUJRFyEYgRhpV4esdOUgzMfGL_j-OTG4PPjpMR9jTgftb6CIwFV0uVNDg1CvVw8FMAvZ-wrzGWSOmdJNKXxdRd2YOhZO53jlmQ0ILNvBV41WnuMvpYr1lwW8caAko60o1uxkUjsj4GDgErKRqvApj91CZuyZbJLVLC0UP3qBhopUXX7qHiYnUqElgm1Wp9cHi1u7L_9aCR1J1oxf9xBsZEbBbMuRGIiPQMui_NBx5NABPQQnQDXLcOcoxwZp8G-A%3D%3D) [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0b9ec10492a7495499a0be802c0363ab&_e=QtTUzB6UVIGFAyWt4f4Ks-sqfI_qX9VaRnpVgF9mVEp2p1K6myltPqgBWTr2CgaNynkHe5GKZ0Hbsp1T6Ic3ar_LRVpWFAH5alshmAjggRUVGTBiq46A6k8Ax9anit-AGInE2kOw4jm74pE8NjGb-eRA6TOG42E_7T0TvzEtoQQFT5BHi4TqkySYiLKo_xDQneuSeRjTSRoa68lqh_vE25ibjG7TjOrp9PHKAh-qQoJ2VINrwLCz0tLh5Te8x-gRs--Bp0MGgytjqikaZZSEQA%3D%3D) [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0b9ec10492a7495499a0be802c0363ab&_e=QtTUzB6UVIGFAyWt4f4Ks8IEYeQk2HJ9m_1-OhFxKJd0guT-DELh9WiCHvfv6SIwjSu0ZR1kSf9KmJWgGEF6y34dcvjRZgAw7lS53t5e8UcFv4mIuKd8yMPOFiGqgO1_n345LpojRk27EhpCwIK2lh87D6i0qLMz_IU_H1Iy-dYbhMQWZquZFFNIQQhz-AKElZNu42QqCNf_8Wyq-Jf2y06HEmcWPDQAAYp28JiVYYGZ6V6BYGV-tT58-I5dRSFErW8JDndRr45jlo7B-0jusA01ldKQ7YI-Nx_t06fm2hk%3D) [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0b9ec10492a7495499a0be802c0363ab&_e=QtTUzB6UVIGFAyWt4f4Ks-pRieq_M1V2Z70ZXeKpa66wumGKAqs6sTpBru1-YXgG7GtM2rtIQf_hsLXWb6BCtC507D1tzkBujZXoxoR3YqqBCo4cMHg2eleAK-F0hwj-bZ7JWu-RgCBorMx8TveTqbCY_vSzJOYUuP9UEnM2j0oUBKYHrpRtAfogFZvXN9IeFFbyPTWSLnhl7qX4B5L_a4PY1a6S4pSIz4E0K6cihoxiXyGIpiNRdhl0TLG-UNfIdXAknJDjbaDqdh_zsi26Eg%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Van=20Someren?=
subject: I need you on our team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
To #FlipThe5th, we need all hands on deck | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dc0f6ab39591/i-am-running-for-congress-8850757?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=843792b36f&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Hey there,

I am running for Congress to advocate for the best interests of the 5th District, the entire state of Wisconsin, and our country because I believe the partisan games of Scott Fitzgerald and right-wing conservatives are doing more harm than good and are ultimately causing us to fall behind.

Our leaders are supposed to listen to the people they represent, acting on behalf of our best interests. That unfortunately has not been the case, and has gone largely unchecked due to extreme party solidarity and gerrymandering. It’s absolutely despicable, and has got to end. [****](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=27bf9331a2&e=356c0699dd)
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=fd91477b96&e=356c0699dd "VOLUNTEER")
---
| My main priority as your next Congressman is to strengthen and foster a strong middle class, supporting hardworking, everyday Americans like you and I. [**I hope that you'll join me on this journey by volunteering with my campaign. **](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=0a18915fc9&e=356c0699dd)

I care about unifying, leading, and listening to the needs of everyone I represent no matter where they may land on the political spectrum, because we all deserve a chance at the American Dream. I believe in fairness, and considering the livelihoods of those who agree with me, as well as those who do not.

**We are working to reach every voter in this district with my message, meaning it’s all hands on deck until the election in November.** [Whether you can call or text voters, help us knock on doors, arrange for a meeting with people in the district who think disagree with me, or even host a get together, I will be extremely grateful for your help. ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=e8cdc9f5bc&e=356c0699dd)

The only way we can flip the 5th and replace Fitzgerald is if we come together to undo the years worth of polarization and division by coming together to say enough is enough — and I can’t do it without you.

Thank you,

Mike
---
| | | Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
---
| | | | | | [](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=9a78e4d1b8&e=356c0699dd)

clean_body: To #FlipThe5th, we need all hands on deck | | | | | | | | | | Hey there, I am running for Congress to advocate for the best interests of the 5th District, the entire state of Wisconsin, and our country because I believe the partisan games of Scott Fitzgerald and right-wing conservatives are doing more harm than good and are ultimately causing us to fall behind. Our leaders are supposed to listen to the people they represent, acting on behalf of our best interests. That unfortunately has not been the case, and has gone largely unchecked due to extreme party solidarity and gerrymandering. It’s absolutely despicable, and has got to end. | "VOLUNTEER" | My main priority as your next Congressman is to strengthen and foster a strong middle class, supporting hardworking, everyday Americans like you and I. I care about unifying, leading, and listening to the needs of everyone I represent no matter where they may land on the political spectrum, because we all deserve a chance at the American Dream. I believe in fairness, and considering the livelihoods of those who agree with me, as well as those who do not. We are working to reach every voter in this district with my message, meaning it’s all hands on deck until the election in November. The only way we can flip the 5th and replace Fitzgerald is if we come together to undo the years worth of polarization and division by coming together to say enough is enough — and I can’t do it without you. Thank you, Mike | | | Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI | | | | | | | | | | www.MikeVanSomeren.com | | Copyright © 2022 Mike Van Someren for WI, All rights reserved.

name: Jason Lee, Beto for Texas
subject: Campaign offices across Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

It’s
Jason — Beto’s deputy campaign manager.

Our next TEC deadline is coming up quickly — it’s tomorrow. What we raise
in the next 36 hours could determine how many field offices we are able to
open, organizers we are able to hire, and voters we are able to reach
before Election Day.

We set a goal to raise $750,000 before midnight tomorrow to super-charge
our organizing efforts and open new field offices across Texas because
that’s how we’re going to win — by reaching voters where they are and
writing no one off.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53250?refcode=ema20220218-176851&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=176851%2E444211%2EBapot_ ]We have less than 36 hours until this fundraising
deadline.
Please, make your
first donation to help open field offices in every part of
Texas and make sure we have the resources to defeat Greg Abbott.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53250?refcode=ema20220218-176851&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=176851%2E444211%2EBapot_ ]Contribute $3

This race is going to be one of the closest elections ever held in Texas,
and it's going to take all of us coming together to win, which is why it’s
so important that we have the resources to open field offices across
Texas.

With 254 counties, 268,596 square miles, and more than 29.1 million
people, the best way to personally reach voters across the state is to
open as many brick-and-mortar locations as we can.

Every field office will be more than a place to host phone banks or launch
canvasses. It will be a hub for this community — staff and volunteers
alike — to come together and grow our movement to elect Beto.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53250?refcode=ema20220218-176851&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=176851%2E444211%2EBapot_ ]Donate now to help build a campaign that can reach every Texan. We
can't count out a single vote and it’s so important that we reach this
$750,000 fundraising goal.

Thank you so much for your support,

Jason Lee
Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=176851%2E444211%2EBapot_

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

subject: Chris Farrell on The Great America Show with Lou Dobbs!
